idea_spark.idea: 利用稀疏耦合参数区分零边是否携带信息，可启发设计更灵活的网络缺失机制。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度高，模板数量选择依赖预测拟合，可能过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合障碍似然与潜在混合，为处理异质零膨胀数据提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a Bayesian adaptive latent mixture model for zero-inflated weighted brain connectome analysis, handling both structural zeros and heterogeneous edge strengths.
en.motivation: Existing methods struggle with simultaneous structural zeros and heterogeneous edge weights in connectomics, where subjects exhibit overlapping connectivity patterns.
en.method: Represents each subject network as a simplex mixture of shared low-rank latent score matrices, with a hurdle likelihood separating edge existence from conditional strength, and a sparsity-coupling parameter controlling the informativeness of absent edges.
en.result: Simulations show gains over topology-only baselines; HCP data recover stable latent patterns and heterogeneous mixtures, with behavioral analyses as exploratory annotations.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable Bayesian framework for zero-inflated weighted networks, applicable to structured network data like brain connectomes.

idea_spark.idea: The sparsity-coupling parameter distinguishing informative vs. non-informative zeros may inspire flexible missingness mechanisms.
idea_spark.risk: High computational cost; template selection relies on predictive fit, risking overfitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining hurdle likelihood with latent mixtures offers a novel approach to heterogeneous zero-inflated data.

papers.title: Amortized Guidance for Image Inpainting with Pretrained Diffusion Models
papers.summary: We study image inpainting with generative diffusion models. Existing methods typically either train dedicated task-specific models, or adapt a pretrained diffusion model separately for each masked image at deployment. We introduce a middle-ground model, termed Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID), which keeps a pretrained diffusion backbone fixed, trains a small reusable guidance module offline, and then reuses it across masked images without per-instance optimization. We formulate it as a deterministic guidance problem with a supervised terminal objective. To make this problem learnable in high dimensions, we derive an auxiliary Gaussian formulation and prove that solving this randomized problem recovers the optimal deterministic guidance field. This bridge yields a principled continuous-time actor--critic algorithm for learning the guidance module in a fully data-driven manner. Empirically, on AFHQv2 and FFHQ under the pixel EDM pipeline and on ImageNet under the latent EDM2 pipeline, AID consistently improves the quality--speed trade-off over strong fixed-backbone and amortized inpainting baselines across multiple mask types, while adding less than one percent trainable overhead.

ai.tldr: 提出一种名为AID的摊销引导方法，在保持预训练扩散模型不变的情况下，训练一个可复用的轻量级引导模块，无需针对每个掩码图像单独优化，从而在图像修复中实现更好的质量-速度权衡。
ai.motivation: 现有图像修复方法要么训练专用模型，要么在部署时为每个掩码图像单独适配预训练扩散模型，前者成本高，后者效率低。需要一种折中方案，既能利用预训练模型的能力，又能高效处理多种掩码类型。
ai.method: 将图像修复建模为确定性引导问题，并引入辅助高斯公式证明随机化问题可恢复最优确定性引导场，从而设计出连续时间演员-评论家算法来离线学习引导模块。
ai.result: 在AFHQv2、FFHQ（像素EDM）和ImageNet（潜在EDM2）上，AID在多种掩码类型下均优于强基线，且可训练参数增加不到1%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、即用的图像修复方案，用户无需针对每张图片进行繁琐的优化，即可获得高质量修复结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将辅助高斯公式与演员-评论家算法结合，为高维确定性引导问题提供可学习的解决方案。
idea_spark.risk: 引导模块的泛化能力可能受限于训练时见过的掩码类型，对极端或未见掩码可能效果下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从强化学习中的演员-评论家方法获得灵感，将图像修复视为一个连续时间控制问题，从而利用离线学习实现高效推理。

en.tldr: We propose Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID), which keeps a pretrained diffusion backbone fixed, trains a small reusable guidance module offline, and reuses it across masked images without per-instance optimization, improving quality-speed trade-off.
en.motivation: Existing inpainting methods either train dedicated models or adapt a pretrained diffusion model per masked image at deployment, which are costly or inefficient. A middle-ground approach is needed to leverage pretrained models while handling diverse masks efficiently.
en.method: We formulate inpainting as a deterministic guidance problem, derive an auxiliary Gaussian formulation to prove that solving a randomized problem recovers the optimal deterministic guidance field, and develop a continuous-time actor-critic algorithm to learn the guidance module offline.
en.result: On AFHQv2, FFHQ (pixel EDM) and ImageNet (latent EDM2), AID consistently outperforms strong baselines across multiple mask types with less than 1% trainable overhead.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, ready-to-use inpainting solution that delivers high-quality results without per-image optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Combining an auxiliary Gaussian formulation with an actor-critic algorithm enables learning of high-dimensional deterministic guidance problems.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization may be limited to mask types seen during training; extreme or unseen masks could degrade performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by actor-critic methods in reinforcement learning, we treat inpainting as a continuous-time control problem, enabling efficient offline learning for fast inference.

papers.title: Perfect simulation for interacting Hawkes processes with reset-induced variable length memory
papers.summary: We study a class of interacting nonlinear Hawkes point processes on the integer lattice in which each component is reset after its own jumps. The intensity of a component depends on the post-reset activity of its nearest neighbours, which produces a variable-length memory structure.   We develop a graphical construction based on a dominating Poisson environment and introduce the clan of ancestors of a space-time point. The clan is the finite or infinite backward exploration of all events whose acceptance decisions may influence the target value. Our main result is a constructive subcriticality criterion: if the sure-event rate exceeds the candidate-event rate, equivalently if $β_*/(β^*-β_*)>1$, then the clan is almost surely finite. The proof is based on an explicit dominating branching process associated with the genealogical structure of the exploration.   The finiteness of the clan yields a measurable local construction of the stationary regime. We prove existence and uniqueness of the stationary solution by a coupling argument and obtain an exact backward--forward perfect simulation algorithm. The algorithm terminates almost surely in the subcritical regime and returns exact samples from the stationary law. Numerical experiments, together with reproducibility details and R code, illustrate the finite-clan mechanism and the computational behaviour near the theoretical threshold.

ai.tldr: 研究一类具有重置诱导变长记忆的交互非线性Hawkes过程，提出基于支配泊松环境的图构造，给出子临界性判据，并设计精确的完美模拟算法。
ai.motivation: 交互Hawkes过程在神经科学、流行病学等领域有广泛应用，但现有模型通常假设固定记忆长度，无法刻画重置事件导致的变长记忆结构。本文旨在建立此类过程的严格数学框架并实现精确模拟。
ai.method: 通过支配泊松环境构建图结构，引入祖先族概念进行后向探索；利用显式支配分支过程证明子临界性判据；基于耦合论证证明平稳解的存在唯一性，并设计后向-前向完美模拟算法。
ai.result: 得到构造性子临界性判据：当β_*/(β^*-β_*)>1时，祖先族几乎必然有限；证明了平稳解的存在唯一性；算法在子临界区域几乎必然终止，返回平稳律的精确样本。数值实验验证了有限祖先族机制和算法在阈值附近的计算行为。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了交互Hawkes过程变长记忆模型的严格数学基础，以及可实际运行的完美模拟算法（附R代码），可用于生成该过程的精确平稳样本。

idea_spark.idea: 将重置机制与变长记忆结合，可能启发设计更灵活的自适应模拟算法，例如在事件触发后动态调整记忆窗口。
idea_spark.risk: 子临界性条件依赖于参数估计，实际应用中参数可能处于临界或超临界区域，导致算法不终止或样本偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受分支过程与完美模拟结合启发，可进一步探索将类似图构造用于其他非马尔可夫点过程的精确采样。

en.tldr: Studies interacting nonlinear Hawkes processes with reset-induced variable length memory, proposes a graphical construction based on a dominating Poisson environment, gives a constructive subcriticality criterion, and designs an exact perfect simulation algorithm.
en.motivation: Interacting Hawkes processes are widely used in neuroscience, epidemiology, etc., but existing models typically assume fixed memory length and cannot capture the variable-length memory structure caused by reset events. This paper aims to establish a rigorous mathematical framework for such processes and achieve exact simulation.
en.method: Constructs a graphical structure via a dominating Poisson environment, introduces the clan of ancestors for backward exploration; proves a subcriticality criterion using an explicit dominating branching process; proves existence and uniqueness of the stationary solution via coupling, and designs a backward-forward perfect simulation algorithm.
en.result: Obtains a constructive subcriticality criterion: when β_*/(β^*-β_*)>1, the clan is almost surely finite; proves existence and uniqueness of the stationary solution; the algorithm terminates almost surely in the subcritical regime and returns exact samples from the stationary law. Numerical experiments illustrate the finite-clan mechanism and computational behavior near the threshold.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for interacting Hawkes processes with variable-length memory and a practical perfect simulation algorithm (with R code) for generating exact stationary samples.

idea_spark.idea: Combining reset mechanisms with variable-length memory may inspire more flexible adaptive simulation algorithms, e.g., dynamically adjusting the memory window after event triggers.
idea_spark.risk: The subcriticality condition depends on parameter estimation; in practice, parameters may lie in the critical or supercritical regime, causing algorithm non-termination or sample bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the combination of branching processes and perfect simulation, one could further explore similar graphical constructions for exact sampling of other non-Markovian point processes.

papers.title: MLGIB: Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck for Expressive and Robust Message Passing
papers.summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from over-squashing in deep message passing, where information from exponentially growing neighborhoods is compressed into fixed-dimensional representations. We show that this issue becomes a distinct failure mode in multi-label graphs: neighboring nodes often share only limited labels while differing across many irrelevant ones, causing predictive signals to be diluted by noisy label information. To address this challenge, we propose the Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck (MLGIB), which formulates multi-label message passing as constrained information transmission under irrelevant label noise. MLGIB balances expressiveness and robustness by preserving predictive label signals while suppressing irrelevant noise. Specifically, it constructs a Markovian dependence space and derives tractable variational bounds, where the lower bound maximizes mutual information with target labels and the upper bound constrains redundant source information. These bounds lead to an end-to-end label-aware message-passing architecture. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over existing methods, validating the effectiveness and generality of the proposed framework.

ai.tldr: 提出多标签图信息瓶颈（MLGIB），通过约束信息传输解决多标签图中消息传递的过压缩和标签噪声问题。
ai.motivation: 深层消息传递中，多标签图的邻域节点共享标签有限，大量无关标签稀释了预测信号，导致过压缩问题加剧。
ai.method: 构建马尔可夫依赖空间，推导可处理变分下界（最大化与目标标签的互信息）和上界（约束冗余源信息），实现端到端标签感知消息传递架构。
ai.result: 在多个基准上一致优于现有方法，验证了框架的有效性和通用性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过信息瓶颈原理提升多标签图神经网络的表达能力和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将变分信息瓶颈与图注意力机制结合，动态调整标签感知权重。
idea_spark.risk: 变分下界和上界的近似可能引入偏差，需验证在极端噪声下的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信息瓶颈理论启发，将消息传递视为受约束的信息传输过程。

en.tldr: Proposes Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck (MLGIB) to address over-squashing and label noise in multi-label graphs via constrained information transmission.
en.motivation: In deep message passing, multi-label graphs suffer from over-squashing because neighboring nodes share limited labels while differing on many irrelevant ones, diluting predictive signals.
en.method: Constructs a Markovian dependence space and derives tractable variational bounds: a lower bound maximizing mutual information with target labels and an upper bound constraining redundant source information, leading to an end-to-end label-aware message-passing architecture.
en.result: Consistent improvements over existing methods on multiple benchmarks, validating the framework's effectiveness and generality.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to enhance expressiveness and robustness of multi-label graph neural networks using the information bottleneck principle.

idea_spark.idea: Combine variational information bottleneck with graph attention mechanisms to dynamically adjust label-aware weights.
idea_spark.risk: Approximations in variational bounds may introduce bias; stability under extreme noise needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by information bottleneck theory, framing message passing as constrained information transmission.

papers.title: Constraint-Aware Flow Matching: Decision Aligned End-to-End Training for Constrained Sampling
papers.summary: Deep generative models provide state-of-the-art performance across a wide array of applications, with recent studies showing increasing applicability for science and engineering. Despite a growing corpus of literature focused on the integration of physics-based constraints into the generation process, existing approaches fail to enforce strict constraint satisfaction while maintaining sample quality. In particular, training-free constrained sampling methods, while providing per-sample feasibility guarantees, introduce a fundamental mismatch between the training objective and the constrained sampling procedure, often leading to performance degradation. Identifying this training-sampling misalignment as a central limitation of current constrained generative modeling approaches, this paper proposes Constraint-Aware Flow Matching, a novel end-to-end framework that explicitly incorporates constraint projections into the training objective. By aligning the model's learned dynamics with the constrained sampling process, the proposed method mitigates distributional shift induced by projection-based corrections, enabling high-quality constrained generation. The proposed approach is evaluated on three challenging real-world benchmarks, illustrating the generality and efficacy of the method.

ai.tldr: 提出约束感知流匹配框架，通过将约束投影显式纳入训练目标，解决约束采样中训练与采样失配导致的性能下降问题。
ai.motivation: 现有无训练约束采样方法虽保证可行性，但训练目标与采样过程失配，导致样本质量下降。
ai.method: 在流匹配训练中显式加入约束投影，使模型学习动态与约束采样过程对齐，缓解投影校正引起的分布偏移。
ai.result: 在三个真实世界基准上验证了方法的通用性和有效性，实现高质量约束生成。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要严格满足物理或工程约束的生成任务（如材料设计、分子构象）提供端到端训练方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束投影作为可微层嵌入训练图，实现端到端梯度传播。
idea_spark.risk: 约束投影可能引入额外计算开销，且非凸约束下梯度估计可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴强化学习中策略梯度与约束马尔可夫决策过程的对齐思想。

en.tldr: Proposes Constraint-Aware Flow Matching, an end-to-end framework that explicitly incorporates constraint projections into the training objective to mitigate the training-sampling misalignment in constrained generation.
en.motivation: Existing training-free constrained sampling methods suffer from a mismatch between training objective and sampling procedure, leading to degraded sample quality despite feasibility guarantees.
en.method: Integrates constraint projections directly into the flow matching training loss, aligning the learned dynamics with the constrained sampling process to reduce distributional shift.
en.result: Demonstrates generality and effectiveness on three challenging real-world benchmarks, achieving high-quality constrained generation.
en.help_to_user: Provides an end-to-end training solution for generation tasks requiring strict constraint satisfaction, such as material design and molecular conformation.

idea_spark.idea: Embed constraint projections as differentiable layers in the training graph for end-to-end gradient flow.
idea_spark.risk: Constraint projections may introduce computational overhead and unstable gradients under non-convex constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from policy gradient and constrained Markov decision processes in reinforcement learning.

papers.title: The inertial Itô drift and its applications to particle collision
papers.summary: The small mass $μ$ limit of an inertial system driven by an Ornstein Uhlenbeck fluid force, with correlation time $ε$ going to zero, leads to a first order system with an additional drift, which we call inertial-Itô-drift, depending on the limit $α$ of the ratio $μ/ε$; the drift being zero when $α=0$, corresponding to the Stratonovich integral in the limit equation, as in the Wong-Zakai theory, when applied directly to the first-order system with Ornstein-Uhlenbeck driver. We discuss the application of this result to particles driven by Stokes force;\ we identify inertial centrifugal effects and the so-called turbophoretic effect, as examples of the inertial-Itô-drift. We also analyze concentration effects and their link with the theory of particle collision in turbulent fluids.

ai.tldr: 研究了惯性系统在Ornstein-Uhlenbeck流体力和小质量极限下的惯性Itô漂移，并应用于湍流中粒子碰撞。
ai.motivation: 理解小质量极限下惯性系统与有色噪声耦合时出现的额外漂移项，及其在粒子碰撞理论中的物理意义。
ai.method: 通过取质量μ和噪声相关时间ε同时趋于零，且比值α=μ/ε保持有限，推导出惯性Itô漂移；分析Stokes力驱动粒子的离心效应和湍流趋近效应。
ai.result: 发现了依赖于α的惯性Itô漂移，当α=0时退化为Stratonovich积分；识别了惯性离心效应和湍流趋近效应作为该漂移的实例。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究湍流中粒子碰撞和浓度效应提供了新的随机微分方程框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该漂移修正现有湍流粒子碰撞模型，提高预测精度。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推导基于特定噪声模型，实际湍流噪声可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将小质量极限与噪声相关时间耦合的思路，可启发其他物理系统中的噪声诱导漂移研究。

zh.tldr: 研究了惯性系统在Ornstein-Uhlenbeck流体力和小质量极限下的惯性Itô漂移，并应用于湍流中粒子碰撞。
zh.motivation: 理解小质量极限下惯性系统与有色噪声耦合时出现的额外漂移项，及其在粒子碰撞理论中的物理意义。
zh.method: 通过取质量μ和噪声相关时间ε同时趋于零，且比值α=μ/ε保持有限，推导出惯性Itô漂移；分析Stokes力驱动粒子的离心效应和湍流趋近效应。
zh.result: 发现了依赖于α的惯性Itô漂移，当α=0时退化为Stratonovich积分；识别了惯性离心效应和湍流趋近效应作为该漂移的实例。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究湍流中粒子碰撞和浓度效应提供了新的随机微分方程框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该漂移修正现有湍流粒子碰撞模型，提高预测精度。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推导基于特定噪声模型，实际湍流噪声可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将小质量极限与噪声相关时间耦合的思路，可启发其他物理系统中的噪声诱导漂移研究。

en.tldr: Studies the inertial Itô drift arising in the small-mass limit of an inertial system driven by Ornstein-Uhlenbeck fluid force, and applies it to particle collision in turbulence.
en.motivation: To understand the additional drift term that appears when an inertial system couples with colored noise in the small-mass limit, and its physical significance for particle collision theory.
en.method: Derives the inertial Itô drift by taking the mass μ and noise correlation time ε to zero simultaneously with a fixed ratio α=μ/ε; analyzes centrifugal and turbophoretic effects for particles driven by Stokes force.
en.result: Identifies an inertial Itô drift depending on α, which reduces to the Stratonovich integral when α=0; recognizes inertial centrifugal effects and turbophoretic effects as examples of this drift.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new stochastic differential equation framework for studying particle collision and concentration effects in turbulent fluids.

idea_spark.idea: Use this drift to correct existing turbulent particle collision models for improved prediction accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical derivation relies on a specific noise model; real turbulence noise may be more complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Coupling the small-mass limit with noise correlation time may inspire studies of noise-induced drift in other physical systems.

papers.title: Stochastic Mean-Field LQ Stackelberg Differential Games with Random Coefficients: Theory and a Deep FBSDE Picard Solver
papers.summary: This paper studies a stochastic mean-field linear-quadratic Stackelberg differential game with random coefficients. The interaction between mean-field terms and random coefficients precludes the direct use of conventional decoupling techniques. We apply an extended Lagrange multiplier method to derive an affine operator representation of the follower's optimal response. The induced leader problem is then formulated as a generalized stochastic LQ control problem with operator-valued coefficients, and the Stackelberg optimal control is characterized through a Riccati-free coupled FBSDE system. We further develop a Deep FBSDE Picard Solver that preserves the Stackelberg order through follower-response learning, response-sensitivity extraction, leader optimization, and neural augmented Lagrangian enforcement of mean-field consistency constraints. Numerical studies covering convergence diagnostics, discretization sensitivity, Riccati calibration, ablation tests, local equilibrium validation, Stackelberg--Nash comparisons, and a financial application support the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

ai.tldr: 本文研究具有随机系数的随机平均场线性二次Stackelberg微分博弈，提出一种深度FBSDE Picard求解器，并通过数值实验验证其有效性。
ai.motivation: 平均场项与随机系数的相互作用使得传统解耦方法失效，需要新的理论框架和数值算法。
ai.method: 采用扩展拉格朗日乘子法推导跟随者的最优响应算子表示，将领导者问题转化为广义随机LQ控制问题，并设计深度FBSDE Picard求解器，通过跟随者响应学习、响应灵敏度提取、领导者优化和神经增广拉格朗日约束实现Stackelberg顺序保持。
ai.result: 数值实验包括收敛性诊断、离散化敏感性、Riccati校准、消融测试、局部均衡验证、Stackelberg-Nash比较以及金融应用，支持所提框架的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有随机系数的平均场Stackelberg博弈提供理论表征和可计算的深度学习方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将神经增广拉格朗日方法用于保持博弈顺序的约束优化，可能启发其他多智能体或分层决策问题的求解。
idea_spark.risk: 深度求解器的训练稳定性和泛化性需进一步验证，尤其在高维或复杂约束下。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合扩展拉格朗日乘子法与深度学习，为传统控制理论中的难解问题提供新思路。

en.tldr: This paper studies stochastic mean-field LQ Stackelberg differential games with random coefficients and develops a Deep FBSDE Picard Solver, validated by numerical experiments.
en.motivation: The interaction between mean-field terms and random coefficients precludes conventional decoupling techniques, necessitating a new theoretical and numerical framework.
en.method: An extended Lagrange multiplier method derives an affine operator representation of the follower's optimal response; the leader problem is reformulated as a generalized stochastic LQ control problem, and a Deep FBSDE Picard Solver is designed with follower-response learning, response-sensitivity extraction, leader optimization, and neural augmented Lagrangian enforcement of mean-field consistency.
en.result: Numerical studies including convergence diagnostics, discretization sensitivity, Riccati calibration, ablation tests, local equilibrium validation, Stackelberg–Nash comparisons, and a financial application support the framework's effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical characterization and a computable deep learning method for mean-field Stackelberg games with random coefficients.

idea_spark.idea: Using neural augmented Lagrangian for order-preserving constrained optimization may inspire solutions for other multi-agent or hierarchical decision problems.
idea_spark.risk: Training stability and generalization of the deep solver require further validation, especially in high dimensions or with complex constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining extended Lagrange multiplier methods with deep learning offers new avenues for intractable problems in classical control theory.

papers.title: Infinitely many multi-peaks solutions for a nonlinear Hartree system
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the following nonlinear Hartree system: $-Δu_i + V_i(x)u_i = μ_i φ_{u_i}u_i + \sum_{j\neq i}β_{ij}φ_{u_j}u_i$ for $x\in\mathbb{R}^3$, with $u_i\in H^1(\mathbb{R}^3)$ ($i=1,2,3$), where $φ_u(x):=\int_{\mathbb{R}^3}\frac{u^2(y)}{|x-y|}dy$ for any $u\in H^1(\mathbb{R}^3)$, $V_i(x)$ ($i=1,2,3$) are continuous bounded radial functions, and $β_{ij}$ are coupling constants. We mainly investigate the effects of the potentials and the nonlinear coupling terms on the structure of solutions.   Applying the Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction method, we prove the existence of infinitely many solutions to the system. Specifically, the solutions we obtain satisfy that some components are synchronized with each other but segregated from the others, and that some components are positive while others are sign-changing. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first time that solutions possessing some positive components and some sign-changing ones have been constructed using Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction methods. Moreover, it is also the first attempt to investigate systems consisting of three Hartree equations with mixed couplings.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一个由三个非线性Hartree方程组成的系统，通过Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法，证明了存在无穷多个多峰解，其中部分分量同步、部分分离，且部分为正、部分变号。
ai.motivation: 探索势函数和非线性耦合项对非线性Hartree系统解结构的影响，特别是构造同时具有正分量和变号分量的解。
ai.method: 应用Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法，将原问题转化为有限维约化问题，并利用变分技巧和拓扑论证证明解的存在性。
ai.result: 证明了系统存在无穷多个解，这些解中某些分量相互同步而与其余分量分离，且部分分量为正、部分变号。这是首次用Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法构造此类解，也是首次研究三个Hartree方程混合耦合的系统。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究非线性耦合偏微分方程的多峰解和变号解提供了新的构造方法和理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将混合耦合（同步与分离共存）的思想应用于更一般的多组分系统，或探索不同势函数对解结构的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 约化过程依赖于势函数的径向对称性和连续性，对于非对称或奇异势可能失效；变号分量的存在性证明可能对耦合常数范围敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受同步-分离混合模式的启发，可尝试构造具有部分分量同步、部分反同步的解，或研究解的分量数目与耦合强度的关系。

zh.result: 证明了系统存在无穷多个解，这些解中某些分量相互同步而与其余分量分离，且部分分量为正、部分变号。这是首次用Lyapunov-Schmidt约化方法构造此类解，也是首次研究三个Hartree方程混合耦合的系统。

en.tldr: This paper studies a nonlinear Hartree system of three equations, proving via Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction the existence of infinitely many multi-peak solutions where some components are synchronized, some segregated, and some positive while others sign-changing.
en.motivation: To investigate the effects of potentials and nonlinear coupling terms on the solution structure of nonlinear Hartree systems, especially constructing solutions with both positive and sign-changing components.
en.method: Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction method, transforming the problem into a finite-dimensional reduced problem, combined with variational and topological arguments.
en.result: Infinitely many solutions are obtained, with some components synchronized and others segregated, and some positive while others sign-changing. This is the first construction of such solutions via Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction and the first study of a three-equation Hartree system with mixed couplings.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new constructive method and theoretical foundation for multi-peak and sign-changing solutions in nonlinear coupled PDE systems.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying the mixed coupling (synchronization and segregation) idea to more general multi-component systems, or explore the influence of different potential shapes on solution structure.
idea_spark.risk: The reduction relies on radial symmetry and continuity of potentials; it may fail for non-symmetric or singular potentials. The existence of sign-changing components may be sensitive to the range of coupling constants.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the synchronization-segregation pattern, one could try to construct solutions with partially synchronized and partially anti-synchronized components, or study the relationship between the number of components and coupling strength.

papers.title: Implications of structured continuous maximal regularity
papers.summary: We study how maximal regularity estimates with respect to the continuous functions improve automatically in cases where the spatial norm is fundamentally different from the supremum norm. More precisely, we invoke properties such as weak compactness of convolution-type operators related to the mild solutions of the underlying linear evolution equations to sharpen the a priori estimates. These results have several applications: such as a new proof of Guerre-Delabriere's result on $\mathrm{L}^1$-maximal regularity and an extension of Baillon's theorem; a simplification for well-known perturbation theorems for generation of $\mathrm{C}_0$-semigroups; and we resolve an open problem on input-to-state stability from control theory for a general abstract class of systems.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了连续函数空间中的极大正则性估计在空间范数不同于上确界范数时的自动改进，并利用卷积型算子的弱紧性来强化先验估计，得到了多个应用。
ai.motivation: 现有极大正则性理论多基于上确界范数，但许多实际问题中空间范数不同，需要研究其自动改进机制。
ai.method: 通过分析线性发展方程温和解对应的卷积型算子的弱紧性，推导出更精细的先验估计。
ai.result: 给出了Guerre-Delabriere关于L1-极大正则性结果的新证明，推广了Baillon定理，简化了C0-半群生成扰动定理，并解决了控制理论中输入-状态稳定性的一个开放问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解连续极大正则性在非上确界范数下的自动改进机制及其在偏微分方程、半群理论和控制论中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将弱紧性论证与插值理论结合，可能得到更一般的极大正则性改进准则。
idea_spark.risk: 弱紧性条件在非自反空间中可能不成立，需谨慎选择空间框架。
idea_spark.inspiration: 控制理论中的输入-状态稳定性问题启发我们探索半群生成扰动定理的简化证明，这或许能推广到非线性系统。

en.tldr: This paper studies how maximal regularity estimates with respect to continuous functions improve automatically when the spatial norm differs from the supremum norm, using weak compactness of convolution-type operators to sharpen a priori estimates, with several applications.
en.motivation: Existing maximal regularity theory often relies on the supremum norm, but many practical problems involve different spatial norms, necessitating an understanding of automatic improvement.
en.method: By analyzing the weak compactness of convolution-type operators associated with mild solutions of linear evolution equations, refined a priori estimates are derived.
en.result: A new proof of Guerre-Delabriere's L1-maximal regularity result, an extension of Baillon's theorem, simplification of perturbation theorems for C0-semigroup generation, and resolution of an open problem on input-to-state stability in control theory for a general abstract class of systems.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the automatic improvement of continuous maximal regularity under non-supremum norms and its applications in PDEs, semigroup theory, and control theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining weak compactness with interpolation theory may yield more general criteria for maximal regularity improvement.
idea_spark.risk: Weak compactness may fail in non-reflexive spaces, so careful choice of function space framework is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The input-to-state stability problem from control theory inspired a simplified proof of perturbation theorems for semigroup generation, which might generalize to nonlinear systems.

keywords_raw: mild solutions of linear evolution equations

papers.title: Reducing cross-sample prediction churn in scientific machine learning
papers.summary: Scientific machine learning reports predictive performance. It does not report whether the same prediction would survive a different draw of training data. Across $9$ chemistry benchmarks, two classifiers trained on independent bootstraps of the same training set agree on aggregate accuracy to within $1.3\text{--}4.2$ percentage points but disagree on the class label of $8.0\text{--}21.8\%$ of test molecules. We call this gap \emph{cross-sample prediction churn}. The standard parameter-side techniques (deep ensembles, MC dropout, stochastic weight averaging) do not reduce this gap; two data-side methods do. The first is $K$-bootstrap bagging, which cuts the rate $40\text{--}54\%$ on every dataset at no accuracy cost ($K{\times}$-ERM compute). The second is \emph{twin-bootstrap}, our proposal: two networks trained jointly on independent bootstraps with a sym-KL consistency loss between their predictions, which at matched $2{\times}$-ERM compute reduces churn a further median $45\%$ beyond bagging-$K{=}2$. Cross-sample prediction churn deserves a column alongside predictive performance in scientific-ML benchmark reports, because without it the parameter-side and data-side methods are indistinguishable on the metric they actually differ on.

ai.tldr: 科学机器学习中，两个独立训练的模型在测试集上对8.0–21.8%的分子分类不一致，称为跨样本预测波动。
ai.motivation: 现有科学机器学习只报告预测性能，不报告预测结果对训练数据抽样的稳定性。
ai.method: 提出twin-bootstrap方法，联合训练两个网络，使用对称KL散度一致性损失，并对比K-bootstrap bagging等数据侧方法。
ai.result: K-bootstrap bagging将波动率降低40–54%，twin-bootstrap在相同计算量下进一步降低中位数45%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解并量化模型预测的稳定性，指导选择能降低波动的训练策略。

idea_spark.idea: 将一致性损失扩展到多个独立bootstrap样本，或引入对抗扰动增强鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: twin-bootstrap可能增加训练复杂度，且对超参数敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从集成学习与一致性正则化结合的角度，启发设计更稳定的科学ML模型。

en.tldr: In scientific machine learning, two independently trained models disagree on 8.0–21.8% of test molecules, termed cross-sample prediction churn.
en.motivation: Current scientific ML reports only predictive performance, not stability of predictions under different training data draws.
en.method: Proposes twin-bootstrap: jointly train two networks with symmetric KL divergence consistency loss, and compares with data-side methods like K-bootstrap bagging.
en.result: K-bootstrap bagging reduces churn by 40–54%; twin-bootstrap further reduces it by a median 45% at matched compute.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand and quantify prediction stability, guiding selection of training strategies that reduce churn.

idea_spark.idea: Extend consistency loss to multiple independent bootstrap samples or incorporate adversarial perturbations for enhanced robustness.
idea_spark.risk: Twin-bootstrap may increase training complexity and is sensitive to hyperparameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining ensemble learning with consistency regularization inspires design of more stable scientific ML models.

papers.title: Towards a holistic understanding of Selection Bias for Causal Effect Identification
papers.summary: Selection bias is pervasive in observational studies. For example, large scale biobanks data can exhibit ``healthy volunteer bias'' when respondents are healthier and of higher socio-economic status than the population they are meant to represent. Recovering causal effects from such sub-population is an important problem in causal inference, as estimating average treatment effects (ATE) from selected populations can result in a severely biased estimate of the ATE from the whole population.   In this paper, we investigate the identifiability of the ATE under selection bias. We provide necessary and sufficient conditions for ATE identifiability, leveraging weak assumptions on probability classes to characterize propensity score and selection probability. Compared to previous works, our results extend existing graphical identifiability criteria and offer a more comprehensive understanding of causal effect identification with strictly weaker conditions in the presence of selection bias.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了在选择性偏差下平均处理效应的可识别性，给出了必要且充分的条件，并扩展了现有的图形化可识别性准则。
ai.motivation: 大规模生物库等观察性研究常存在选择性偏差（如健康志愿者偏差），导致从子群体估计的平均处理效应严重偏离总体真实值，因此需要系统理解并解决该问题。
ai.method: 利用概率类的弱假设刻画倾向得分和选择概率，推导出ATE可识别的充要条件，并与现有图形化准则进行比较。
ai.result: 提出的条件比以往工作更弱，提供了更全面的因果效应可识别性理解，并扩展了现有图形化准则。

idea_spark.idea: 结合倾向得分与选择概率的联合建模，开发基于变分推断或生成模型的ATE估计方法，以自动满足可识别性条件。
idea_spark.risk: 弱假设虽放宽条件，但实际数据可能仍违反某些隐含假设（如无未测量混杂），导致估计偏差。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the identifiability of the average treatment effect under selection bias, provides necessary and sufficient conditions, and extends existing graphical identifiability criteria.
en.motivation: Observational studies such as large biobanks often suffer from selection bias (e.g., healthy volunteer bias), leading to severely biased estimates of the average treatment effect from the whole population, necessitating a systematic understanding.
en.method: Leveraging weak assumptions on probability classes to characterize propensity score and selection probability, deriving necessary and sufficient conditions for ATE identifiability, and comparing with existing graphical criteria.
en.result: The proposed conditions are strictly weaker than previous work, offering a more comprehensive understanding of causal effect identification under selection bias.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers determine whether the average treatment effect can be unbiasedly estimated from observational data under selection bias, and guides the design of more robust causal inference strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an ATE estimation method based on variational inference or generative models that jointly models propensity score and selection probability to automatically satisfy identifiability conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Although weak assumptions relax conditions, real data may still violate implicit assumptions (e.g., no unmeasured confounding), leading to estimation bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by 'healthy volunteer bias', further explore how to leverage temporal structure in longitudinal data or dynamic selection scenarios to aid causal effect identification.

papers.title: On the Darboux-Halphen system: Jacobi vs Lie
papers.summary: Two constructions of the Darboux-Halphen system are discussed. In the Jacobi construction we start with multi-valued functions which are fixed as the first integrals. In the Lie construction we use single-valued representation of the simple algebra which is non-integrable in Lie's terminology.

ai.tldr: 本文讨论了Darboux-Halphen系统的两种构造方法：Jacobi构造和Lie构造。
ai.motivation: 比较两种不同的构造方法，揭示其内在联系与差异。
ai.method: Jacobi构造从多值函数出发，将其固定为首次积分；Lie构造使用单值表示简单代数，该代数在Lie术语中不可积。
ai.result: 展示了两种构造的数学框架和适用条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Darboux-Halphen系统的不同数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Lie构造中的非可积代数转化为可积系统的可能性。
idea_spark.risk: 非可积性可能导致构造失效或需要额外条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数表示论角度重新审视可积系统的分类。

en.tldr: This paper discusses two constructions of the Darboux-Halphen system: the Jacobi construction and the Lie construction.
en.motivation: To compare the two different constructions and reveal their intrinsic connections and differences.
en.method: The Jacobi construction starts with multi-valued functions fixed as first integrals; the Lie construction uses a single-valued representation of a simple algebra that is non-integrable in Lie's terminology.
en.result: The mathematical frameworks and applicability conditions of both constructions are presented.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the different mathematical foundations of the Darboux-Halphen system.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the possibility of transforming the non-integrable algebra in the Lie construction into an integrable system.
idea_spark.risk: Non-integrability may cause the construction to fail or require additional conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Re-examine the classification of integrable systems from the perspective of algebraic representation theory.

papers.title: Graph Neural Networks with Triangle-Based Messages for the Multicut Problem
papers.summary: The multicut problem is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem with diverse applications in fields such as bioinformatics, data mining and computer vision. Graph neural networks have been defined for the multicut problem but can be adapted further to its specific objective function and constraints. In this article, we introduce such an adapted graph neural network architecture in which features are assigned only to edges, and the computation of messages is based on triangles in the underlying graph. Experiments with synthetic and real-world instances with up to 200 nodes show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art heuristic solvers in terms of solution quality while maintaining feasible runtimes. For some instances, our method finds optimal solutions in seconds whereas exact solvers need hours to find and certify optimal solutions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于三角形消息传递的图神经网络，用于求解NP难的多割问题，在合成和真实实例上优于现有启发式求解器。
ai.motivation: 多割问题是NP难的组合优化问题，现有图神经网络未充分利用其目标函数和约束，需要更适配的架构。
ai.method: 设计仅对边分配特征的图神经网络，消息计算基于底层图中的三角形结构。
ai.result: 在多达200个节点的实例上，方法在解质量上超越最先进启发式求解器，部分实例秒级找到最优解，而精确求解器需数小时。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效求解多割问题的深度学习方案，适用于生物信息学、数据挖掘和计算机视觉等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将图神经网络的消息传递限制在三角形子结构上，以更好地编码局部约束。
idea_spark.risk: 三角形数量随节点数增长可能带来计算开销，需验证大规模图的可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从多割问题的目标函数出发，设计专有图神经网络架构，而非通用模型。

en.tldr: Proposes a graph neural network with triangle-based message passing for the NP-hard multicut problem, outperforming state-of-the-art heuristic solvers on synthetic and real instances.
en.motivation: The multicut problem is NP-hard and existing GNNs do not fully exploit its objective and constraints, necessitating a tailored architecture.
en.method: Designs a GNN that assigns features only to edges and computes messages based on triangles in the underlying graph.
en.result: On instances up to 200 nodes, the method achieves better solution quality than leading heuristic solvers, finding optimal solutions in seconds for some cases while exact solvers take hours.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient deep learning solution for the multicut problem, applicable in bioinformatics, data mining, and computer vision.

idea_spark.idea: Restrict message passing in GNNs to triangular substructures to better encode local constraints.
idea_spark.risk: The number of triangles may grow with node count, posing scalability challenges for large graphs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design a specialized GNN architecture by directly leveraging the objective function of the multicut problem, rather than using a generic model.

papers.title: Whitham modulation equations for the regularized Boussinesq equation with cubic nonlinearity
papers.summary: A regularized Boussinesq equation is studied as a dispersive, long-wave (quasicontinuum) approximation of the Fermi-Pasta-Ulam lattice with a general cubic interaction force. Explicit periodic traveling wave solutions in terms of Jacobi elliptic functions are classified, and their solitary-wave, kink, and trigonometric limits are obtained. The Whitham modulation equations describing slow modulations of periodic traveling wave solutions are derived using an averaged variational principle. The convexity (strict hyperbolicity, genuine nonlinearity) of the resulting hydrodynamic-type equations is examined numerically in general and analytically in the solitary-wave and harmonic limits. In particular, the loss of hyperbolicity and the formation of complex conjugate characteristic speeds is shown to lead to modulational instability of periodic traveling waves. The onset of modulational instability is verified by numerical computations of linearized spectra for periodic traveling waves and initial value problems that also reveal additional short-wave instabilities.

ai.tldr: 研究了具有三次非线性的正则化Boussinesq方程的Whitham调制方程，分析了周期行波的慢调制及其不稳定性。
ai.motivation: 理解Fermi-Pasta-Ulam晶格的长波近似中周期行波的调制不稳定性。
ai.method: 利用平均变分原理推导Whitham调制方程，通过数值和解析方法检验双曲性，并计算线性化谱验证不稳定性。
ai.result: 发现周期行波在失去双曲性时出现调制不稳定性，并揭示了额外的短波不稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分析非线性色散波调制不稳定性的理论框架和数值验证方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将平均变分原理与数值谱分析结合，系统研究周期行波的稳定性边界。
idea_spark.risk: 解析推导可能仅适用于特定非线性形式，数值结果依赖参数选择。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将调制不稳定性与短波不稳定性耦合，探索多尺度不稳定性机制。

en.tldr: Whitham modulation equations are derived for the regularized Boussinesq equation with cubic nonlinearity, revealing modulational instability of periodic traveling waves.
en.motivation: To understand the slow modulation and instability of periodic waves in a long-wave approximation of the Fermi-Pasta-Ulam lattice.
en.method: An averaged variational principle is used to derive Whitham modulation equations; hyperbolicity is examined numerically and analytically, and linearized spectra are computed.
en.result: Loss of hyperbolicity leads to modulational instability, and additional short-wave instabilities are observed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical and numerical framework for analyzing modulational instability in nonlinear dispersive waves.

idea_spark.idea: Combine averaged variational principles with numerical spectral analysis to systematically map stability boundaries of periodic waves.
idea_spark.risk: Analytical derivations may be limited to specific nonlinear forms; numerical results depend on parameter choices.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider coupling modulational instability with short-wave instabilities to explore multi-scale instability mechanisms.

papers.title: Sampling from Flow Language Models via Marginal-Conditioned Bridges
papers.summary: Flow Language Models (FLMs) are a recently introduced class of language models which adapt continuous flow matching for one-hot encoded token sequences. Their denoisers have a special structure absent from generic continuous diffusion models: each block of the denoising mean is a posterior marginal distribution over the clean token at that position. Standard DDPM-style samplers collapse these marginals to a single conditional-mean endpoint and bridge toward this simplex-valued point, which is generally not a valid one-hot sequence. We argue that the natural sampler for an FLM is instead posterior-predictive. At each reverse step, we sample a clean one-hot endpoint from the factorized posterior defined by the FLM token marginals, and then sample the next continuous state from the analytic Ornstein--Uhlenbeck bridge conditioned on that endpoint. The method is training-free, uses the same model evaluations as standard sampling, and gives a principled interface for token-level decoding controls such as temperature scaling and nucleus truncation. We show that, under exact posterior marginals, the endpoint approximation error is exactly the conditional multi-information among token positions. The induced one-step bridge kernel preserves all token-wise posterior-predictive marginals and loses only the residual cross-position dependence. Finally, we prove a Girsanov path-space comparison showing that the marginal-conditioned bridge has a no-larger denoising-error term than the frozen conditional-mean bridge, with strict improvement whenever intermediate coordinate-wise bridge observations reveal additional information about the clean token. Experiments with FLMs show that the sampler improves the quality--diversity tradeoff. Code is available at: github.com/imbirik/mcb.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于边际条件桥的流语言模型采样方法，通过后验预测采样替代标准DDPM采样，改善质量-多样性权衡。
ai.motivation: 标准DDPM采样器将流语言模型的边际分布坍缩为条件均值端点，导致生成的序列不是有效的独热序列，影响采样质量。
ai.method: 在每个反向步骤中，从因子化后验分布采样干净的独热端点，然后基于该端点从解析的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck桥采样下一个连续状态。该方法无需额外训练，使用与标准采样相同的模型评估。
ai.result: 在精确后验边际下，端点近似误差等于条件多信息；边际条件桥的降噪误差项不大于冻结条件均值桥，且严格改进。实验表明采样器改善了质量-多样性权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需训练、原理清晰的流语言模型采样方法，支持温度缩放和核截断等解码控制，可直接用于提升生成质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将边际条件桥与强化学习中的策略梯度结合，在采样过程中动态调整温度参数以优化特定奖励函数。
idea_spark.risk: 后验边际的精确计算在复杂模型中可能不可行，近似误差的累积可能影响采样稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受流语言模型特殊结构启发，利用后验预测采样替代条件均值桥，为离散扩散模型提供更自然的采样路径。

en.tldr: Proposes a sampling method for Flow Language Models using marginal-conditioned bridges, replacing standard DDPM sampling with posterior-predictive sampling to improve the quality-diversity tradeoff.
en.motivation: Standard DDPM samplers collapse the marginal distributions of FLMs into a conditional-mean endpoint, resulting in sequences that are not valid one-hot vectors, degrading sampling quality.
en.method: At each reverse step, sample a clean one-hot endpoint from the factorized posterior defined by FLM token marginals, then sample the next continuous state from the analytic Ornstein-Uhlenbeck bridge conditioned on that endpoint. The method is training-free and uses the same model evaluations as standard sampling.
en.result: Under exact posterior marginals, the endpoint approximation error equals the conditional multi-information; the marginal-conditioned bridge has a no-larger denoising-error term than the frozen conditional-mean bridge, with strict improvement. Experiments show improved quality-diversity tradeoff.
en.help_to_user: Provides a principled, training-free sampling method for FLMs that supports token-level decoding controls like temperature scaling and nucleus truncation, directly improving generation quality.

idea_spark.idea: Combine marginal-conditioned bridges with reinforcement learning policy gradients to dynamically adjust temperature during sampling to optimize a specific reward function.
idea_spark.risk: Exact computation of posterior marginals may be infeasible in complex models, and approximation errors could accumulate, affecting sampling stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the special structure of FLMs, using posterior-predictive sampling instead of conditional-mean bridges provides a more natural sampling path for discrete diffusion models.

papers.title: SPLIT: SymPathy for Large jobs Improves Tail latency
papers.summary: We study the asymptotic response time tail in the M/G/n multi-server queue with heavy-tailed (regularly varying) job sizes, a setting representative of modern computing workloads. For single-server systems, tail optimization is well understood: under heavy-tailed job sizes, policies such as SRPT that strictly prioritize short jobs are strongly tail optimal, and giving any priority to large jobs is harmful. For multi-server systems, the question has been almost entirely open.   This paper gives the first strongly tail-optimal scheduling policies for the M/G/n queue with heavy-tailed job sizes. Our central finding is that the multi-server case is intrinsically different from the single-server case: giving a small amount of ``sympathy'' to large jobs is essential for strong tail optimality. We establish strong (or arbitrarily close to strong) tail optimality across the full stability region, both with and without knowledge of job sizes.

ai.tldr: 本文研究M/G/n多服务器队列在重尾作业大小下的渐近响应时间尾部，发现多服务器场景下对大型作业给予少量“同情”是实现强尾部最优性的关键。
ai.motivation: 单服务器系统中尾部优化已明确，但多服务器系统几乎完全未解决，而现代计算负载常涉及重尾分布。
ai.method: 通过理论分析M/G/n队列，提出并证明新的调度策略在完整稳定区域内实现强尾部最优性。
ai.result: 首次给出多服务器重尾作业下的强尾部最优调度策略，核心发现是需对大型作业给予少量优先。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解多服务器系统中如何优化尾部延迟，指导实际调度策略设计。

idea_spark.idea: 在多服务器系统中，故意让大型作业偶尔优先，可显著改善整体尾部延迟。
idea_spark.risk: 过度同情大型作业可能增加短作业的延迟，需精确控制同情程度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 单服务器直觉（完全优先短作业）在多服务器中失效，启发重新审视其他单服务器优化在多服务器中的适用性。

zh.tldr: 本文研究M/G/n多服务器队列在重尾作业大小下的渐近响应时间尾部，发现多服务器场景下对大型作业给予少量“同情”是实现强尾部最优性的关键。
zh.motivation: 单服务器系统中尾部优化已明确，但多服务器系统几乎完全未解决，而现代计算负载常涉及重尾分布。
zh.method: 通过理论分析M/G/n队列，提出并证明新的调度策略在完整稳定区域内实现强尾部最优性。
zh.result: 首次给出多服务器重尾作业下的强尾部最优调度策略，核心发现是需对大型作业给予少量优先。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解多服务器系统中如何优化尾部延迟，指导实际调度策略设计。

idea_spark.idea: 在多服务器系统中，故意让大型作业偶尔优先，可显著改善整体尾部延迟。
idea_spark.risk: 过度同情大型作业可能增加短作业的延迟，需精确控制同情程度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 单服务器直觉（完全优先短作业）在多服务器中失效，启发重新审视其他单服务器优化在多服务器中的适用性。

en.tldr: This paper studies the asymptotic response time tail in the M/G/n multi-server queue with heavy-tailed job sizes, finding that giving a small amount of sympathy to large jobs is essential for strong tail optimality in multi-server systems.
en.motivation: Tail optimization is well understood for single-server systems but almost entirely open for multi-server systems, which are representative of modern computing workloads.
en.method: Theoretical analysis of the M/G/n queue, proposing and proving new scheduling policies that achieve strong tail optimality across the full stability region.
en.result: First strongly tail-optimal scheduling policies for multi-server systems with heavy-tailed job sizes, with the key insight that some priority for large jobs is necessary.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to optimize tail latency in multi-server systems and guides practical scheduling design.

idea_spark.idea: In multi-server systems, deliberately giving occasional priority to large jobs can significantly improve overall tail latency.
idea_spark.risk: Excessive sympathy for large jobs may increase latency for short jobs, requiring precise control of the sympathy level.
idea_spark.inspiration: The failure of single-server intuition (strictly prioritize short jobs) in multi-server systems inspires re-examining other single-server optimizations for multi-server applicability.

papers.title: The WidthWall: A Strict Expressivity Hierarchy for Hypergraph Neural Networks
papers.summary: Hypergraphs provide a natural framework to model higher-order interactions in scientific, social, and biological systems. Hypergraph neural networks (HGNNs) aim to learn from such data, yet it remains unclear which higher-order structures these models can represent. We show that hypergraph expressivity is governed by which small patterns an architecture can detect and count. We formalize this via homomorphism densities, which measure how often a structural motif appears in a hypergraph. Combining classical homomorphism-count completeness with invariant approximation, we show that homomorphism densities generate all continuous hypergraph invariants and organize them into a strict hierarchy indexed by hypertree width. This yields a Width Wall: a fundamental architectural limit beyond which no hidden dimension, training procedure or fixed-depth HGNN can represent invariants requiring wider patterns. Our framework provides a unified characterization of 15 HGNN architectures, precisely identifies information lost by clique expansion, and motivates density-aware models that extend expressivity beyond bounded-width message passing. We experimentally validate this finding on an APPLICATION NODE CLASSIFICATION SUITE of real-world hypergraphs, where the Width Wall predicts when graph-reduction baselines fail and when density features help.

ai.tldr: 提出超图神经网络的严格表达性层级结构（WidthWall），证明同态密度生成所有连续超图不变量，并揭示超树宽度的根本限制。
ai.motivation: 超图神经网络（HGNN）能学习高阶交互，但哪些高阶结构可被表示尚不明确。
ai.method: 通过同态密度形式化表达性，结合经典同态计数完备性与不变逼近，建立基于超树宽度的严格层级。
ai.result: 发现WidthWall：超出特定超树宽度的模式无法被任何固定深度HGNN表示；统一刻画15种架构，揭示团展开的信息损失。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解HGNN的表达能力边界，指导选择或设计更有效的超图模型。

idea_spark.idea: 设计密度感知的HGNN，通过显式编码局部超边密度来突破宽度限制。
idea_spark.risk: 密度特征可能引入噪声或过拟合，需平衡表达性与泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴图同态计数在组合优化中的成功，将其用于超图神经架构搜索。

en.tldr: Proposes a strict expressivity hierarchy (WidthWall) for hypergraph neural networks, proving that homomorphism densities generate all continuous hypergraph invariants and revealing fundamental limits based on hypertree width.
en.motivation: Hypergraph neural networks (HGNNs) learn from higher-order interactions, but it is unclear which higher-order structures they can represent.
en.method: Formalizes expressivity via homomorphism densities, combining classical homomorphism-count completeness with invariant approximation to establish a strict hierarchy indexed by hypertree width.
en.result: Discovers the Width Wall: patterns beyond a certain hypertree width cannot be represented by any fixed-depth HGNN; unifies 15 architectures and identifies information loss from clique expansion.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the expressivity limits of HGNNs and guides the design of more effective hypergraph models.

idea_spark.idea: Design density-aware HGNNs that explicitly encode local hyperedge density to break the width barrier.
idea_spark.risk: Density features may introduce noise or overfitting, requiring a balance between expressivity and generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from the success of graph homomorphism counting in combinatorial optimization for hypergraph neural architecture search.

papers.title: Embodied Neurocomputation: A Framework for Interfacing Biological Neural Cultures with Scaled Task-Driven Validation
papers.summary: Biological neural networks (BNNs) have been established as a powerful and adaptive substrate that offer the potential for incredibly energy and data efficient information processing with distinct learning mechanisms. Yet a core challenge to utilizing BNN for neurocomputation is determining the optimal encoding and decoding mechanisms between the traditional silicon computing interface and the living biology. Here, we propose an Embodied Neurocomputation framework as a systems-level approach to this multi-variable optimization encoding/decoding problem. We operationalize this approach through the first large-scale parameter optimization of encoding configurations for a BNN agent performing closed-loop navigation along an odor-style gradient in a simulated grid-world. Despite the relative simplicity of the task, the biological interactions gave rise to a massive multi-combinatorial search space for optimal parameters. By considering how the components of the system are interconnected and parameterized, we evaluated approximately 1,300 parameter combinations, over 4,000 hours of real-time agent-environment interactions, to identify 12 configurations that consistently demonstrated learning across multiple episodes. These configurations achieved significantly higher task performances than optimized silicon-based DQN agents under the same interaction budget. These findings represent an initial step toward robust and scalable goal-oriented learning using BNNs. Our framework establishes a foundation for applying task-driven neurocomputing and supports the development of field-wide benchmarks. In the long term, this work supports the development of hybrid bio-silicon architectures capable of efficient, adaptive and real-time computation, including the potential for robotic control applications.

ai.tldr: 提出一种具身神经计算框架，通过大规模参数优化实现生物神经网络在模拟网格世界中的闭环导航学习。
ai.motivation: 生物神经网络具有高效、低能耗的信息处理能力，但如何优化其与硅基计算接口的编码/解码机制仍是核心挑战。
ai.method: 构建具身神经计算框架，对生物神经网络代理在模拟气味梯度导航任务中的编码配置进行大规模参数优化，评估约1300种参数组合。
ai.result: 发现12种配置在多次试验中持续学习，性能显著优于同等交互预算下的硅基DQN代理。
ai.help_to_user: 为生物-硅基混合计算系统的任务驱动验证和基准测试提供系统级框架。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将生物神经网络的学习机制与强化学习算法结合，实现更高效的混合智能系统。
idea_spark.risk: 生物神经网络的稳定性和可重复性可能限制实际应用，需进一步验证长期可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物系统高效学习的启发，可设计新型神经形态计算架构，模仿生物突触可塑性。

en.tldr: Proposes an Embodied Neurocomputation framework for optimizing encoding/decoding in biological neural networks performing closed-loop navigation in a simulated grid world.
en.motivation: Biological neural networks offer energy-efficient and adaptive computation, but optimizing the interface with silicon-based systems remains a key challenge.
en.method: A systems-level parameter optimization of encoding configurations for a BNN agent in a closed-loop odor-gradient navigation task, evaluating ~1,300 parameter combinations over 4,000 hours of interactions.
en.result: Identified 12 configurations showing consistent learning across episodes, outperforming optimized silicon-based DQN agents under the same interaction budget.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable framework for task-driven validation and benchmarking of hybrid bio-silicon computing systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining BNN learning mechanisms with reinforcement learning algorithms for more efficient hybrid intelligent systems.
idea_spark.risk: Stability and reproducibility of BNNs may limit practical deployment; long-term reliability needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by biological learning efficiency, design novel neuromorphic architectures mimicking synaptic plasticity.

papers.title: Finite-time blow-up in an elementary model of the 3D Navier-Stokes equations
papers.summary: We demonstrate finite-time blow-up in a simple, realistic shell model of the 3D Navier-Stokes equations, equipped with "smooth" (i.e., rapidly decaying in frequency) initial data and forcing. Previously studied models either exhibit a turbulent cascade that regularizes the three-dimensional viscous dynamics, or rely on highly artificial interactions not transparently realized in the true Euler nonlinearity. We also treat the inviscid, unforced case and obtain singularity formation just above the energy level. We conclude with a discussion of the prospects for embedding the behavior of the dyadic model into the full Euler and Navier-Stokes equations.

ai.tldr: 在一个简单的三维Navier-Stokes方程的壳模型中，使用光滑初始数据和强迫，证明了有限时间爆破。
ai.motivation: 此前模型要么因湍流级联而正则化粘性动力学，要么依赖不切实际的相互作用，本研究旨在构建一个更真实的爆破模型。
ai.method: 采用具有快速频率衰减的“光滑”初始数据和强迫的壳模型，并分析无粘无强迫情形。
ai.result: 在能量水平以上观察到奇点形成，并讨论了将二元模型行为嵌入完整Euler和Navier-Stokes方程的前景。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解三维Navier-Stokes方程中有限时间爆破的可能机制。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将二元模型的爆破机制嵌入更真实的湍流模拟中。
idea_spark.risk: 真实Navier-Stokes方程中可能因额外自由度而抑制爆破。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从壳模型的简化中寻找奇点形成的核心条件。

en.tldr: Finite-time blow-up is demonstrated in a simple shell model of the 3D Navier-Stokes equations with smooth initial data and forcing.
en.motivation: Previous models either regularize via turbulent cascade or rely on unrealistic interactions; this work aims for a more realistic blow-up model.
en.method: A shell model with rapidly decaying (smooth) initial data and forcing is analyzed, along with the inviscid unforced case.
en.result: Singularity formation is observed just above the energy level, and prospects for embedding the dyadic model into full Euler/Navier-Stokes are discussed.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand possible mechanisms of finite-time blow-up in 3D Navier-Stokes equations.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to embed the dyadic model's blow-up mechanism into more realistic turbulence simulations.
idea_spark.risk: Real Navier-Stokes equations may suppress blow-up due to additional degrees of freedom.
idea_spark.inspiration: Seek core conditions for singularity formation from the simplification of shell models.

papers.title: Graph-Based Financial Fraud Detection with Calibrated Risk Scoring and Structural Regularization
papers.summary: Financial transaction fraud prevention faces challenges such as complex relationship structures, concealed behavioral patterns, and dynamically changing data distribution. Discrimination models relying solely on independent sample features are insufficient to fully characterize the risks of group collaboration and chain transfers within transaction networks. This paper proposes a graph neural network representation learning and risk discrimination framework for financial transaction fraud prevention. It integrates transaction records and identity information into node attributes and constructs a transaction graph based on shared attributes and interaction consistency to explicitly model inter-transaction relationships. In model design, a multi-layer message passing mechanism is employed to aggregate neighborhood information, learn node embedding representations containing structural context semantics, and output transaction-level fraud probability and risk scores through a lightweight risk discrimination head. A weighted supervision objective is introduced to mitigate training bias caused by class imbalance, and structural consistency regularization constraints are combined to suppress the impact of noisy edges on representation drift, thereby improving the stability and usability of risk characterization. Experiments are conducted on a publicly available financial transaction dataset, comparing various methods in the same direction and comprehensively evaluating them under a unified evaluation protocol. The results show that the proposed method outperforms other methods in risk ranking and probability calibration quality, validating the effectiveness of graph structure modeling and representation learning collaboration in financial transaction fraud prevention.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于图神经网络的金融交易欺诈检测框架，通过图结构建模和表示学习提升风险评分与概率校准质量。
ai.motivation: 传统基于独立样本特征的判别模型难以刻画交易网络中的群体协作和链式转移风险。
ai.method: 构建交易图，使用多层消息传递机制学习节点嵌入，结合加权监督目标和结构一致性正则化进行训练。
ai.result: 在公开数据集上，该方法在风险排序和概率校准方面优于对比方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解图神经网络在金融反欺诈中的应用，以及如何通过结构正则化提升模型稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索动态图更新机制以适应实时交易流，或引入异构图信息增强节点属性。
idea_spark.risk: 图构建依赖共享属性，可能引入噪声边；正则化强度需谨慎调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结构一致性约束启发我们思考如何利用图拓扑先验提升表示鲁棒性。

en.tldr: Proposes a graph neural network framework for financial fraud detection, improving risk scoring and probability calibration via graph structure modeling and representation learning.
en.motivation: Traditional models based on independent sample features fail to capture group collaboration and chain transfer risks in transaction networks.
en.method: Constructs a transaction graph, uses multi-layer message passing for node embeddings, and trains with weighted supervision and structural consistency regularization.
en.result: Outperforms baselines in risk ranking and probability calibration on a public financial dataset.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand GNN applications in financial fraud detection and how structural regularization improves model stability.

idea_spark.idea: Explore dynamic graph updates for real-time transaction streams or incorporate heterogeneous graph information.
idea_spark.risk: Graph construction based on shared attributes may introduce noisy edges; regularization strength requires careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Structural consistency constraints inspire leveraging graph topology priors for robust representations.

papers.title: Classification of solutions to the singular Liouville's equation associated with the $N$ Finsler Laplacian
papers.summary: In this paper, we classify a class of singular Liouville's equation associated with the Finsler-$N$-Laplacian for any $β\in (0,N)$   \begin{align*} -\mathrm{div}\left(F^{N-1}(\nabla u)DF(\nabla u)\right)=\hat{F}^{o}(x)^{-β}e^u\ \ \text{in } \mathbb{R}^{N}\backslash \{0\}, \end{align*} under the finite mass condition $\int_{\mathbb{R}^{N}}\hat{F}^{o}(x)^{-β}e^u dx<+\infty$. Here $F$ is a convex function, which is positively homogeneous of degree 1, and its polar $F^{o}$ represents a Finsler metric on $\mathbb{R}^{N}$, $\hat{F}^{o}(x)=F^{o}(-x)$. Our result relaxes the mass condition required in the classification result in [39]

ai.tldr: 本文在有限质量条件下，对与Finsler-N-拉普拉斯算子相关的奇异Liouville方程的解进行了分类。
ai.motivation: 推广已有分类结果，放宽质量条件。
ai.method: 利用Finsler几何和偏微分方程分析。
ai.result: 得到了在更弱质量条件下解的完整分类。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Finsler度量下奇异Liouville方程的解结构。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将质量条件进一步放宽至临界情形。
idea_spark.risk: 可能遇到新的技术困难，如紧性丧失。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑使用变分法或移动平面法处理更一般的非线性项。

en.motivation: To generalize previous classification results by relaxing the mass condition.
en.method: Using Finsler geometry and PDE analysis.
en.result: A complete classification of solutions under a weaker mass condition is obtained.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the solution structure of singular Liouville equations in Finsler metrics.

papers.title: Forward and inverse problems for a time-fractional pseudo-parabolic equation with variable coefficients
papers.summary: In this work, forward and inverse problems for a time-fractional pseudo-parabolic equation $D_t^ρ [u(t) + μAu(t)] + σ(t) Au(t) = r(t)g$ are investigated in a Hilbert space, where $A$ is an unbounded, positive, self-adjoint operator. According to the known papers, the forward problem has been studied only in the case $σ(t) = const$. The main novelty of the forward problem in this work is that the model is further generalized and investigated for a time-dependent coefficient $σ(t)$. To determine the solution of the forward problem, the Fourier method is employed, and the global existence and uniqueness of the solution are proved. Moreover, when the operator $A$ is a second-order differential operator, a numerical scheme and an efficient computational algorithm are developed. The inverse problem of determining a time-dependent source function is considered under the overdetermination condition of the form $F[u(t)] = Φ(t)$. The functional $F$ is taken in a general form, and such an inverse problem has not been considered before. The global existence of the solution to the inverse problem is proved by applying Schauder's fixed point theorem, and its uniqueness is established. Furthermore, several examples related to the operator $A$ and the functional $F$ are provided.

ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解时间分数阶伪抛物型方程在变系数情形下的正反问题理论，为相关数值模拟提供基础。

en.tldr: This work investigates forward and inverse problems for a time-fractional pseudo-parabolic equation with variable coefficients, proving global existence and uniqueness for the forward problem and establishing existence and uniqueness for the inverse problem using Schauder's fixed point theorem.
en.motivation: Previous studies only considered constant coefficients; this work generalizes the model to time-dependent coefficients and addresses the inverse problem with a general functional form.
en.method: The Fourier method is used for the forward problem; Schauder's fixed point theorem is applied to prove existence for the inverse problem, with uniqueness also established.
en.result: Global existence and uniqueness are proved for the forward problem; existence and uniqueness are established for the inverse problem, with numerical examples provided.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundations for forward and inverse problems of time-fractional pseudo-parabolic equations with variable coefficients, aiding numerical simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Consider extending the time-dependent coefficient to space-time dependent or introducing stochastic perturbations.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical proofs may become more complex, and numerical implementation may require handling high-dimensional operators.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by variable-coefficient models and general functional inverse problems, further exploration of more general source identification problems is possible.

papers.title: From Polynomial Stability to Periodic Well-posedness in Partially Dissipative Systems
papers.summary: The study of resonances (and well-posedness) for complex systems under time-periodic loading is of broad interest in application. The work of Galdi et al.~(2014) connects asymptotic stability of solutions to an unforced Cauchy problem to solvability of the time-periodic forced problem. Uniform stability of the solution semigroup gives periodic well-posedness for all forces in the natural mild forcing class, whereas strong stability yields only existence of a dense set of forcings for which resonance can be excluded. We address an intermediate regime for polynomial (also: rational or semiuniform) stability. Working with a Fourier decomposition in Hilbert space, we demonstrate that polynomial stability of the semigroup yields an explicit characterization of the dense forcing set on which periodic well-posedness holds. More precisely, resolvent bounds translate directly into certain losses of time derivatives on the forcing required to ensure well-posedness. Our result is motivated by partially dissipative models -- including the famous heat-wave interaction problem idealizing fluid-structure interactions, as well as some thermoelastic, viscoelastic, and weakly damped hyperbolic systems -- for which polynomial decay is the natural regime.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了部分耗散系统中多项式稳定性与周期适定性之间的关系，通过傅里叶分解和预解估计，刻画了保证周期适定性的稠密强迫集。
ai.motivation: 实际应用中许多复杂系统受时间周期载荷作用，需要理解共振与适定性。已有工作连接了无强迫柯西问题的渐近稳定性与周期强迫问题的可解性，但多项式稳定性这一中间情形尚未被充分刻画。
ai.method: 在希尔伯特空间中进行傅里叶分解，利用预解界直接推导出强迫项所需的时间导数损失，从而明确给出周期适定性成立的稠密强迫集。
ai.result: 证明了多项式稳定性可导出周期适定性的显式刻画：预解界转化为强迫项所需的时间导数损失，并给出了稠密强迫集的具体描述。
ai.help_to_user: 该结果帮助用户理解部分耗散系统（如热-波相互作用、热弹性、粘弹性等）在周期载荷下的适定性条件，为数值模拟和工程应用提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将多项式稳定性与周期适定性的关系应用于智能材料（如形状记忆合金）的周期加载分析，或用于设计具有特定阻尼特性的结构以抑制共振。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于希尔伯特空间结构和预解估计的精确性，实际系统中非线性或非光滑性可能破坏假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受热-波相互作用问题的启发，可进一步探索非线性部分耗散系统中多项式衰减与周期解存在性的联系。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the relationship between polynomial stability and periodic well-posedness in partially dissipative systems, using Fourier decomposition and resolvent bounds to characterize the dense forcing set for which periodic well-posedness holds.
en.motivation: Many applications involve complex systems under time-periodic loading, requiring understanding of resonances and well-posedness. Prior work connected asymptotic stability of unforced Cauchy problems to solvability of periodic forced problems, but the intermediate regime of polynomial stability remained uncharacterized.
en.method: A Fourier decomposition in Hilbert space is employed, and resolvent bounds are directly translated into losses of time derivatives on the forcing, yielding an explicit characterization of the dense forcing set for periodic well-posedness.
en.result: Polynomial stability is shown to imply an explicit characterization of periodic well-posedness: resolvent bounds translate into specific derivative losses on the forcing, and the dense forcing set is described precisely.
en.help_to_user: This result helps users understand well-posedness conditions for partially dissipative systems (e.g., heat-wave interaction, thermoelasticity, viscoelasticity) under periodic loading, providing theoretical foundations for numerical simulations and engineering applications.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the relationship between polynomial stability and periodic well-posedness to analyze periodic loading of smart materials (e.g., shape memory alloys) or to design structures with specific damping properties to suppress resonances.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical results rely on Hilbert space structure and precise resolvent estimates; nonlinearities or non-smoothness in real systems may violate assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the heat-wave interaction problem, further explore connections between polynomial decay and existence of periodic solutions in nonlinear partially dissipative systems.

papers.title: Infinite-Horizon Non-Autonomous Zero-Sum Stochastic Recursive Differential Games and HJBI Equations
papers.summary: In this paper, we study an infinite horizon non-autonomous stochastic recursive differential game. To this end, we first establish well-posedness and stability results for BSDEs with a time-dependent discount factor and a possibly unbounded random terminal time. The generator $f$ is allowed to be non-uniformly bounded at the origin, namely, $|f(t,0,0)|\les β_1(t)+β_2,$ $t\in[0,\infty),$ $\dbP\text{-a.s.},$ with $β_1\in L^1(0,\infty)$ and $β_2\ges0$. We then formulate a two-person zero-sum stochastic recursive differential game on the infinite horizon, where the drift, diffusion, generator and discount factor may depend explicitly on time. The lower and upper value functions are defined through Elliott--Kalton nonanticipative strategies and BSDE recursive payoffs. By finite horizon approximation, BSDE stability estimates and viscosity solution arguments, we prove that both the lower and upper value functions are deterministic and are the unique bounded viscosity solutions of their corresponding non-autonomous HJBI equations. Finally, the time-homogeneous case is recovered as a special case. Using the uniqueness of the non-autonomous HJBI equation, rather than a probabilistic shift argument, we show from the PDE viewpoint that the value functions of the autonomous system are independent of the initial time and solve the corresponding stationary HJBI equations in the viscosity sense.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了无限时域非自治零和随机递归微分博弈，建立了带时变折现因子和可能无界随机终端的BSDE的适定性与稳定性，证明了上下值函数是确定性的且为相应非自治HJBI方程的唯一有界粘性解。
ai.motivation: 现有随机递归微分博弈研究多限于有限时域或自治情形，缺乏对无限时域非自治系统的统一处理。
ai.method: 通过有限时域逼近、BSDE稳定性估计和粘性解论证，结合Elliott-Kalton非预期策略定义值函数。
ai.result: 上下值函数均为确定性的，且唯一满足非自治HJBI方程的粘性解；自治情形下值函数与初始时间无关并满足平稳HJBI方程。
ai.help_to_user: 为无限时域非自治随机递归博弈提供了严格的数学框架，可用于金融、控制等领域中具有时变折现和随机终端的优化问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非自治HJBI方程的唯一性替代概率移位论证，从PDE角度证明自治系统值函数的时间无关性。
idea_spark.risk: 非均匀有界生成元假设可能限制实际应用；无限时域数值求解的收敛性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将时变折现因子与无界随机终端结合，为处理长期金融合约或环境政策中的不确定终止时间提供新工具。

en.tldr: This paper studies infinite-horizon non-autonomous zero-sum stochastic recursive differential games, establishes well-posedness and stability for BSDEs with time-dependent discount and possibly unbounded random terminal time, and proves that the lower and upper value functions are deterministic and are the unique bounded viscosity solutions of the corresponding non-autonomous HJBI equations.
en.motivation: Existing work on stochastic recursive differential games is mostly limited to finite horizon or autonomous settings, lacking a unified treatment for infinite-horizon non-autonomous systems.
en.method: Finite horizon approximation, BSDE stability estimates, viscosity solution arguments, and Elliott-Kalton nonanticipative strategies are employed to define and analyze the value functions.
en.result: Both lower and upper value functions are deterministic and uniquely solve the non-autonomous HJBI equations in the viscosity sense; in the autonomous case, the value functions are independent of the initial time and satisfy stationary HJBI equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for infinite-horizon non-autonomous stochastic recursive games, applicable to optimization problems with time-varying discount and random terminal times in finance and control.

idea_spark.idea: Using the uniqueness of the non-autonomous HJBI equation instead of a probabilistic shift argument to prove time-independence of value functions in the autonomous case from a PDE viewpoint.
idea_spark.risk: The non-uniformly bounded generator assumption may limit practical applications; numerical convergence for infinite horizon needs further investigation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining time-dependent discount with unbounded random terminal time offers new tools for modeling long-term financial contracts or environmental policies with uncertain termination.

papers.title: Discrepancy and Fisher information
papers.summary: We give an online algorithm that keeps a symmetric random walk inside a convex body by discarding some of its steps. The expected number of discarded steps is controlled by a Fisher-information-type quantity associated with the body. For the cube, this gives a dimension-free bound: a walk with unit Euclidean steps can be kept bounded in all coordinates while discarding only a small constant fraction of the steps on average.

ai.tldr: 提出一种在线算法，通过丢弃部分步长将对称随机游走限制在凸体内，丢弃步数的期望由与凸体相关的Fisher信息量控制。
ai.motivation: 在保持随机游走有界的同时最小化丢弃步数，尤其在高维空间中实现与维度无关的界。
ai.method: 在线算法：在每一步判断是否丢弃当前步长，使得游走始终保持在凸体内，丢弃概率由Fisher信息量决定。
ai.result: 对于立方体，得到了与维度无关的界：仅丢弃常数比例的步长即可在所有坐标上保持有界。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效约束随机游走的方法，可用于采样、优化或模拟中的边界控制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Fisher信息量设计自适应丢弃策略，在保持游走有界的同时最小化丢弃步数。
idea_spark.risk: Fisher信息量的计算可能复杂，且对非凸体或非对称游走的适用性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将信息论中的Fisher信息用于几何约束问题，启发其他高维概率与优化问题的交叉研究。

en.tldr: An online algorithm that keeps a symmetric random walk inside a convex body by discarding some steps, with expected discards controlled by a Fisher-information-type quantity.
en.motivation: To bound the random walk while minimizing discarded steps, especially achieving dimension-free bounds in high dimensions.
en.method: Online algorithm that decides to discard each step to keep the walk inside the convex body, with discard probability governed by Fisher information.
en.result: For the cube, a dimension-free bound: only a small constant fraction of steps are discarded on average to keep all coordinates bounded.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient way to constrain random walks, useful for sampling, optimization, or simulation with boundary control.

idea_spark.idea: Use Fisher information to design an adaptive discarding strategy that keeps the walk bounded while minimizing discards.
idea_spark.risk: Computing Fisher information may be complex, and applicability to non-convex bodies or asymmetric walks needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applying Fisher information from information theory to geometric constraints inspires cross-disciplinary research in high-dimensional probability and optimization.

papers.title: Uniqueness of synchronized stationary equilibria in the Kuramoto mean field game
papers.summary: The stationary Kuramoto mean field game models a population of phase oscillators that form synchronized Nash equilibria above a critical interaction strength. We prove that the synchronized branch is a unique smooth family of Nash equilibria emerging from the uniform state at the bifurcation: at each supercritical interaction strength the synchronized equilibrium is unique up to rotation of the torus, and converges smoothly to the uniform distribution as the interaction parameter decreases to the critical threshold. Both follow from our main technical result: the scalar self-consistency map is strictly concave, settling a conjecture of Carmona, Cormier, and Soner. The proof decomposes the second derivative of the self-consistency map into two sign-indefinite moments of the equilibrium--a cubic moment and a gradient moment--and controls their signs through sharp shape estimates for the value function, a pointwise geometric-mean monotonicity that determines the sign of the cubic moment via a cosine-skewness inequality, and a reflection argument combined with a correlation inequality for the gradient moment.

ai.tldr: 证明了Kuramoto平均场博弈中同步平稳纳什均衡的唯一性。
ai.motivation: 解决Carmona等人关于自洽映射严格凹性的猜想，从而确立同步分支的唯一性。
ai.method: 将自洽映射的二阶导数分解为立方矩和梯度矩，通过价值函数的形状估计、余弦偏度不等式和反射论证控制其符号。
ai.result: 在超临界相互作用强度下，同步均衡在环面旋转意义下唯一，且当相互作用参数降至临界阈值时光滑收敛到均匀分布。
ai.help_to_user: 为Kuramoto平均场博弈的同步均衡提供了严格的唯一性理论，有助于理解大规模振荡器系统的纳什均衡结构。

idea_spark.idea: 利用矩分解和几何不等式控制高阶矩符号，为非线性系统的唯一性证明提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于特定模型结构（如余弦偏度不等式），可能不适用于更一般的相互作用核。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将均衡唯一性问题转化为自洽映射的凸性分析，结合反射论证和相关性不等式，可启发其他耦合振荡器系统的研究。
