idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于特定模型结构（如余弦偏度不等式），可能不适用于更一般的相互作用核。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将均衡唯一性问题转化为自洽映射的凸性分析，结合反射论证和相关性不等式，可启发其他耦合振荡器系统的研究。

en.tldr: Proves uniqueness of synchronized stationary Nash equilibria in the Kuramoto mean field game.
en.motivation: To settle a conjecture by Carmona, Cormier, and Soner on the strict concavity of the self-consistency map, thereby establishing uniqueness of the synchronized branch.
en.method: Decomposes the second derivative of the self-consistency map into a cubic moment and a gradient moment, and controls their signs via sharp shape estimates of the value function, a cosine-skewness inequality, and a reflection argument combined with a correlation inequality.
en.result: At each supercritical interaction strength, the synchronized equilibrium is unique up to rotation of the torus and converges smoothly to the uniform distribution as the interaction parameter decreases to the critical threshold.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous uniqueness theory for synchronized equilibria in the Kuramoto mean field game, aiding understanding of Nash equilibrium structure in large oscillator systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using moment decomposition and geometric inequalities to control signs of higher-order moments offers a new approach for proving uniqueness in nonlinear systems.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific model features (e.g., cosine-skewness inequality) and may not generalize to arbitrary interaction kernels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reducing uniqueness to convexity of the self-consistency map, combined with reflection arguments and correlation inequalities, can inspire studies of other coupled oscillator systems.

papers.title: Lax-Oleinik formula for nonautonomous Hamilton-Jacobi equations on networks
papers.summary: We provide a Lax-Oleinik-type representation formula for solutions to nonautonomous Hamilton-Jacobi equations posed on networks with a rather general geometry. The networks may possess countably many arcs and allow for the presence of loops. We consider Hamiltonians that are convex and superlinear in the momentum variable, and satisfy a Lipschitz-type condition in the time variable. The representation formula is constructed via an overall Lagrangian that accounts for both the arc-specific dynamics and vertex-based constraints, called flux limiters, which ensure the well-posedness of the problem. We prove that the corresponding action functional admits Lipschitz continuous minimizers without needing to rule out the Zeno phenomenon. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the formula yields the unique solution to the problem even when the flux limiters exceed standard upper bounds.

ai.tldr: 本文为网络上的非自治Hamilton-Jacobi方程提供了Lax-Oleinik型表示公式，允许网络具有可数多条弧和环，并处理了凸超线性Hamiltonian和通量限制器。
ai.motivation: 现有表示公式多限于自治情形或简单网络，缺乏处理非自治、带环和可数弧网络的统一方法。
ai.method: 构造一个整体Lagrangian，整合弧上动力学和顶点通量限制器，证明作用泛函存在Lipschitz连续极小化子，并验证公式给出唯一解。
ai.result: 得到了非自治Hamilton-Jacobi方程在一般网络上的Lax-Oleinik表示公式，且通量限制器可超过标准上界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解复杂网络上Hamilton-Jacobi方程解的显式构造，为网络控制与优化提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用通量限制器作为顶点约束，将网络分解为弧上局部动力学与顶点全局约束的耦合，从而得到显式解公式。
idea_spark.risk: 通量限制器超过标准上界时，解的唯一性证明可能依赖特定正则性条件，推广至更一般网络需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典Lax-Oleinik公式启发，将网络拓扑视为约束，通过Lagrangian对偶处理顶点通量限制，实现非自治情形的推广。

en.tldr: This paper provides a Lax-Oleinik-type representation formula for nonautonomous Hamilton-Jacobi equations on networks with countably many arcs and loops, handling convex superlinear Hamiltonians and flux limiters.
en.motivation: Existing representation formulas are mostly limited to autonomous cases or simple networks, lacking a unified method for nonautonomous problems with loops and countable arcs.
en.method: Construct an overall Lagrangian that integrates arc-specific dynamics and vertex-based flux limiters, prove Lipschitz continuity of minimizers without excluding Zeno phenomenon, and verify the formula yields the unique solution.
en.result: A Lax-Oleinik representation formula for nonautonomous Hamilton-Jacobi equations on general networks is obtained, even when flux limiters exceed standard upper bounds.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand explicit solution construction for Hamilton-Jacobi equations on complex networks, providing theoretical foundations for network control and optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Use flux limiters as vertex constraints to couple local arc dynamics with global vertex constraints, yielding an explicit solution formula.
idea_spark.risk: When flux limiters exceed standard bounds, uniqueness of the solution may rely on specific regularity conditions, requiring caution for generalization to more general networks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the classical Lax-Oleinik formula, treat network topology as constraints and handle vertex flux limiters via Lagrangian duality to achieve the nonautonomous generalization.

papers.title: DeepFilters: Scattering-Aware Pupil Engineering with Learned Digital Filter Reconstruction for Extended Depth of Field Microscopy
papers.summary: Extended depth of field microscopy encodes axial information into a single acquisition through engineered point spread functions, but conventional and deep optics approaches are subject to degradation in scattering tissue. We introduce DeepFilters, a scattering-aware deep optics framework that jointly optimizes a parameterized pupil filter and a digital-filter-based reconstruction network through a calibrated differentiable forward model to achieve broad generalization without retraining. Incorporating empirical scattering kernels, physics-guided regularization, and a hybrid genetic-gradient initialization strategy, DeepFilters extends the PSF from 16 micron to >400 micron in clear media and enables signal recovery beyond 120 micron deep in biological tissues, validated across fixed brain slices and sea urchin embryos.

ai.tldr: 提出一种散射感知的深度光学框架DeepFilters，联合优化参数化瞳孔滤波器和数字滤波器重建网络，在散射介质中实现大景深显微成像。
ai.motivation: 传统和深度光学方法在散射组织中性能退化，需要一种无需重训练即可泛化的散射感知方案。
ai.method: 通过可微前向模型联合优化瞳孔滤波器和数字滤波器重建网络，融入经验散射核、物理引导正则化和混合遗传-梯度初始化策略。
ai.result: 在透明介质中将PSF从16微米扩展到超过400微米，在生物组织中实现超过120微米深度的信号恢复，经固定脑切片和海胆胚胎验证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过联合光学与算法设计克服散射对景深扩展显微的限制。

idea_spark.idea: 将散射核作为可学习参数融入前向模型，实现自适应散射补偿。
idea_spark.risk: 散射核的校准精度和计算开销可能限制实际部署。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从散射核校准和混合初始化策略中获得启发，可应用于其他需要鲁棒初始化的逆问题。

en.tldr: Introduces DeepFilters, a scattering-aware deep optics framework that jointly optimizes a parameterized pupil filter and a digital-filter-based reconstruction network for extended depth of field microscopy in scattering media.
en.motivation: Conventional and deep optics approaches degrade in scattering tissue; a scattering-aware solution that generalizes without retraining is needed.
en.method: Jointly optimizes pupil filter and digital filter reconstruction network via a calibrated differentiable forward model, incorporating empirical scattering kernels, physics-guided regularization, and a hybrid genetic-gradient initialization strategy.
en.result: Extends PSF from 16 μm to >400 μm in clear media and enables signal recovery beyond 120 μm deep in biological tissues, validated on fixed brain slices and sea urchin embryos.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how joint optical-algorithm design overcomes scattering limitations in extended depth of field microscopy.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate scattering kernels as learnable parameters in the forward model for adaptive scattering compensation.
idea_spark.risk: Calibration accuracy and computational overhead of scattering kernels may hinder practical deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: The hybrid initialization and scattering kernel calibration strategy inspires robust initialization for other inverse problems.

papers.title: Asymptotic KKT Conditions for Continuous-Time Nonlinear Programming
papers.summary: This paper addresses the class of continuous-time nonlinear programming problems with equality and inequality constraints. The paper presents necessary optimality conditions of the sequential form. To be more precise, a sequence of solutions converging to the optimal solution is demonstrated to exist, and such that Karush-Kuhn-Tucker-type conditions are satisfied asymptotically. It is shown that these sequential Karush-Kuhn-Tucker-type conditions also become sufficient for optimality under convexity assumptions. Sequential optimality conditions are a valuable tool for determining when to terminate a numerical method of solution. In this regard, an augmented Lagrangian-type method is proposed for numerically solving continuous-time programming problems. A convergence analysis concerning viability and optimality is presented. The performance of the method is evaluated by applying it to solve instances of continuous-time problems found in the literature.

ai.tldr: 针对连续时间非线性规划问题，提出渐近KKT条件并证明其充分性，设计增广拉格朗日方法并验证收敛性。
ai.motivation: 连续时间非线性规划缺乏实用的终止判据，现有最优性条件难以直接用于数值算法。
ai.method: 构造收敛到最优解的解序列，证明序列满足渐近KKT条件；基于此设计增广拉格朗日数值方法。
ai.result: 渐近KKT条件在凸性下成为充要条件；增广拉格朗日方法在文献实例中表现有效。
ai.help_to_user: 为连续时间优化问题的数值求解提供理论终止准则和可实现的算法框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将渐近KKT条件与机器学习中的约束优化结合，用于训练带约束的神经网络。
idea_spark.risk: 连续时间模型的离散化误差可能影响渐近条件的实际有效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从数值方法终止判据出发，反向推导理论条件，是理论与算法互促的范例。

zh.tldr: 针对连续时间非线性规划问题，提出渐近KKT条件并证明其充分性，设计增广拉格朗日方法并验证收敛性。
zh.motivation: 连续时间非线性规划缺乏实用的终止判据，现有最优性条件难以直接用于数值算法。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从数值方法终止判据出发，反向推导理论条件，是理论与算法互促的范例。

en.tldr: For continuous-time nonlinear programming, asymptotic KKT conditions are proposed and proven sufficient under convexity; an augmented Lagrangian method is designed with convergence analysis.
en.motivation: Continuous-time nonlinear programs lack practical termination criteria, and existing optimality conditions are not directly usable in numerical algorithms.
en.method: Construct a sequence of solutions converging to the optimum, satisfying asymptotic KKT conditions; then design an augmented Lagrangian numerical method.
en.result: Asymptotic KKT conditions become necessary and sufficient under convexity; the augmented Lagrangian method performs well on literature test problems.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical termination criteria and a practical algorithm for solving continuous-time optimization problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine asymptotic KKT conditions with constrained optimization in machine learning, e.g., training neural networks with constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Discretization errors in continuous-time models may compromise the practical validity of asymptotic conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Deriving theoretical conditions from numerical termination criteria exemplifies the synergy between theory and algorithms.

papers.title: Upper Bounds for Symmetric Approximate Bounded Indistinguishability
papers.summary: A pair of probability distributions over $\{0,1\}^n$ is said to be $(k,δ)$-wise indistinguishable if all of the size $k$ marginals are within statistical distance at most $δ$. Previous works introduced this concept and study when and how well one can distinguish between such a pair of symmetric distributions by observing $t$ bits. We use a simple hypergeometric smoothing approach and Hahn polynomials to obtain new upper bounds that apply across a wider range of parameters and improve previously available bounds in several regimes. In particular, prior works left open the basic question of whether there exist constants $0<c_1<c_2<1$ and a pair of $(c_1n,0)$-wise indistinguishable distributions such that the $c_2n$-wise marginals have statistical distance $Ω(1)$. One application of our new bounds is to rule this out for all $c_1,c_2$ and to show that the $c_2n$-wise marginals must in fact be exponentially close. Another application in this setting is to show that the $c_2n$-wise marginals must be super-polynomially close even if the $c_1n$-wise marginals are allowed to have statistical distance $δ$ for any $δ\leq\exp\left({-ω(\sqrt{n\log{n}})}\right)$. Our bounds also yield new results in other regimes, for example when $k$ is sublinear or when $t/n$ tends to 1.

ai.tldr: 本文通过超几何平滑和Hahn多项式，为对称近似有界不可区分性提供了新的上界，改进了先前结果。
ai.motivation: 解决对称分布对在给定参数下是否可区分的基本问题，特别是关于边际统计距离的紧界。
ai.method: 采用超几何平滑方法和Hahn多项式分析，推导出更广泛参数范围内的上界。
ai.result: 证明了对于某些参数，边际统计距离必须指数级小或超多项式小，排除了先前开放问题中的可能性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解对称分布不可区分性的极限，为密码学和随机性测试提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将超几何平滑与正交多项式结合，可能用于改进其他统计距离的界。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于特定分布对称性，推广到非对称情况可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典组合不等式和正交多项式理论中汲取灵感，解决现代密码学问题。

en.tldr: This paper provides new upper bounds for symmetric approximate bounded indistinguishability using hypergeometric smoothing and Hahn polynomials, improving previous results.
en.motivation: To address the fundamental question of whether certain symmetric distribution pairs can be distinguished, particularly regarding tight bounds on marginal statistical distance.
en.method: Uses a hypergeometric smoothing approach and Hahn polynomials to derive upper bounds across a wider parameter range.
en.result: Proves that for certain parameters, marginal statistical distance must be exponentially or super-polynomially small, ruling out previously open possibilities.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for understanding limits of distribution indistinguishability, useful in cryptography and randomness testing.

idea_spark.idea: Combining hypergeometric smoothing with orthogonal polynomials may improve bounds for other statistical distances.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific distribution symmetry; generalization to asymmetric cases may be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from classical combinatorial inequalities and orthogonal polynomial theory to solve modern cryptographic problems.

papers.title: Neurodata Without Boredom: Benchmarking Agentic AI for Data Reuse
papers.summary: Neuroscience data are highly fragmented across labs, formats, and experimental paradigms, and reuse often requires substantial manual effort. A persistent roadblock to data reuse and integration is the need to decipher bespoke and diverse data formatting choices. Common data formats have been proposed in response, but the field continues to struggle with a fundamental tension: formats flexible enough to accommodate diverse experiments are rarely descriptive enough to be self-explanatory, and sufficiently descriptive formats demand detailed documentation and curation effort that few labs can sustain. Agentic AI is a natural candidate to solve this problem: LLMs read code and text faster and with sustained attention to the low-level details humans tend to skim over. To measure how well agentic AI performs on this task, we selected eight recent papers studying large-scale mouse neural population recordings that shared both data and code, spanning diverse recording modalities, behavioral paradigms, and dataset formats (e.g., NWB, specialized APIs, and general-purpose Python or MATLAB files). We provided agents with the data, code, and paper, and prompted them to load, understand, and reformat the data for a common downstream task: training a decoder from neural activity to task or behavioral variables. General-purpose coding agents commonly used by scientists performed well on each sub-task, but rarely strung together a fully error-free end-to-end solution. We characterize the types of mistakes agents made and the dataset properties that elicited them, and propose data-sharing best practices for the agentic-AI era. We further find that agents-as-judges are unreliable at catching errors, especially without ground-truth references, so interactive, human-in-the-loop coding remains necessary.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基准测试，评估智能体AI在神经科学数据重用中的表现，发现通用编码智能体在子任务上表现良好但端到端易出错，并建议数据共享最佳实践。
ai.motivation: 神经科学数据高度碎片化，重用需大量人工，现有格式难以兼顾灵活性与描述性，智能体AI有望解决此问题。
ai.method: 选取8篇小鼠神经群体记录论文，提供数据、代码和论文，让智能体加载、理解并重新格式化数据以训练解码器，分析错误类型。
ai.result: 通用编码智能体在子任务上表现良好，但端到端解决方案常出错；智能体作为评判者不可靠，需人机协作。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员了解智能体AI在数据重用中的能力与局限，指导数据共享实践。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个交互式智能体系统，结合人类反馈逐步修正数据格式化错误。
idea_spark.risk: 智能体可能过度依赖特定格式，泛化能力不足；人类反馈可能引入主观偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用智能体自动生成数据文档和元数据，降低人工注释负担。

en.tldr: Proposes a benchmark evaluating agentic AI for neuroscience data reuse, finding general-purpose coding agents perform well on subtasks but rarely error-free end-to-end, and recommends data-sharing best practices.
en.motivation: Neuroscience data is highly fragmented, requiring substantial manual effort for reuse; existing formats struggle between flexibility and descriptiveness, making agentic AI a natural solution.
en.method: Selected eight papers on large-scale mouse neural population recordings, provided agents with data, code, and paper, prompted them to load, understand, and reformat data for decoder training, and characterized error types.
en.result: General-purpose coding agents performed well on subtasks but rarely achieved error-free end-to-end solutions; agents-as-judges were unreliable, necessitating human-in-the-loop coding.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand the capabilities and limitations of agentic AI in data reuse and guides data-sharing practices.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an interactive agent system that incorporates human feedback to iteratively correct data formatting errors.
idea_spark.risk: Agents may overfit to specific formats and lack generalization; human feedback could introduce subjective bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage agents to automatically generate data documentation and metadata, reducing manual annotation burden.

papers.title: Volumetric Growth in Linear Elasticity Driven by an Optimality Criterion
papers.summary: Using linearized elasticity as a convenient mechanical framework, we show that volumetric growth can be formulated as an optimization-driven process in which the growth tensor is determined implicitly by constrained optimization rather than prescribed through phenomenological evolution laws. At each incremental step, the displacement and growth fields satisfy equilibrium, mass-balance constraints, and an irreversibility condition enforcing accretive growth, while an objective functional encodes the driving mechanism of the process.   Finite element discretization leads to a finite-dimensional constrained minimization problem in the growth variables alone and makes explicit the interpretation of the evolution as a projected gradient flow. Numerical examples illustrate the proposed framework.

ai.tldr: 提出在线性弹性框架下，将体积增长视为由约束优化驱动的过程，增长张量由优化隐式确定，而非预设的演化律。
ai.motivation: 传统体积增长模型依赖现象学演化律，缺乏统一的优化视角。本文旨在建立增长与力学平衡、质量守恒及不可逆性的内在联系。
ai.method: 在每个增量步中，位移和增长场满足平衡、质量守恒及不可逆条件，目标泛函编码驱动机制；通过有限元离散转化为仅含增长变量的约束极小化问题，解释为投影梯度流。
ai.result: 数值算例验证了框架的有效性，展示了增长张量由优化隐式确定的过程。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解生物组织或软物质中的体积增长提供一种基于优化的力学建模方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将增长张量视为优化变量，可避免预设演化律，适用于缺乏实验数据的场景。
idea_spark.risk: 优化问题的非凸性可能导致局部极小，且计算成本随增量步增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受约束优化与梯度流在力学中的应用启发，将增长建模为能量最小化过程。

en.tldr: Proposes that volumetric growth in linear elasticity can be formulated as an optimization-driven process, where the growth tensor is determined implicitly by constrained optimization rather than prescribed evolution laws.
en.motivation: Traditional growth models rely on phenomenological evolution laws lacking a unified optimization perspective. This work aims to link growth with mechanical equilibrium, mass balance, and irreversibility.
en.method: At each incremental step, displacement and growth fields satisfy equilibrium, mass balance, and irreversibility; an objective functional encodes the driving mechanism. Finite element discretization yields a constrained minimization problem in growth variables, interpreted as a projected gradient flow.
en.result: Numerical examples validate the framework, showing growth tensor determined implicitly by optimization.
en.help_to_user: Provides an optimization-based mechanical modeling approach for understanding volumetric growth in biological tissues or soft materials.

idea_spark.idea: Treating the growth tensor as an optimization variable avoids prescribing evolution laws, useful when experimental data are scarce.
idea_spark.risk: Non-convexity of the optimization problem may lead to local minima, and computational cost increases with incremental steps.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by constrained optimization and gradient flows in mechanics, modeling growth as an energy minimization process.

papers.title: Interpretable Machine Learning for Antepartum Prediction of Pregnancy-Associated Thrombotic Microangiopathy Using Routine Longitudinal Laboratory Data
papers.summary: Background: Pregnancy-associated thrombotic microangiopathy (P-TMA) is rare but life-threatening. Early risk prediction before overt clinical presentation remains challenging, as the associated laboratory abnormalities are subtle, multidimensional, and frequently masked by common physiological changes such as gestational thrombocytopenia and pregnancy-related proteinuria, thus overlapping heavily with benign obstetric and renal conditions. This complexity is poorly captured by univariate or rule-based approaches; however, it is addressable by machine learning, which can extract latent, time-dependent risk signatures from longitudinal clinical tests. Methods: This retrospective study included 300 pregnancies comprising 142 P-TMA cases and 158 controls. After exclusion of identifiers and non-informative variables, 146 longitudinal laboratory predictors were retained. Participants were divided into a training cohort (80%) and a held-out test cohort (20%) using stratified sampling. Five algorithms were evaluated: logistic regression, support vector machine with radial basis function kernel, random forest, extra trees, and gradient boosting. The final model was selected by mean cross-validated AUROC, refitted on the full training cohort, and evaluated once in the held-out test cohort. Interpretability analyses examined global feature importance and distributional patterns of leading predictors. Results: Gradient boosting was prespecified by cross-validation in the training cohort. The model achieved an AUROC of 0.872 (95% CI: 0.769-0.952) and an AUPRC of 0.883 (95% CI: 0.780-0.959) in a held-out test cohort, with sensitivity of 0.750 and specificity of 0.812. Conclusions: Longitudinal clinical laboratory tests obtained during routine care contained informative and clinically plausible signals for P-TMA risk. Notably, cystatin C at week 6 showed promise as an early monitoring indicator.

ai.tldr: 利用常规纵向实验室数据，通过可解释机器学习模型在产前预测妊娠相关血栓性微血管病（P-TMA）风险，梯度提升模型在测试集上AUROC达0.872。
ai.motivation: P-TMA罕见且致命，早期症状常被妊娠生理变化掩盖，传统单变量或规则方法难以捕捉多维、时变的实验室异常信号。
ai.method: 回顾性纳入300例妊娠（142例P-TMA，158例对照），保留146个纵向实验室预测变量，比较五种算法，通过交叉验证选择梯度提升模型，并进行可解释性分析。
ai.result: 梯度提升模型在留出测试集上AUROC 0.872，AUPRC 0.883，敏感度0.750，特异度0.812；胱抑素C在第6周显示出早期监测潜力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助临床医生在症状出现前识别高风险孕妇，实现早期干预，降低母婴死亡率。

idea_spark.idea: 结合可解释性分析，将胱抑素C等关键指标纳入产前筛查流程，开发临床决策支持工具。
idea_spark.risk: 回顾性设计可能存在选择偏倚；模型需在前瞻性多中心队列中验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 纵向实验室数据中隐藏的时变模式可通过机器学习有效提取，提示常规检验数据的深度挖掘价值。

idea_spark.risk: 回顾性设计可能存在选择偏倚；模型需在前瞻性多中心队列中验证。

en.tldr: Using routine longitudinal laboratory data, an interpretable machine learning model (gradient boosting) achieved an AUROC of 0.872 for antepartum prediction of pregnancy-associated thrombotic microangiopathy (P-TMA).
en.motivation: P-TMA is rare and life-threatening; early symptoms are masked by physiological changes in pregnancy, and univariate or rule-based methods fail to capture multidimensional, time-dependent laboratory abnormalities.
en.method: Retrospective study of 300 pregnancies (142 P-TMA, 158 controls) with 146 longitudinal laboratory predictors; five algorithms compared, gradient boosting selected via cross-validation, with interpretability analysis.
en.result: Gradient boosting achieved AUROC 0.872, AUPRC 0.883, sensitivity 0.750, specificity 0.812 on held-out test set; cystatin C at week 6 showed promise as an early monitoring indicator.
en.help_to_user: Assists clinicians in identifying high-risk pregnant women before symptom onset, enabling early intervention and reducing maternal-fetal mortality.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate key indicators like cystatin C into routine prenatal screening and develop a clinical decision support tool based on the interpretable model.
idea_spark.risk: Retrospective design may introduce selection bias; model requires prospective multicenter validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Time-varying patterns hidden in longitudinal lab data can be effectively extracted by machine learning, highlighting the value of mining routine test results.

papers.title: Irregular SLE(4) martingales and isomonodromic deformations
papers.summary: We consider non-Fuchsian monodromy preserving deformations on a Riemann sphere. The associated isomonodromic deformation parameters on this surface comprise the positions of the singularities, together with the Birkhoff (spectral) invariants owing to the presence of irregular singularities. Our first main result is the derivation of the Loewner evolution of these isomonodromic deformation parameters. Using this result, we construct martingale observables for Schramm-Loewner evolution (SLE(4)) processes in the presence of double poles. Geometrically, the expressions contain the pre-Schwarzian and Schwarzian of the Loewner evolution, arising from conformal covariance of the observable. Furthermore, we characterize these SLE(4) observables uniquely in terms of confluent BPZ equations of a CFT with central charge c=1.

ai.tldr: 本文在黎曼球面上研究非Fuchs型单值保持形变，推导了等单值形变参数的Loewner演化，并构造了具有双极点的SLE(4)过程的鞅可观测量，这些可观测量由中心荷c=1的共形场论中的合流BPZ方程唯一刻画。
ai.motivation: 将SLE理论与等单值形变理论结合，理解不规则奇点存在时SLE(4)过程的鞅性质。
ai.method: 通过推导等单值形变参数的Loewner演化，利用共形协变性构造鞅可观测量，并借助合流BPZ方程进行唯一性刻画。
ai.result: 得到了SLE(4)过程在双极点存在下的鞅可观测量，并证明了这些可观测量由中心荷c=1的CFT中的合流BPZ方程唯一确定。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究不规则奇点下的SLE过程提供了新的鞅构造和理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用合流BPZ方程构造其他SLE过程的鞅可观测量。
idea_spark.risk: 合流BPZ方程的解可能难以显式求解，且唯一性证明依赖于特定的中心荷。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从共形场论中的合流方程出发，探索SLE与可积系统的深层联系。

zh.tldr: 本文在黎曼球面上研究非Fuchs型单值保持形变，推导了等单值形变参数的Loewner演化，并构造了具有双极点的SLE(4)过程的鞅可观测量，这些可观测量由中心荷c=1的共形场论中的合流BPZ方程唯一刻画。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从共形场论中的合流方程出发，探索SLE与可积系统的深层联系。

en.tldr: This paper studies non-Fuchsian monodromy preserving deformations on the Riemann sphere, derives the Loewner evolution of isomonodromic deformation parameters, and constructs martingale observables for SLE(4) processes in the presence of double poles, uniquely characterized by confluent BPZ equations of a CFT with central charge c=1.
en.motivation: To combine SLE theory with isomonodromic deformations and understand martingale properties of SLE(4) in the presence of irregular singularities.
en.method: By deriving the Loewner evolution of isomonodromic deformation parameters, constructing martingale observables via conformal covariance, and characterizing them uniquely using confluent BPZ equations.
en.result: Martingale observables for SLE(4) with double poles are obtained, and they are uniquely determined by confluent BPZ equations of a c=1 CFT.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new martingale construction and theoretical framework for SLE processes with irregular singularities.

idea_spark.idea: Use confluent BPZ equations to construct martingale observables for other SLE processes.
idea_spark.risk: Solutions to confluent BPZ equations may be difficult to obtain explicitly, and uniqueness relies on the specific central charge.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore deeper connections between SLE and integrable systems via confluent equations in CFT.

papers.title: Nesterov acceleration for the Wasserstein minimization of displacement-convex free energies
papers.summary: We show that the mean-field underdamped Langevin process (associated to the non-linear Vlasov-Fokker-Planck equation) achieves a Nesterov acceleration with respect to the Wasserstein gradient flow of a displacement-convex free energy, in the sense that it converges at a rate of order given by the square-root of the Polyak-Łojasiewicz constant of the free energy (which is the optimal convergence rate for the corresponding gradient flow). This result has been made possible by the recent breakthrough [42] by Jianfeng Lu, which establishes such a \emph{diffusive-to-ballistic} improvement in term of entropy in the linear case.

ai.tldr: 证明了平均场欠阻尼朗之万过程在位移凸自由能的Wasserstein梯度流上实现了Nesterov加速，收敛速率由Polyak-Łojasiewicz常数的平方根决定。
ai.motivation: 在Wasserstein梯度流框架下，探索欠阻尼朗之万过程能否实现类似Nesterov加速的收敛速率提升。
ai.method: 利用Jianfeng Lu最近关于线性情况熵的扩散到弹道改进的突破，分析非线性Vlasov-Fokker-Planck方程对应的平均场过程。
ai.result: 收敛速率达到Polyak-Łojasiewicz常数的平方根量级，即对应梯度流的最优速率。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解非凸自由能最小化中的加速优化算法提供了理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将欠阻尼朗之万动力学与Nesterov动量项结合，设计新的采样或优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性情况下的收敛分析可能依赖特定凸性条件，实际应用时需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴线性情况下的熵改进技术，启发非线性自由能最小化的加速方法。

zh.tldr: 证明了平均场欠阻尼朗之万过程在位移凸自由能的Wasserstein梯度流上实现了Nesterov加速，收敛速率由Polyak-Łojasiewicz常数的平方根决定。

zh.help_to_user: 为理解非凸自由能最小化中的加速优化算法提供了理论依据。

idea_spark.risk: 非线性情况下的收敛分析可能依赖特定凸性条件，实际应用时需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴线性情况下的熵改进技术，启发非线性自由能最小化的加速方法。

en.tldr: The mean-field underdamped Langevin process achieves Nesterov acceleration for Wasserstein gradient flow of displacement-convex free energies, with convergence rate given by the square-root of the Polyak-Łojasiewicz constant.
en.motivation: To investigate whether underdamped Langevin dynamics can yield Nesterov-like acceleration in the Wasserstein gradient flow framework.
en.method: Leveraging Jianfeng Lu's recent breakthrough on diffusive-to-ballistic improvement in entropy for the linear case, analyzing the nonlinear Vlasov-Fokker-Planck equation.
en.result: Convergence rate reaches the order of the square-root of the Polyak-Łojasiewicz constant, which is optimal for the corresponding gradient flow.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundation for accelerated optimization algorithms in non-convex free energy minimization.

idea_spark.idea: Combine underdamped Langevin dynamics with Nesterov momentum to design new sampling or optimization algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence analysis in nonlinear settings may rely on specific convexity conditions, requiring validation in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: The entropy improvement technique from the linear case inspires acceleration methods for nonlinear free energy minimization.

papers.title: D-Optimized Sampling Design for System Identification
papers.summary: Traditional system identification with multisine inputs relies on uniform sampling and periodic excitation to preserve Fourier orthogonality and avoid spectral leakage, limiting its use in scenarios with irregular sampling or nonperiodic inputs. This work investigates continuous-time system identification under nonperiodic multisine excitation and nonuniform sampling. We develop a nonparametric frequency response function estimator suited to such conditions and design irregular sampling schemes that enhance the informativeness of measurements and reduce spectral leakage. The proposed sampling scheme improve the statistical accuracy of system identification in settings where periodic excitation is impractical.

ai.tldr: 提出一种面向非周期多正弦激励和非均匀采样的连续时间系统辨识方法，通过D-优化采样设计提升测量信息量并减少频谱泄漏。
ai.motivation: 传统系统辨识依赖均匀采样和周期激励以保持傅里叶正交性，限制了在非规则采样或非周期输入场景下的应用。
ai.method: 开发适用于非周期多正弦激励和非均匀采样的非参数频率响应函数估计器，并设计不规则采样方案以增强测量信息量并减少频谱泄漏。
ai.result: 所提采样方案在周期激励不可行的条件下提升了系统辨识的统计精度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在非周期激励或非均匀采样场景下进行更准确的系统辨识。

idea_spark.idea: 将采样点优化与激励信号设计联合考虑，可能进一步改善辨识精度。
idea_spark.risk: 非均匀采样可能引入额外的计算复杂度和模型假设依赖。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴实验设计中的优化准则，为实际工业系统中的非规则采样辨识提供新思路。

idea_spark.risk: 非均匀采样可能引入额外的计算复杂度和模型假设依赖。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴实验设计中的优化准则，为实际工业系统中的非规则采样辨识提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a continuous-time system identification method for nonperiodic multisine excitation and nonuniform sampling, using D-optimized sampling design to enhance measurement informativeness and reduce spectral leakage.
en.motivation: Traditional system identification relies on uniform sampling and periodic excitation to preserve Fourier orthogonality, limiting its use in scenarios with irregular sampling or nonperiodic inputs.
en.method: Develops a nonparametric frequency response function estimator suited to nonperiodic multisine excitation and nonuniform sampling, and designs irregular sampling schemes to enhance measurement informativeness and reduce spectral leakage.
en.result: The proposed sampling scheme improves the statistical accuracy of system identification in settings where periodic excitation is impractical.
en.help_to_user: Helps users perform more accurate system identification in scenarios with nonperiodic excitation or nonuniform sampling.

idea_spark.idea: Joint optimization of sampling points and excitation signals may further improve identification accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: Nonuniform sampling may introduce additional computational complexity and model assumption dependencies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging optimization criteria from experimental design provides new insights for irregular sampling identification in practical industrial systems.

papers.title: Asymptotic study of supercritical generalized SQG equations in critical Sobolev spaces
papers.summary: We study the long time behavior of regular solutions of the supercritical gSQG equations in the fully nonlinear regime. More precisely, under the assumption of small initial data in the critical Sobolev norm, we prove the existence of the unique global solution that satisfies the energy inequality (1.3) and for which the critical norm $||{θ(t)}||_{H^{1+β-2α}}$ decays to 0 as time goes to infinity.

ai.tldr: 研究了超临界广义SQG方程在临界Sobolev空间中正则解的长时间行为，证明了小初始数据下全局解的存在性及其临界范数随时间衰减到零。
ai.motivation: 理解超临界广义SQG方程在完全非线性状态下的长时间动力学。
ai.method: 基于临界Sobolev范数的小初始数据假设，利用能量不等式和函数空间分析。
ai.result: 存在唯一的全局解，且其临界范数$||θ(t)||_{H^{1+β-2α}}$随时间趋于零。
ai.help_to_user: 为超临界流体方程解的全局存在性和衰减性提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将临界范数衰减结果推广到更一般的初始条件或非小扰动情形。
idea_spark.risk: 非小初始数据下解可能爆破，需引入新的正则性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴Navier-Stokes方程全局解的研究思路，探索临界空间中的长时间行为。

en.tldr: We study the long-time behavior of regular solutions to the supercritical generalized SQG equations in the fully nonlinear regime, proving existence of a unique global solution with critical norm decaying to zero under small initial data in critical Sobolev spaces.
en.motivation: To understand the long-time dynamics of supercritical gSQG equations in the fully nonlinear regime.
en.method: Assume small initial data in the critical Sobolev norm, then use energy inequality and functional analysis.
en.result: There exists a unique global solution satisfying the energy inequality, and its critical norm $||θ(t)||_{H^{1+β-2α}}$ decays to 0 as time goes to infinity.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical justification for global existence and decay of solutions to supercritical fluid equations.

idea_spark.idea: Try to generalize the critical norm decay result to more general initial conditions or non-small perturbations.
idea_spark.risk: For non-small initial data, solutions may blow up; new regularity conditions are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from the study of global solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations to explore long-time behavior in critical spaces.

papers.title: Determinantal point processes associated with the Bochner-Schrödinger operator
papers.summary: We consider the Bochner-Schrödinger operator $H_{p}=\frac 1pΔ^{L^p}+V$ on tensor powers $L^p$ of a Hermitian line bundle $L$ on a Riemannian manifold $X$ of bounded geometry under the assumption of non-degeneracy of the curvature form of $L$. For large $p$, the spectrum of $H_p$ asymptotically coincides with the union $Σ$ of all local Landau levels of the operator at the points of $X$. We study the determinantal point process on $X$ associated with the spectral projection of $H_p$ corresponding to an interval $I=(α,β)$ such that $α,β\not \in Σ$ and compute the asymptotics of its linear statistics as $p$ goes to infinity. When $X$ is compact, this implies the law of large numbers and central limit theorem for the corresponding empirical measures.

ai.tldr: 研究黎曼流形上Bochner-Schrödinger算子的谱投影关联的行列式点过程，并推导其线性统计量的渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 理解高维量子系统中谱投影的随机几何性质。
ai.method: 利用非退化曲率假设，分析大参数p下算子谱的Landau能级结构，并计算谱投影的线性统计量渐近式。
ai.result: 当流形紧致时，得到经验测度的大数定律和中心极限定理。
ai.help_to_user: 提供行列式点过程在谱理论中的具体渐近分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将Landau能级结构用于设计量子点过程的模拟算法。
idea_spark.risk: 非紧流形情形下渐近行为可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合随机矩阵理论与几何分析，探索点过程在量子霍尔效应中的应用。

en.tldr: Studies determinantal point processes from spectral projections of the Bochner-Schrödinger operator, deriving asymptotics of linear statistics.
en.motivation: To understand random geometric properties of spectral projections in high-dimensional quantum systems.
en.method: Uses non-degenerate curvature assumption, analyzes Landau level structure of the operator's spectrum for large p, and computes asymptotics of linear statistics of spectral projections.
en.result: For compact manifolds, obtains law of large numbers and central limit theorem for empirical measures.
en.help_to_user: Provides concrete asymptotic tools for determinantal point processes in spectral theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use Landau level structure to design simulation algorithms for quantum point processes.
idea_spark.risk: Asymptotic behavior may be more complex in non-compact manifolds.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine random matrix theory with geometric analysis to explore point processes in quantum Hall effect.

papers.title: The evolution variational inequality for weighted Wasserstein metrics in non-convex bounded domains
papers.summary: In this paper, we establish the evolution variational inequality for the weighted Wasserstein distance, without assuming convexity of domains. Thanks to this evolution variational inequality, we can carry out some arguments with weighted Wasserstein metrics in not only convex but also non-convex domains. Therefore finally, we apply the evolution variational inequality to the minimizing movement in weighted Wasserstein metrics to obtain weak solutions of Keller--Segel systems and Cahn--Hilliard type equations in non-convex domains. The key point to remove the convexity assumption is a control of the boundary integral. To deal with the boundary integral, we use estimates for functions on the boundary, the Sobolev trace embedding and the variant of Kato's inequality. Then, the boundary integral can be absorbed by good known terms.

ai.tldr: 本文在没有凸性假设的有界域中建立了加权Wasserstein距离的演化变分不等式，并应用于Keller-Segel系统和Cahn-Hilliard型方程的弱解。
ai.motivation: 现有加权Wasserstein度量的演化变分不等式通常要求域是凸的，限制了其在非凸域上的应用。
ai.method: 通过控制边界积分，利用Sobolev迹嵌入和Kato不等式变体，将边界项吸收到已知项中，从而移除凸性假设。
ai.result: 成功在非凸有界域上建立演化变分不等式，并得到Keller-Segel系统和Cahn-Hilliard型方程的弱解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理非凸域上加权Wasserstein度量的理论工具，可推广到其他涉及边界积分的偏微分方程问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将Kato不等式变体与Sobolev迹嵌入结合，系统化处理非凸域边界项的方法。
idea_spark.risk: 边界估计可能依赖于特定域的正则性，推广到更粗糙域时需额外验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受凸域上演化变分不等式的启发，通过精细边界分析突破凸性限制。

en.tldr: This paper establishes the evolution variational inequality for weighted Wasserstein distance in non-convex bounded domains, and applies it to obtain weak solutions of Keller-Segel systems and Cahn-Hilliard type equations.
en.motivation: Existing evolution variational inequalities for weighted Wasserstein metrics typically require convex domains, limiting their applicability to non-convex settings.
en.method: By controlling the boundary integral using Sobolev trace embedding and a variant of Kato's inequality, the boundary term is absorbed into known good terms, removing the convexity assumption.
en.result: Successfully established the evolution variational inequality in non-convex bounded domains and derived weak solutions for Keller-Segel systems and Cahn-Hilliard type equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for handling weighted Wasserstein metrics on non-convex domains, applicable to other PDE problems involving boundary integrals.

idea_spark.idea: Systematically handle boundary terms in non-convex domains by combining a variant of Kato's inequality with Sobolev trace embedding.
idea_spark.risk: Boundary estimates may depend on specific domain regularity, requiring additional verification for rougher domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by evolution variational inequalities on convex domains, the convexity restriction is overcome through refined boundary analysis.

papers.title: Learning Local Constraints for Reinforcement-Learned Content Generators
papers.summary: Constraint-based game content generators that learn local constraints from existing content, such as Wave Function Collapse (WFC), can generate visually satisfying game levels but face challenges in guaranteeing global properties, such as playability. On the other hand, reinforcement-learning trained generators can guarantee global properties -- because such properties can easily be included in reward functions -- but the results can be visually dissatisfying. In this paper, we explore ways to combine these methods. Specifically, we constrain the action space of a PCGRL generator with constraints learned by WFC, effectively allowing the PCGRL generator to achieve global properties while forced to adhere to local constraints. To better analyze how this hybrid content generation method operates, we vary the number and type of inputs, and we test whether to randomly collapse the starting state and exclude rare patterns. While the method is sensitive to hyperparameter tuning, the best of our trained generators produce visually satisfying and playable puzzle-platform game levels -- such as Lode Runner levels -- with desired global properties.

ai.tldr: 结合WFC的局部约束和强化学习的全局奖励，生成既视觉满意又可玩的游戏关卡。
ai.motivation: 基于约束的生成器（如WFC）能保证局部视觉质量但难以保证全局可玩性，而强化学习生成器能保证全局属性但视觉结果可能不佳。
ai.method: 用WFC学习的局部约束限制PCGRL生成器的动作空间，使强化学习生成器在遵守局部约束的同时优化全局奖励。
ai.result: 最佳模型能生成视觉满意且可玩的Lode Runner关卡，但方法对超参数敏感。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种混合生成策略的思路，适用于需要同时满足局部和全局约束的内容生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将WFC约束作为可微模块嵌入强化学习策略网络，实现端到端联合训练。
idea_spark.risk: 约束与奖励的冲突可能导致训练不稳定，且超参数调优成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受WFC与强化学习互补特性的启发，将离散约束与连续优化结合，为混合生成范式提供新视角。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受WFC与强化学习互补特性的启发，将离散约束与连续优化结合，为混合生成范式提供新视角。

en.tldr: Combining WFC's local constraints with RL's global rewards to generate visually satisfying and playable game levels.
en.motivation: Constraint-based generators like WFC ensure local visual quality but struggle with global playability, while RL generators guarantee global properties but may produce visually poor results.
en.method: Constraining the action space of a PCGRL generator with local constraints learned by WFC, allowing the RL generator to optimize global rewards while adhering to local patterns.
en.result: The best trained generators produce visually satisfying and playable Lode Runner levels, though the method is sensitive to hyperparameter tuning.
en.help_to_user: Provides a hybrid generation strategy applicable to tasks requiring both local and global constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Explore embedding WFC constraints as differentiable modules within the RL policy network for end-to-end joint training.
idea_spark.risk: Potential instability from conflict between constraints and rewards, and high hyperparameter tuning cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the complementary strengths of WFC and RL, combining discrete constraints with continuous optimization offers a new perspective for hybrid generation paradigms.

papers.title: Gibbons-Tsarev type systems and Eventual identities
papers.summary: We show that non-diagonalisable reductions of the dKP equation associated with regular non-semisimple $F$-manifolds cannot exist. The proof is based on the derivation and study of a generalised Gibbons--Tsarev system (gGT system) in the non-semisimple/non-diagonalisable setting. Remarkably, a class of solutions of the gGT system is defined by eventual identities of the underlying regular $F$-manifold structure. Furthermore, we use these vector fields to construct integrable reductions of Pavlov's hydrodynamic chain. In this case, the corresponding solutions are defined for any choice of Jordan block structure of the operator of multiplication by an eventual identity.

ai.tldr: 本文证明与正则非半单F-流形相关的dKP方程的非对角化约化不存在，并引入广义Gibbons-Tsarev系统，其解由正则F-流形上的最终恒等式定义。
ai.motivation: 研究非半单F-流形背景下dKP方程的非对角化约化是否存在，并探索其与最终恒等式的联系。
ai.method: 推导并分析广义Gibbons-Tsarev系统，利用正则F-流形的最终恒等式构造解，并应用于Pavlov流体动力学链的可积约化。
ai.result: 证明了非对角化约化的不存在性，并给出了广义Gibbons-Tsarev系统的一类解，该解由最终恒等式定义，且适用于任意Jordan块结构。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非半单F-流形与可积系统约化之间的关系，以及最终恒等式在构造解中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用最终恒等式作为工具，系统研究非半单F-流形上的可积约化，并探索Jordan块结构对解的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 最终恒等式的存在性条件可能限制其适用范围，且高阶Jordan块结构下的解可能难以显式构造。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将代数结构（如F-流形）与可积系统约化结合，为寻找新的可积模型提供思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将代数结构（如F-流形）与可积系统约化结合，为寻找新的可积模型提供思路。

en.tldr: We prove that non-diagonalisable reductions of the dKP equation associated with regular non-semisimple F-manifolds cannot exist, and introduce a generalized Gibbons-Tsarev system whose solutions are defined by eventual identities of the underlying regular F-manifold.
en.motivation: To determine whether non-diagonalisable reductions exist in the context of non-semisimple F-manifolds and to explore their connection with eventual identities.
en.method: Derivation and analysis of a generalized Gibbons-Tsarev system; construction of solutions using eventual identities of regular F-manifolds; application to integrable reductions of Pavlov's hydrodynamic chain.
en.result: Non-existence of non-diagonalisable reductions is proved; a class of solutions of the gGT system is defined by eventual identities, valid for any Jordan block structure.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the relationship between non-semisimple F-manifolds and integrable reductions, and demonstrates the role of eventual identities in constructing solutions.

idea_spark.idea: Use eventual identities as a systematic tool to study integrable reductions on non-semisimple F-manifolds, and explore the influence of Jordan block structure on solutions.
idea_spark.risk: Existence conditions for eventual identities may limit applicability; explicit construction for higher Jordan blocks may be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining algebraic structures (e.g., F-manifolds) with integrable reductions offers a pathway to discover new integrable models.

papers.title: Learning to Optimize Radiotherapy Plans via Fluence Maps Diffusion Model Generation and LSTM-based Optimization
papers.summary: Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy (VMAT) is a cornerstone of modern radiation therapy, enabling highly conformal tumor irradiation and healthy-tissue sparing. Yet, its planning solves inverse and nested optimization for multi-leaf collimators, monitor units and dose parameters, while enforcing their consistency to ensure mechanical deliverability. Nevertheless, this process often requires repeated re-optimization when treatment configurations change, resulting in substantial planning time per patient. To address these problems, we present a diffusion-driven Learning-to-Optimize (L2O) method for end-to-end VMAT planning. A distribution-matching distilled diffusion model learns a clinically feasible manifold of fluence maps, enabling their one-shot generation. On top of this, an LSTM-based L2O module learns gradient update dynamics to swiftly refine fluence maps toward prescribed dose objectives during inference. Experimental results on clinical and public prostate cancer cohorts demonstrate improved planning efficiency, flexibility, and machine deliverability over currently available end-to-end VMAT planners.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于扩散模型和LSTM的端到端VMAT计划优化方法，实现一次生成通量图并快速优化，提高规划效率和灵活性。
ai.motivation: 传统VMAT规划需反复重优化，耗时长，且难以适应治疗配置变化。
ai.method: 使用分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型学习通量图的临床可行流形，实现一次生成；再通过LSTM学习梯度更新动力学，快速优化通量图以满足剂量目标。
ai.result: 在临床和公开前列腺癌数据集上，该方法在规划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性方面优于现有端到端VMAT规划器。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助放疗物理师和医生快速生成高质量VMAT计划，减少手动调整时间。

idea_spark.idea: 将扩散模型用于生成初始解，LSTM学习优化动力学，实现快速推理。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能对训练数据分布敏感，泛化到不同解剖部位或治疗设备时需重新训练。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受学习优化（L2O）和扩散模型在图像生成中成功应用的启发。

idea_spark.risk: 模型可能对训练数据分布敏感，泛化到不同解剖部位或治疗设备时需重新训练。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受学习优化（L2O）和扩散模型在图像生成中成功应用的启发。

en.tldr: Proposes an end-to-end VMAT planning method using a diffusion model for one-shot fluence map generation and an LSTM-based optimizer for fast refinement, improving efficiency and flexibility.
en.motivation: Traditional VMAT planning requires repeated re-optimization, which is time-consuming and inflexible to configuration changes.
en.method: A distribution-matching distilled diffusion model learns a clinically feasible manifold of fluence maps for one-shot generation; an LSTM-based module learns gradient update dynamics to quickly refine fluence maps toward dose objectives.
en.result: On clinical and public prostate cancer cohorts, the method outperforms existing end-to-end VMAT planners in planning efficiency, flexibility, and machine deliverability.
en.help_to_user: Helps radiation physicists and clinicians generate high-quality VMAT plans quickly, reducing manual tuning.

idea_spark.idea: Use diffusion model for initial solution generation and LSTM to learn optimization dynamics for fast inference.
idea_spark.risk: Model may be sensitive to training data distribution; generalization to different anatomies or treatment machines may require retraining.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by learning-to-optimize (L2O) and the success of diffusion models in image generation.

papers.title: Mixing and Small-Scale Formation in a Passive Divergence-Free Vector Field
papers.summary: We study mixing for a divergence-free passive vector field $u$ transported by another divergence-free vector field $U$, where $u$ evolves according to $ \partial_t u + (U \cdot \nabla) u + \nabla p = 0.$ In recent years, a lot of attention has been given to the question of optimal mixing in the scalar case, where there is a Sobolev constraint on the advecting velocity. In the vector setting considered here, however, the pressure term introduces substantial difficulties, since the simple Lagrangian perspective available in the scalar case is no longer applicable.   In this paper, we investigate mixing on a torus $\mathbb{T}^d$ under the assumption that the field $U$ satisfies $ \|U(t)\|_{W^{1,q}} \leq C $ and we quantify mixing through the decay of the homogeneous $ H^{-α}$ norm of $u$. We start with establishing conditions on $U$ that guarantee existence and uniqueness of solutions. We then derive lower bounds on the mixing rate for various ranges of $q$ and $α$. In addition, we carry out numerical simulations of mixing by choosing, at each time instant, a field $U$ that maximizes the instantaneous decay of the $ H^{-α}$ norm. These simulations provide evidence that the optimal mixing rate is at least exponential in time. More broadly, we view the present model and its diffusive analogue, as a useful framework for probing mechanisms of small-scale formation in divergence-free vector fields and for formulating simplified versions of open questions related to the incompressible Euler and Navier--Stokes equations.

ai.tldr: 研究无散被动向量场在另一无散向量场驱动下的混合，通过H^{-α}范数衰减量化混合速率，数值模拟显示最优混合速率至少指数级。
ai.motivation: 标量混合问题已有大量研究，但向量情形因压力项引入而更复杂，本文旨在建立向量场混合的理论下界并探索最优混合速率。
ai.method: 在环面上假设驱动场U满足W^{1,q}有界，推导解的存在唯一性条件，并针对不同q和α导出混合速率下界；同时通过数值优化瞬时H^{-α}范数衰减来模拟混合。
ai.result: 建立了混合速率的下界，数值实验表明最优混合速率至少是指数衰减。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了向量场混合的严格分析框架和数值方法，可用于理解小尺度形成机制及简化不可压缩Euler/Navier-Stokes方程相关问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将瞬时最优驱动场的选择与强化学习结合，自动发现更优混合策略。
idea_spark.risk: 数值优化可能陷入局部最优，且理论下界与数值结果之间的差距需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴标量混合的Sobolev约束思想，但需处理压力项带来的非局部耦合，可尝试用投影方法或流函数表示简化分析。

en.tldr: We study mixing of a divergence-free passive vector field advected by another divergence-free field, quantify mixing via decay of homogeneous H^{-α} norm, and provide lower bounds on mixing rate; numerical simulations suggest optimal mixing is at least exponential.
en.motivation: While optimal mixing in the scalar case has been extensively studied, the vector case introduces substantial difficulties due to the pressure term. This work aims to establish theoretical lower bounds and explore optimal mixing rates for vector fields.
en.method: On the torus, assuming the driving field U is bounded in W^{1,q}, we derive conditions for existence and uniqueness of solutions and obtain lower bounds on mixing rate for various q and α. We also perform numerical simulations by choosing U that maximizes instantaneous decay of the H^{-α} norm.
en.result: Lower bounds on mixing rate are established; numerical experiments indicate that the optimal mixing rate is at least exponential in time.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous analytical framework and numerical approach for mixing of vector fields, useful for probing small-scale formation mechanisms and simplifying open problems related to incompressible Euler and Navier-Stokes equations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the instantaneous optimal driving field selection with reinforcement learning to automatically discover more efficient mixing strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical optimization may get stuck in local optima, and the gap between theoretical lower bounds and numerical results requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing the Sobolev constraint idea from scalar mixing, but handling the nonlocal coupling introduced by the pressure term; one may use projection methods or streamfunction representations to simplify analysis.

papers.title: Spectral instability and non-uniqueness of mild solutions for the Keller-Segel system
papers.summary: We show that the Cauchy problem associated with the parabolic-elliptic Keller-Segel model is locally ill-posed in $L^q(\mathbb{R}^n)$ for dimensions $n \in \{3,\dots,9\}$ and throughout the supercritical range $q\in [1,\frac{n}{2})$. The non-uniqueness is driven by an instability mechanism in self-similarity variables, in the spirit of the program proposed by Jia and Šverák for the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations.

ai.tldr: 本文证明在维度3到9的超临界范围内，抛物-椭圆型Keller-Segel模型的Cauchy问题在L^q空间中局部不适定，且解不唯一。
ai.motivation: 揭示Keller-Segel系统在超临界区域的不适定性和非唯一性，填补该领域理论空白。
ai.method: 利用自相似变量中的谱不稳定性机制，借鉴Jia和Šverák对三维Navier-Stokes方程的程序。
ai.result: 对于n∈{3,…,9}且q∈[1,n/2)，Cauchy问题局部不适定，解不唯一。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Keller-Segel系统在超临界参数下的解的性质，为相关偏微分方程研究提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将Jia-Šverák程序应用于Keller-Segel系统，通过自相似变换将不适定性转化为谱问题。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定维度和参数范围，推广至其他系统可能需要调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Navier-Stokes方程的不适定性研究获得启发，将类似思路用于Keller-Segel模型。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从Navier-Stokes方程的不适定性研究获得启发，将类似思路用于Keller-Segel模型。

en.tldr: This paper proves local ill-posedness and non-uniqueness of mild solutions for the parabolic-elliptic Keller-Segel system in L^q spaces for dimensions 3 to 9 in the supercritical range.
en.motivation: To reveal ill-posedness and non-uniqueness of the Keller-Segel system in the supercritical regime, filling a theoretical gap.
en.method: Using spectral instability in self-similarity variables, following the program of Jia and Šverák for the 3D Navier-Stokes equations.
en.result: For n∈{3,…,9} and q∈[1,n/2), the Cauchy problem is locally ill-posed and solutions are non-unique.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand solution properties of the Keller-Segel system under supercritical parameters, providing theoretical foundations for related PDE research.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the Jia-Šverák program to the Keller-Segel system, transforming ill-posedness into a spectral problem via self-similarity.
idea_spark.risk: The method depends on specific dimensions and parameter ranges; generalization to other systems may require adjustments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by ill-posedness studies of Navier-Stokes equations, adapting similar ideas to the Keller-Segel model.

papers.title: Surface Growth Driven by an Optimality Criterion
papers.summary: We propose a variational framework for accretive surface growth driven by an optimality principle. Rather than prescribing a kinetic law, the configuration at each time step is obtained, within a time-discrete setting, as the solution of a constrained minimization problem. Growth is modeled as an irreversible surface deposition process subject to a global mass constraint, while the driving mechanism is encoded in an objective functional, here taken to be the structural mean compliance.   The approach is illustrated on a linearly elastic cantilever beam whose cross-sectional height evolves through layered accretion, possibly involving prestrain and precurvature. Growth-induced residual stresses can alter the convexity of the compliance functional, leading to nonuniqueness and localization phenomena. We explore the possibility of adding a regularization term penalizing deviations from the previous-step configuration. Finally, through a formal limiting procedure, we derive from the time-discrete formulation a time-continuous limit in the form of a constrained gradient flow.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于最优性原理的增积表面生长的变分框架，通过约束最小化问题确定每个时间步的构型，并推导出时间连续极限。
ai.motivation: 传统生长模型通常预设动力学定律，本文旨在通过最优性原理提供一种更灵活的变分框架来描述增积表面生长。
ai.method: 在时间离散框架下，将生长建模为受全局质量约束的不可逆表面沉积过程，目标泛函采用结构平均柔度，并引入正则化项惩罚偏离前一步构型，最后通过形式极限推导出时间连续约束梯度流。
ai.result: 以线弹性悬臂梁为例，展示了生长引起的残余应力可改变柔度泛函的凸性，导致非唯一性和局部化现象。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用变分法和最优性原理建模表面生长过程，以及残余应力对结构性能的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 将最优性准则与质量约束结合，通过最小化结构柔度来驱动生长，可启发设计自优化生长结构。
idea_spark.risk: 时间连续极限的推导依赖于形式极限，可能缺乏严格的数学收敛性保证；非唯一性可能导致实际计算中难以选择合理解。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受结构优化中柔度最小化思想的启发，将生长视为一种自适应优化过程。

en.tldr: Proposes a variational framework for accretive surface growth driven by an optimality principle, determining each time-step configuration via constrained minimization, and derives a time-continuous limit.
en.motivation: Traditional growth models often prescribe kinetic laws; this work aims to provide a more flexible variational framework based on an optimality principle to describe accretive surface growth.
en.method: In a time-discrete setting, growth is modeled as an irreversible surface deposition process subject to a global mass constraint, with the objective functional taken as structural mean compliance; a regularization term penalizing deviations from the previous configuration is introduced, and a formal limiting procedure yields a time-continuous constrained gradient flow.
en.result: Illustrated on a linearly elastic cantilever beam, showing that growth-induced residual stresses can alter the convexity of the compliance functional, leading to nonuniqueness and localization phenomena.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to model surface growth using variational methods and optimality principles, and the effect of residual stresses on structural behavior.

idea_spark.idea: Combining an optimality criterion with a mass constraint and minimizing structural compliance to drive growth could inspire the design of self-optimizing growing structures.
idea_spark.risk: The derivation of the time-continuous limit relies on a formal limiting procedure, which may lack rigorous mathematical convergence; nonuniqueness may complicate the selection of a reasonable solution in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the idea of compliance minimization in structural optimization, viewing growth as an adaptive optimization process.

papers.title: Indefinite Stochastic LQ Optimal Control for Jump-Diffusion Systems with Random Coefficients
papers.summary: This paper studies indefinite stochastic linear-quadratic (LQ) optimal control for jump-diffusion systems with random coefficients. We construct an algebraic inverse flow from the zero-control base system, extract the semimartingale kernel of the value function, and prove that it satisfies a generalized stochastic Riccati equation with jumps (SREJ). Under a uniform convexity condition, we establish the existence and uniqueness of open-loop optimal controls for any initial pair and show that the associated matrix $\mathscr{N}(t)$ is uniformly positive definite, yielding an exact closed-loop feedback representation of the optimal control via the SREJ. A distinguishing feature of our approach is that it requires neither relaxation techniques (as in the compensator method) nor additional invertibility assumptions on the optimal state process, and it accommodates the general case where the control enters the jump part ($F \neq 0$). As an application, we analyze a financial portfolio problem with a jump-diffusion risky asset whose excess return is zero, where the investor minimizes a cost functional with a negative terminal wealth weight. The uniform convexity condition reduces to an explicit inequality among the risk aversion coefficient, volatility, jump magnitude, and risk-free rate, thereby delineating the parametric region in which an optimal strategy exists. These results extend classical indefinite LQ theory to jump-diffusion systems with random coefficients.

ai.tldr: 研究具有随机系数的跳扩散系统的无定常随机线性二次最优控制，通过构造代数逆流和半鞅核，证明了广义随机Riccati方程的存在唯一性，并给出了开环和闭环最优控制表示。
ai.motivation: 经典无定常LQ理论局限于连续扩散系统，而实际中跳扩散和随机系数更为常见，现有方法需要松弛技术或可逆性假设，限制了应用范围。
ai.method: 从零控制基系统构造代数逆流，提取值函数的半鞅核，推导出带跳的广义随机Riccati方程，并在一致凸性条件下证明开环最优控制的存在唯一性及闭环反馈表示。
ai.result: 建立了无定常LQ控制的一般框架，无需松弛或可逆性假设，允许控制进入跳部分；应用于金融组合问题，将一致凸性条件转化为风险厌恶系数、波动率、跳幅和无风险利率之间的显式不等式。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理跳扩散和随机系数的LQ控制问题提供了统一且更宽松的求解方法，可直接用于金融投资、工程控制等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将一致凸性条件转化为参数不等式，可进一步用于设计自适应控制策略或在线参数估计。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中跳扩散参数估计困难，且一致凸性条件可能过于严格，导致部分参数区域无解。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受金融组合问题启发，可将类似条件用于其他含负权重成本泛函的优化问题，如风险管理中的尾部损失最小化。

en.tldr: This paper studies indefinite stochastic LQ optimal control for jump-diffusion systems with random coefficients, constructs an algebraic inverse flow and semimartingale kernel, proves a generalized stochastic Riccati equation with jumps, and provides open-loop and closed-loop optimal control representations.
en.motivation: Classical indefinite LQ theory is limited to continuous diffusions, while jump-diffusions and random coefficients are more realistic; existing methods require relaxation or invertibility assumptions, restricting applicability.
en.method: Construct an algebraic inverse flow from the zero-control base system, extract the semimartingale kernel of the value function, derive a generalized stochastic Riccati equation with jumps, and under a uniform convexity condition establish existence and uniqueness of open-loop optimal controls and a closed-loop feedback representation.
en.result: Establishes a general framework for indefinite LQ control without relaxation or invertibility assumptions, allowing control in the jump part; applied to a financial portfolio problem, reducing the uniform convexity condition to an explicit inequality among risk aversion, volatility, jump magnitude, and risk-free rate.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified and more flexible method for solving LQ control problems with jump-diffusions and random coefficients, directly applicable to finance, engineering control, etc.

idea_spark.idea: The uniform convexity condition expressed as a parametric inequality can be used to design adaptive control strategies or online parameter estimation.
idea_spark.risk: Practical estimation of jump-diffusion parameters is challenging, and the uniform convexity condition may be too restrictive, leaving some parameter regions without solutions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the financial portfolio problem, similar conditions can be applied to other optimization problems with negative weight cost functionals, such as tail loss minimization in risk management.

papers.title: On the Limits of Latent Reuse in Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Diffusion models are often trained in low-dimensional latent spaces, which are then reused for related but shifted datasets. In this work, we study when such latent reuse remains reliable under distribution shift. We consider a source-target setting in which both datasets are approximately low-dimensional but may lie near different subspaces. We show that freezing and reusing a source latent space induces a target-domain score error governed by two quantities: the principal-angle misalignment between the source and target subspaces, and the target ambient noise amplified by the diffusion time scale. Motivated by these limits, we further study mixed source-target training and characterize how the required shared latent dimension depends on the relative geometry of the two distributions. Our results provide theoretical guidance on when latent reuse is reliable and when learning a shared representation may be necessary.

ai.tldr: 研究了扩散模型中潜在空间复用在分布偏移下的可靠性，并给出了理论界限。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型常使用低维潜在空间，但该空间在数据集变化时是否仍然可靠尚不明确。
ai.method: 通过分析源和目标子空间的主角偏差以及扩散时间尺度放大的噪声，推导出分数误差的表达式。
ai.result: 潜在复用的可靠性取决于子空间对齐程度和噪声放大效应，混合训练时共享维度需求由分布几何决定。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户判断何时可以安全复用预训练潜在空间，何时需要学习共享表示。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种自适应潜在空间选择机制，根据目标分布与源子空间的对齐程度动态决定是否复用或重新训练。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（近似低维、线性子空间）在复杂真实数据上可能不成立，导致实际效果偏离预测。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用主成分分析或子空间聚类方法，在训练前快速评估源和目标分布的子空间相似度，从而指导模型选择。

en.tldr: Investigates the reliability of latent space reuse in diffusion models under distribution shift and provides theoretical bounds.
en.motivation: Diffusion models are often trained in low-dimensional latent spaces, but it is unclear whether such spaces remain reliable when the dataset changes.
en.method: Derives the score error expression by analyzing the principal-angle misalignment between source and target subspaces and the noise amplified by the diffusion time scale.
en.result: The reliability of latent reuse depends on subspace alignment and noise amplification; the required shared latent dimension in mixed training is determined by the geometry of the two distributions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users decide when it is safe to reuse a pretrained latent space and when learning a shared representation is necessary.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive latent space selection mechanism that dynamically decides whether to reuse or retrain based on the alignment between the target distribution and the source subspace.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical assumptions (approximately low-dimensional, linear subspaces) may not hold for complex real-world data, causing actual performance to deviate from predictions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use principal component analysis or subspace clustering methods to quickly assess the subspace similarity between source and target distributions before training, thereby guiding model selection.

papers.title: Refined estimates of the propagation speed in porous medium equation of combustion type
papers.summary: We are concerned with the Cauchy problem $u_{t}=(u^{m})_{xx}+f(u)$, where the nonliearity $f(u)$ is of combustion type and the initial data is compactly supported. In \cite{lou2024convergence}, among other things, the authors prove that by considering a multiple of a given initial data, there is a critical value such that the corresponding transition solution spreads at the asymptotic speed $2y_{0}\sqrt{t}[1+o(1)]\ \text{as} \ t\rightarrow\infty$, while the lower order term $o(1)$ remains unknown. In this paper, for a family of functions of combustion type, we refine the estimates of the asymptotic speed of the transition solution and provide a precise characterization of the lower order term $o(1)$. Our result also reveals that there is no unified characterization of the lower order term for general combustion type functions $f$.

ai.tldr: 针对燃烧型多孔介质方程，给出了传播速度下阶项的精确刻画。
ai.motivation: 已有工作仅得到传播速度的主项，下阶项未知，本文旨在精确刻画该下阶项。
ai.method: 对一类燃烧型函数族进行精细的渐近分析。
ai.result: 给出了传播速度下阶项的精确估计，并揭示了一般燃烧型函数下阶项无统一刻画。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解燃烧型多孔介质方程中传播速度的精细结构。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将下阶项刻画与燃烧函数的具体形式建立显式关系。
idea_spark.risk: 一般燃烧型函数下阶项无统一形式，需针对具体函数单独分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索数值模拟验证下阶项的理论预测。

en.tldr: For the porous medium equation of combustion type, we provide a precise characterization of the lower order term in the propagation speed.
en.motivation: Previous work only gave the leading order of the propagation speed; the lower order term remained unknown. This paper aims to characterize it precisely.
en.method: Refined asymptotic analysis for a family of combustion-type functions.
en.result: Exact estimates of the lower order term are obtained, and it is shown that no unified characterization exists for general combustion-type functions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the fine structure of propagation speed in combustion-type porous medium equations.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to establish an explicit relationship between the lower order term and the specific form of the combustion function.
idea_spark.risk: For general combustion-type functions, the lower order term lacks a unified form, requiring case-by-case analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Numerical simulations could be used to verify the theoretical predictions of the lower order term.

papers.title: Training Large Language Models to Predict Clinical Events
papers.summary: Longitudinal clinical notes contain rich evidence of how patients evolve over time, but converting this signal into training supervision for clinical prediction remains challenging. We extend Foresight Learning to clinical prediction by converting time-ordered MIMIC-III notes into examples consisting of past patient context, a natural-language question about a possible future event, and a label resolved from later documentation. This process yields 6,900 prediction examples from 702 admissions across medications, procedures, organ support, microbiology, and mortality. A small LoRA adapter trained on these examples improves over the prompted base model, reducing expected calibration error from 0.1269 to 0.0398 and Brier score from 0.199 to 0.145, while slightly outperforming GPT-5 point estimates on held-out questions. The approach enables reusable clinical prediction supervision from longitudinal notes without hand-engineered structured features or endpoint-specific classifiers.

ai.tldr: 将前瞻学习扩展到临床预测，通过将MIMIC-III笔记转化为预测示例，训练大型语言模型预测未来临床事件。
ai.motivation: 纵向临床笔记包含患者随时间演变的丰富证据，但将其转化为训练监督信号用于临床预测仍具挑战。
ai.method: 将时间排序的MIMIC-III笔记转化为包含过去患者背景、关于未来事件的自然语言问题及后续文档标签的示例，生成6900个预测示例，并用LoRA适配器微调模型。
ai.result: LoRA适配器将预期校准误差从0.1269降至0.0398，Brier分数从0.199降至0.145，在保留问题上略优于GPT-5点估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需手工特征或专用分类器即可从临床笔记中提取可复用预测监督的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将前瞻学习与LoRA结合，使通用语言模型能直接利用临床笔记进行预测，避免特征工程。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖MIMIC-III数据集，可能无法直接泛化至其他临床环境或非英语笔记。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将自然语言问题作为预测接口，简化临床决策支持系统的开发。

en.tldr: Extends Foresight Learning to clinical prediction by converting MIMIC-III notes into prediction examples, training LLMs to forecast future clinical events.
en.motivation: Longitudinal clinical notes contain rich evidence of patient evolution, but converting this signal into training supervision for clinical prediction remains challenging.
en.method: Converts time-ordered MIMIC-III notes into examples of past context, a natural-language question about a future event, and a label from later documentation, yielding 6,900 examples; fine-tunes with a small LoRA adapter.
en.result: LoRA adapter reduces expected calibration error from 0.1269 to 0.0398 and Brier score from 0.199 to 0.145, slightly outperforming GPT-5 point estimates on held-out questions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reusable approach to clinical prediction supervision from longitudinal notes without hand-engineered features or endpoint-specific classifiers.

idea_spark.idea: Combines Foresight Learning with LoRA to enable general-purpose LLMs to directly leverage clinical notes for prediction, avoiding feature engineering.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on MIMIC-III dataset, may not generalize to other clinical settings or non-English notes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires using natural-language questions as a prediction interface, simplifying clinical decision support system development.

papers.title: AcquisitionSynthesis: Targeted Data Generation using Acquisition Functions
papers.summary: Data quality remains a critical bottleneck in developing capable, competitive models. Researchers have explored many ways to generate top quality samples. Some works rely on rejection sampling: generating lots of synthetic samples and filtering out low-quality samples. Other works rely on larger or closed-source models to extract model weaknesses, necessary skills, or a curriculum off of which to base data generation. These works have one common limitation: there is no quantitative approach to measure the impact of the generated samples on the downstream learner. Active learning literature provides exactly this, in the form of acquisition functions. Acquisition functions measure the informativeness and/or influence of data, providing interpretable, model-centric signals. Inspired by this, we propose AcquisitionSynthesis: using acquisition functions as reward models to train language models to generate higher-quality synthetic data. We conduct experiments on classic verifiable tasks of math, medical question-answering, and coding. Our experimental results indicate that (1) student models trained with AcquisitionSynthesis data achieve good performance on in-distribution tasks (2-7% gain) and is more robust to catastrophic forgetting, and (2) AcquisitionSynthesis models can generate data for other models and for low-to-high resource training paradigms. By leveraging acquisition rewards, we seek to demonstrate a principled path toward model-aware self-improvement that surpasses static datasets.

ai.tldr: 提出 AcquisitionSynthesis 方法，利用主动学习中的采集函数作为奖励模型，训练语言模型生成更高质量的合成数据。
ai.motivation: 现有合成数据生成方法缺乏量化评估生成样本对下游模型影响的机制，而主动学习中的采集函数恰好能提供这种可解释的、以模型为中心的信息度量。
ai.method: 将采集函数作为奖励信号，通过强化学习训练语言模型，使其生成对下游学生模型更有信息量或影响力的合成数据。
ai.result: 在数学、医学问答和编程任务上，使用 AcquisitionSynthesis 数据训练的学生模型在分布内任务上获得 2-7% 的性能提升，且对灾难性遗忘更鲁棒；生成的合成数据可跨模型和资源规模使用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和工程师在缺乏高质量真实数据时，通过模型感知的合成数据生成策略提升模型性能，并减少遗忘风险。

idea_spark.idea: 将采集函数与生成式模型结合，实现动态、自适应的数据生成，使模型能主动探索自身知识边界。
idea_spark.risk: 采集函数的设计可能偏向特定模型或任务，导致生成数据多样性不足；奖励模型训练可能引入额外计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 主动学习与生成式模型的融合为自我改进提供了新范式，未来可探索更丰富的采集函数（如基于不确定性、多样性或影响函数）以及多轮交互式数据生成。
