idea_spark.risk: 剂量引导训练可能过度拟合特定治疗计划，降低泛化能力；计算成本高，且需要大量配对剂量数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图像-剂量相关性分析，设计混合评估指标，在训练中同时优化图像质量和剂量学指标，可能提升临床适用性。

en.tldr: The SynthRAD2025 challenge report evaluates deep learning-based synthetic CT generation on 2,362 patients across MRI-to-CT and CBCT-to-CT tasks, showing superior CBCT-to-CT performance but confirming that image quality alone is insufficient as a dosimetric surrogate.
en.motivation: Radiotherapy requires repeated CT scans, which impose radiation exposure and logistical burdens. MRI lacks electron density, and CBCT needs correction. Synthetic CT addresses these issues, enabling MRI-only RT and CBCT-based adaptive workflows.
en.method: Using data from 2,362 patients across five European centers, two tasks (MRI-to-CT with 890 cases, CBCT-to-CT with 1,472 cases) were evaluated via image similarity, segmentation, and dosimetric metrics.
en.result: Task 1 best MAE 64.8 HU, PSNR ~30 dB, MS-SSIM ~0.936, Dice 0.79; Task 2 better: MAE 48.3 HU, PSNR 32.6 dB, MS-SSIM 0.968, Dice 0.86. Strong image-segmentation correlations (ρ=0.78-0.79) but moderate dose correlations, indicating image quality is not a sufficient dosimetric surrogate.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand current synthetic CT generation performance levels, key challenges (e.g., residual errors at tissue interfaces affecting proton dose), and the necessity of dosimetric evaluation for clinical validation.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate dose-guided loss functions or adversarial training to directly optimize dosimetric accuracy of synthetic CT, rather than relying solely on image similarity.
idea_spark.risk: Dose-guided training may overfit to specific treatment plans, reducing generalization; high computational cost and need for large paired dose data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage image-dose correlation analysis to design hybrid evaluation metrics that optimize both image quality and dosimetric indicators during training, potentially improving clinical applicability.

papers.title: MambaPanoptic: A Vision Mamba-based Structured State Space Framework for Panoptic Segmentation
papers.summary: Panoptic segmentation requires the simultaneous recognition of countable thing instances and amorphous stuff regions, placing joint demands on long-range context modelling, multi-scale feature representation, and efficient dense prediction. Existing convolutional and transformer-based methods struggle to satisfy all three requirements concurrently: convolutional architectures are limited in their capacity to model long-range dependencies, while transformer-based methods incur quadratic computational cost that is prohibitive at high resolutions. In this paper, we propose MambaPanoptic, a fully Mamba-based panoptic segmentation framework that addresses these limitations through two principal contributions. First, we introduce MambaFPN, a top-down feature pyramid that leverages Mamba blocks to generate globally coherent, multi-scale feature representations with linear computational complexity. Second, we adopt a PanopticFCN-style kernel generator that produces unified thing and stuff kernels for proposal-free panoptic prediction, enhanced by a QuadMamba-based feature refinement module applied at multiple network stages. Experiments on the Cityscapes and COCO panoptic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that MambaPanoptic consistently outperforms PanopticDeepLab and PanopticFCN under comparable model sizes, and matches or surpasses Mask2Former on Cityscapes in PQ and AP while requiring fewer parameters.

ai.tldr: 提出基于Mamba的全景分割框架MambaPanoptic，通过MambaFPN和QuadMamba模块实现线性复杂度的多尺度特征表示，在Cityscapes和COCO上超越现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有卷积和Transformer方法在全景分割中难以同时满足长程建模、多尺度表示和高效率密集预测的需求。
ai.method: 设计MambaFPN自上而下特征金字塔，利用Mamba块线性复杂度生成全局一致的多尺度特征；采用PanopticFCN风格核生成器结合QuadMamba特征细化模块。
ai.result: 在Cityscapes和COCO上，MambaPanoptic在相似模型大小下优于PanopticDeepLab和PanopticFCN，在Cityscapes上PQ和AP匹配或超越Mask2Former且参数更少。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效的全景分割新思路，尤其适合需要处理高分辨率图像和实时应用的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将Mamba状态空间模型与特征金字塔结合，实现线性复杂度的全局上下文建模，替代Transformer的二次复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: Mamba在长序列上的表现可能不如Transformer稳定，需验证在更大数据集上的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Mamba在语言建模中的线性复杂度启发，将其引入视觉密集预测，并设计专用特征金字塔结构。

zh.tldr: 提出基于Mamba的全景分割框架MambaPanoptic，通过MambaFPN和QuadMamba模块实现线性复杂度的多尺度特征表示，在Cityscapes和COCO上超越现有方法。
zh.motivation: 现有卷积和Transformer方法在全景分割中难以同时满足长程建模、多尺度表示和高效率密集预测的需求。
zh.method: 设计MambaFPN自上而下特征金字塔，利用Mamba块线性复杂度生成全局一致的多尺度特征；采用PanopticFCN风格核生成器结合QuadMamba特征细化模块。
zh.result: 在Cityscapes和COCO上，MambaPanoptic在相似模型大小下优于PanopticDeepLab和PanopticFCN，在Cityscapes上PQ和AP匹配或超越Mask2Former且参数更少。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效的全景分割新思路，尤其适合需要处理高分辨率图像和实时应用的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将Mamba状态空间模型与特征金字塔结合，实现线性复杂度的全局上下文建模，替代Transformer的二次复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: Mamba在长序列上的表现可能不如Transformer稳定，需验证在更大数据集上的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Mamba在语言建模中的线性复杂度启发，将其引入视觉密集预测，并设计专用特征金字塔结构。

en.tldr: Proposes MambaPanoptic, a fully Mamba-based panoptic segmentation framework with MambaFPN and QuadMamba, achieving linear-complexity multi-scale features and outperforming prior methods on Cityscapes and COCO.
en.motivation: Existing CNN and Transformer methods struggle to simultaneously meet long-range context, multi-scale representation, and efficient dense prediction for panoptic segmentation.
en.method: Introduces MambaFPN, a top-down feature pyramid using Mamba blocks for globally coherent multi-scale features with linear complexity; adopts a PanopticFCN-style kernel generator with QuadMamba feature refinement.
en.result: On Cityscapes and COCO, MambaPanoptic outperforms PanopticDeepLab and PanopticFCN under comparable model sizes, and matches or surpasses Mask2Former on Cityscapes in PQ and AP with fewer parameters.
en.help_to_user: Offers an efficient panoptic segmentation approach suitable for high-resolution images and real-time applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Mamba state space models with feature pyramids for linear-complexity global context modeling, replacing Transformer's quadratic complexity.
idea_spark.risk: Mamba may be less stable than Transformers on long sequences; generalization on larger datasets needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Mamba's linear complexity in language modeling, adapted to visual dense prediction with a dedicated feature pyramid design.

papers.title: Pyramid Forcing: Head-Aware Pyramid KV Cache Policy for High-Quality Long Video Generation
papers.summary: Autoregressive video generation enables streaming and open-ended long video synthesis, but still suffers from long-term degradation caused by accumulated errors. Existing KVCache strategies usually apply unified historical-frame retention, implicitly assuming homogeneous historical dependencies across attention heads. We revisit historical-frame attention and reveal three distinct head types: Anchor Heads require broad long-range context, Wave Heads exhibit periodic temporal dependencies, and Veil Heads focus on initial and adjacent frames. Based on this finding, we propose Pyramid Forcing, a head-aware pyramidal KVCache framework that identifies head types offline, assigns behavior-specific cache policies, and supports heterogeneous cache lengths via efficient ragged-cache attention. Experiments on Self Forcing and Causal Forcing show that Pyramid Forcing consistently improves long-horizon generation quality on VBench-Long, increasing the 60-second Self Forcing score from 77.87 to 81.21 while enhancing motion dynamics, visual fidelity, and semantic consistency. Project: https://if-lab-pku.github.io/Pyramid-Forcing/.

ai.tldr: 提出Pyramid Forcing，一种基于注意力头类型的金字塔式KV缓存策略，显著提升长视频生成质量。
ai.motivation: 现有KV缓存策略对所有注意力头统一处理，忽略了不同头对历史帧依赖的差异，导致长视频生成中误差累积和质量退化。
ai.method: 通过离线识别三种注意力头类型（Anchor、Wave、Veil），为每种头分配特定缓存策略，并利用高效的不规则缓存注意力支持异构缓存长度。
ai.result: 在VBench-Long上，60秒Self Forcing评分从77.87提升至81.21，运动动态、视觉保真度和语义一致性均增强。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解长视频生成中注意力头异质性的重要性，并提供一种可落地的缓存优化方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将头类型识别与动态缓存分配结合，实现自适应KV缓存管理。
idea_spark.risk: 离线头类型识别可能无法适应在线动态变化，需验证其泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从注意力头功能分化出发，启发更细粒度的模型内部结构优化。

zh.tldr: 提出Pyramid Forcing，一种基于注意力头类型的金字塔式KV缓存策略，显著提升长视频生成质量。
zh.motivation: 现有KV缓存策略对所有注意力头统一处理，忽略了不同头对历史帧依赖的差异，导致长视频生成中误差累积和质量退化。
zh.method: 通过离线识别三种注意力头类型（Anchor、Wave、Veil），为每种头分配特定缓存策略，并利用高效的不规则缓存注意力支持异构缓存长度。
zh.result: 在VBench-Long上，60秒Self Forcing评分从77.87提升至81.21，运动动态、视觉保真度和语义一致性均增强。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解长视频生成中注意力头异质性的重要性，并提供一种可落地的缓存优化方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将头类型识别与动态缓存分配结合，实现自适应KV缓存管理。
idea_spark.risk: 离线头类型识别可能无法适应在线动态变化，需验证其泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从注意力头功能分化出发，启发更细粒度的模型内部结构优化。

en.tldr: Proposes Pyramid Forcing, a head-aware pyramidal KVCache policy that improves long video generation quality by addressing heterogeneous attention head dependencies.
en.motivation: Existing KVCache strategies treat all attention heads uniformly, ignoring their distinct historical dependencies, leading to accumulated errors and quality degradation in long video generation.
en.method: Identifies three head types offline (Anchor, Wave, Veil), assigns behavior-specific cache policies, and supports heterogeneous cache lengths via efficient ragged-cache attention.
en.result: On VBench-Long, the 60-second Self Forcing score improves from 77.87 to 81.21, with enhanced motion dynamics, visual fidelity, and semantic consistency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the importance of attention head heterogeneity in long video generation and provides a practical cache optimization solution.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining head-type identification with dynamic cache allocation for adaptive KVCache management.
idea_spark.risk: Offline head-type identification may not adapt to online dynamic changes; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The functional differentiation of attention heads inspires finer-grained optimization of model internal structures.

papers.title: PhysEditBench: A Protocol-Conditioned Benchmark for Dense Physical-Map Prediction with Image Editors
papers.summary: Can general-purpose image editors predict physical maps from a single RGB image? General-purpose image editors differ from standard task-specific dense-prediction models: they do not directly take an image and output a physical map. Instead, they must be guided by prompts, examples, or image-based textual cues. To this end, we introduce PhysEditBench, a novel protocol-conditioned benchmark to evaluate and standardize image editors in dense physical-map prediction that covers five targets: depth, normal, albedo, roughness, and metallic maps. For evaluation data, we build a target-dependent benchmark substrate. We use OpenRooms-FF for depth, surface normal, albedo, and roughness, InteriorVerse as an additional source for depth, normal, albedo, and a new procedurally generated source for metallic maps. We curate the data with quality checks, valid-region masks, scene-level sampling, and lighting-based stress subsets to ensure reliable and diverse evaluation. For each target, PhysEditBench defines a fixed protocol that specifies the allowed input, expected output format, and scoring procedure. Each score, therefore, reflects the performance of a model under a specified protocol, rather than its best possible performance under all prompts or interaction modes. Experimental results show that specialized models remain much stronger on depth, normal, and albedo, and stronger image editors can produce more reasonable map-like outputs. For roughness and metallic, image editors can match or outperform specialized baselines on some scalar metrics, but they still suffer from structural errors, sparsity effects, and sensitivity to lighting.

ai.tldr: 提出了PhysEditBench基准，用于评估通用图像编辑器在密集物理图预测任务上的表现，覆盖深度、法线、反照率、粗糙度和金属度五种物理图。
ai.motivation: 通用图像编辑器与专用密集预测模型不同，不能直接输出物理图，需要提示或示例引导，因此需要一个标准化的协议条件基准来评估其能力。
ai.method: 构建了包含五个目标物理图的基准，使用OpenRooms-FF、InteriorVerse和程序生成数据，并定义固定协议（输入、输出格式、评分流程）进行标准化评估。
ai.result: 专用模型在深度、法线和反照率上仍显著更强；更强的图像编辑器能生成更合理的图，但在粗糙度和金属度上存在结构错误、稀疏性和光照敏感性问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员标准化评估图像编辑器在物理图预测上的性能，并揭示当前模型的优势与不足。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个交互式图像编辑器，通过用户提供的简单草图或文本提示，实时生成多物理图（深度+法线+材质），并允许用户迭代修正。
idea_spark.risk: 用户提示可能模糊或不完整，导致预测不稳定；实时多图生成的计算开销可能较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用协议条件基准中的固定协议思想，将用户意图转化为结构化输入，提升编辑器的可控性和可复现性。

zh.tldr: 提出了PhysEditBench基准，用于评估通用图像编辑器在密集物理图预测任务上的表现，覆盖深度、法线、反照率、粗糙度和金属度五种物理图。

en.tldr: Proposes PhysEditBench, a protocol-conditioned benchmark for evaluating general-purpose image editors on dense physical-map prediction tasks covering depth, normal, albedo, roughness, and metallic maps.
en.motivation: General-purpose image editors differ from specialized dense-prediction models as they require prompts or examples to output physical maps, necessitating a standardized benchmark with fixed protocols.
en.method: Constructs a benchmark with five target physical maps using OpenRooms-FF, InteriorVerse, and procedurally generated data, defining fixed protocols for input, output format, and scoring.
en.result: Specialized models remain stronger on depth, normal, and albedo; stronger image editors produce more reasonable maps but suffer from structural errors, sparsity, and lighting sensitivity on roughness and metallic maps.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers standardize evaluation of image editors for physical-map prediction and reveals current model strengths and weaknesses.

idea_spark.idea: Design an interactive image editor that generates multiple physical maps (depth, normal, material) from user sketches or text prompts, allowing iterative refinement.
idea_spark.risk: User prompts may be ambiguous or incomplete, causing unstable predictions; real-time multi-map generation may incur high computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage the fixed-protocol idea from the benchmark to structure user intent into a controllable input format, improving editor controllability and reproducibility.

papers.title: Prediction of Rectal Cancer Regrowth from Longitudinal Endoscopy
papers.summary: Clinical trial studies indicate benefit of watch-and-wait (WW) surveillance for patients with rectal cancer showing a complete or near clinical response (CR) directly after treatment (restaging). However, there are no objectively accurate methods to early detect local tumor regrowth (LR) in patients undergoing WW from follow-up exams. Hence, we developed Temporal Rectal Endoscopy Cross-attention (TREX), a longitudinal deep learning approach that combines pairs of images acquired at restaging and follow-up to distinguish CR from LR. TREX uses pretrained Swin Transformers in a siamese setting to extract features from longitudinal images and dual cross-attention to combine the features without spatial co-registration between image pairs. TREX and Swin-based baselines were trained under two settings: (a) detecting LR or CR at the last available follow-up and (b) early detection of LR at 3--6, 6--12, and 12--24 months before clinical confirmation. TREX achieved the highest accuracy in detecting LR with a high sensitivity of 97% $\pm$ 6% and a balanced accuracy of 90% $\pm$ 3%, and outperformed all baselines in early detection at both 3--6 (74% $\pm$ 1%) and 6--12 months (62% $\pm$ 4%) prior to clinical detection. Clinical validation via a surgeon survey showed that TREX matched attending-level overall accuracy (TREX: 86.21% vs.\ Clinicians: 87.84% $\pm$ 1.28%). Finally, we explored TREX's ability to predict treatment response by combining pre-treatment (pre-TNT) and restaging endoscopies, achieving a balanced accuracy of 73% $\pm$ 12%. These results show that longitudinal deep learning analysis of endoscopy may improve surveillance and enable earlier identification of rectal cancer regrowth.

ai.tldr: 提出TREX，一种基于纵向内镜图像的深度学习模型，用于早期检测直肠癌局部复发。
ai.motivation: 临床观察等待策略中缺乏客观准确的方法早期检测肿瘤复发。
ai.method: 使用预训练Swin Transformer提取特征，通过双交叉注意力融合纵向图像对，无需空间配准。
ai.result: TREX在检测复发时灵敏度97%，平衡准确率90%；在临床确认前3-6个月和6-12个月早期检测中均优于基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助医生更早、更准确地识别直肠癌复发，改善观察等待患者的监测。

idea_spark.idea: 结合治疗前与再分期内镜预测治疗反应，实现个性化治疗决策。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量纵向图像数据，不同中心图像采集差异可能影响泛化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用时间维度信息而非单时间点图像，提升早期检测能力。

en.tldr: Proposes TREX, a longitudinal deep learning model using endoscopy image pairs to early detect local regrowth in rectal cancer.
en.motivation: Lack of objective and accurate methods for early detection of tumor regrowth during watch-and-wait surveillance.
en.method: Uses pretrained Swin Transformers in a siamese setting with dual cross-attention to combine features from longitudinal images without spatial co-registration.
en.result: TREX achieves 97% sensitivity and 90% balanced accuracy for regrowth detection; outperforms baselines in early detection at 3-6 and 6-12 months before clinical confirmation.
en.help_to_user: Enables earlier and more accurate identification of rectal cancer regrowth, improving surveillance for watch-and-wait patients.

idea_spark.idea: Combine pre-treatment and restaging endoscopies to predict treatment response for personalized therapy decisions.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality longitudinal image data; acquisition variability across centers may affect generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging temporal information across time points rather than single time point images to boost early detection.

papers.title: Early Semantic Grounding in Image Editing Models for Zero-Shot Referring Image Segmentation
papers.summary: Instruction-based image editing (IIE) models have recently demonstrated strong capability in modifying specific image regions according to natural language instructions, which implicitly requires identifying where an edit should be applied. This indicates that such models inherently perform language-conditioned visual semantic grounding. In this work, we investigate whether this implicit grounding can be leveraged for zero-shot referring image segmentation (RIS), a task that requires pixel-level localization of objects described by natural language expressions. Through systematic analysis, we reveal that strong foreground-background separability emerges in the internal representations of these models at the earliest denoising timestep, well before any visible image transformation occurs. Building on this insight, we propose a training-free framework that repurposes pretrained image editing models for RIS by exploiting their intermediate representations. Our approach decomposes localization into two complementary components: attention-based spatial priors that estimate where to focus, and feature-based semantic discrimination that determines what to segment. By leveraging feature-space separability, the framework produces accurate segmentation masks using only a single denoising step, without requiring full image synthesis. Extensive experiments on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over existing zero-shot baselines.

ai.tldr: 本文发现指令式图像编辑模型在最早去噪步中已隐含语义定位能力，据此提出无需训练的单步分割框架，在零样本指代分割任务上超越现有基线。
ai.motivation: 现有零样本指代分割方法依赖外部定位模块或复杂流程，而指令式图像编辑模型天然具备语言引导的视觉定位能力，但尚未被充分利用。
ai.method: 通过分析编辑模型内部表示，提取注意力空间先验和特征语义判别两个互补组件，仅用一次去噪步生成分割掩码，无需完整图像合成。
ai.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+、RefCOCOg数据集上，该方法在零样本设置下取得优于现有基线的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需额外训练即可利用预训练编辑模型进行像素级分割的思路，降低了对标注数据和计算资源的需求。

idea_spark.idea: 探索编辑模型中间层特征在更早时间步的语义分离性，可能进一步简化分割流程或提升精度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖编辑模型的质量和泛化能力，若模型在特定领域表现不佳，分割效果可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发研究者重新审视预训练生成模型内部表示，挖掘其隐含的定位能力，减少对显式监督的依赖。

en.tldr: This paper reveals that instruction-based image editing models exhibit strong semantic grounding at the earliest denoising step, and proposes a training-free single-step segmentation framework that outperforms existing zero-shot baselines on referring image segmentation.
en.motivation: Existing zero-shot referring segmentation methods rely on external localization modules or complex pipelines, while instruction-based image editing models inherently possess language-guided visual grounding that remains underexploited.
en.method: By analyzing internal representations of editing models, the method extracts two complementary components: attention-based spatial priors and feature-based semantic discrimination, producing segmentation masks with a single denoising step without full image synthesis.
en.result: On RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg datasets, the method achieves superior performance over existing zero-shot baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free approach to leverage pretrained editing models for pixel-level segmentation, reducing the need for annotated data and computational resources.

idea_spark.idea: Exploring semantic separability in intermediate features at even earlier timesteps may further simplify the segmentation pipeline or improve accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: Performance depends on the quality and generalization of the editing model; segmentation may degrade in domains where the model underperforms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires reexamining internal representations of pretrained generative models to uncover implicit localization capabilities, reducing reliance on explicit supervision.

papers.title: When Absolute State Fails: Evaluating Proprioceptive Encodings for Robust Manipulation
papers.summary: As end-to-end robotic policies are progressively deployed in the real world to solve real tasks, they face a gap between the training and inference conditions. Scaling the amount and diversity of the training data has shown some success in improving zero-shot generalization, yet robots still fail when faced with new, unseen test conditions. For instance, while robots with fixed frames of reference are common, those with moving frames pose a greater challenge for deployment. To address this specific instance of the issue, we present a study of strategies for encoding the robot's proprioceptive state to improve both in- and out-of-distribution performance at test time. Through a systematic study of joint representations, we find that a simple episode-wise relative frame provides the best trade-off between task performance and robustness, outperforming the baselines in extensive real-robot experiments conducted in a realistic test environment. The results suggest a practical path to leveraging data collected by robots with varying frames of reference and deployment to unseen test configurations.

ai.tldr: 针对端到端机器人策略在真实部署中面临训练与推理条件差异的问题，本文系统研究了本体感受编码策略，发现简单的逐回合相对帧表示在任务性能和鲁棒性之间取得最佳平衡。
ai.motivation: 端到端机器人策略在真实世界部署时，常因训练与测试条件不同而失败，尤其是机器人参考系变化时。现有方法依赖大量数据，但泛化仍不足。
ai.method: 通过系统研究关节表示策略，提出并评估了逐回合相对帧编码，并在真实机器人实验中与基线对比。
ai.result: 逐回合相对帧表示在任务性能和鲁棒性上均优于基线，能有效应对参考系变化和未见测试配置。
ai.help_to_user: 为机器人部署提供了一种实用编码策略，提升对参考系变化的鲁棒性，减少对大规模数据的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将逐回合相对帧与注意力机制结合，自适应调整编码权重以应对更复杂的参考系变化。
idea_spark.risk: 相对帧可能丢失全局绝对位置信息，在需要绝对坐标的任务中表现不佳。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类利用相对参考系进行运动控制的启发，机器人也可通过类似机制提升泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将逐回合相对帧与注意力机制结合，自适应调整编码权重以应对更复杂的参考系变化。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类利用相对参考系进行运动控制的启发，机器人也可通过类似机制提升泛化能力。

en.tldr: To address the gap between training and inference conditions in end-to-end robotic policies, this paper systematically studies proprioceptive encoding strategies and finds that a simple episode-wise relative frame offers the best trade-off between task performance and robustness.
en.motivation: End-to-end robotic policies often fail in real-world deployment due to differences between training and test conditions, especially when the robot's frame of reference changes. Existing methods rely on large data but still lack generalization.
en.method: Through a systematic study of joint representations, the paper proposes and evaluates an episode-wise relative frame encoding, comparing it with baselines in real-robot experiments.
en.result: The episode-wise relative frame encoding outperforms baselines in both task performance and robustness, effectively handling varying frames of reference and unseen test configurations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical encoding strategy for robotic deployment that improves robustness to frame-of-reference changes and reduces reliance on large-scale data.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining episode-wise relative frames with attention mechanisms to adaptively adjust encoding weights for more complex reference frame changes.
idea_spark.risk: Relative frames may lose global absolute position information, potentially underperforming in tasks requiring absolute coordinates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how humans use relative reference frames for motor control, robots can similarly leverage such mechanisms to improve generalization.

papers.title: Information as Maximum-Caliber Deviation: A bridge between Integrated Information Theory and the Free Energy Principle
papers.summary: The Free Energy Principle (FEP) is a leading framework for mathematically modeling self-organization and learning, while Integrated Information Theory (IIT) is a computational ontology of consciousness oriented around irreducible cause and effect. While conceptual unifications have been proposed and appear to be supported by empirical findings, the absence of a rigorous mathematical mapping places upper bounds on their precision and testability. This work proposes that information can be defined as the deviation $ψ$ of realized dynamics from a constrained maximum-caliber (MaxCal) path ensemble over a finite time horizon. Under this definition, each of the cause/effect repertoires central to IIT 3.0 emerge directly from MaxCal variational principles, allowing IIT's phenomenological calculus to be re-derived from constrained entropy-maximization (CMEP). This framework supplies a theoretical bridge to active inference, which is mathematically dual to CMEP under Langevin dynamics, and offers a principled route for extending IIT to new dynamical regimes. When the approach is applied under the Central Limit Theorem (CLT) for Markov chains and via large deviations theory (LDT) to Ising models, information $ψ$ is shown to be equivalent to prediction error under accompanying predictive coding models. This may hold relevance to the ``hill-shaped trajectory'' of $Φ$ observed in neuronal cultures adapting to sensory inputs. Together, these results provide a physically and mathematically grounded rationale for studying the convergence of FEP, IIT, and thermodynamic frameworks of cognition such as recent work grounding consciousness in violations of the Fluctuation-Dissipation Theorem (FDT).

ai.tldr: 本文提出信息可定义为有限时间窗口内实际动力学相对于约束最大熵路径系综的偏差，从而在数学上桥接了整合信息理论与自由能原理。
ai.motivation: 整合信息理论与自由能原理之间缺乏严格的数学映射，限制了二者的精确性和可检验性。
ai.method: 将信息定义为最大熵路径系综的偏差，从约束熵最大化原理重新推导整合信息理论的核心概念，并利用大偏差理论和中心极限定理建立与预测编码的联系。
ai.result: 信息偏差等价于预测误差，并解释了神经培养物中Φ的“山形轨迹”。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解意识与自组织的统一数学基础，以及信息、自由能和热力学框架的收敛。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该框架设计新的实验，通过测量动力学偏差来量化系统的整合信息水平。
idea_spark.risk: 数学推导依赖特定假设（如马尔可夫链、朗之万动力学），可能限制在非平稳或强非线性系统中的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受大偏差理论和预测编码的启发，可探索意识与热力学涨落定理违反之间的深层联系。

en.tldr: This paper proposes that information can be defined as the deviation of realized dynamics from a constrained maximum-caliber path ensemble, mathematically bridging Integrated Information Theory and the Free Energy Principle.
en.motivation: The lack of a rigorous mathematical mapping between IIT and FEP limits their precision and testability.
en.method: Information is defined as a deviation from a maximum-caliber path ensemble; IIT's cause/effect repertoires are re-derived from constrained entropy maximization, and connections to active inference and predictive coding are established via large deviations theory and the central limit theorem.
en.result: The information deviation is shown to be equivalent to prediction error, and explains the hill-shaped trajectory of Φ in neuronal cultures.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified mathematical foundation for consciousness and self-organization, linking information, free energy, and thermodynamic frameworks.

idea_spark.idea: Design experiments that quantify integrated information by measuring dynamical deviations from equilibrium in neural or artificial systems.
idea_spark.risk: Mathematical derivations rely on specific assumptions (e.g., Markov chains, Langevin dynamics), which may limit applicability in non-stationary or strongly nonlinear regimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by large deviations theory and predictive coding, explore deeper connections between consciousness and violations of the fluctuation-dissipation theorem.

papers.title: Watermarking Should Be Treated as a Monitoring Primitive
papers.summary: Watermarking is widely proposed for provenance, attribution, and safety monitoring in generative models, yet is typically evaluated only under adversaries who attempt to evade detection or induce false positives at the level of individual samples. We argue that watermarking should be treated as a monitoring primitive, and that internal monitoring is unavoidable given per-entity attribution keys and messages, as well as detector access. We introduce an observer-based threat model in which observers can aggregate watermark signals across outputs to infer entity-level information, showing that even zero-bit watermarking enables attribution under multi-key settings. We further show that external monitoring can emerge over time from persistent, key-dependent statistical structure, although this depends on watermark design and may be mitigated by distribution-preserving or undetectable schemes. Our findings reveal a fundamental dual-use tension between attribution and monitoring, motivating evaluation of watermarking beyond per-sample robustness to account for aggregation and observer-based capabilities.

ai.tldr: 本文主张将水印视为监控原语，并引入基于观察者的威胁模型，证明即使零比特水印也能在多密钥设置下实现实体级归因，揭示了归因与监控之间的双重用途张力。
ai.motivation: 当前水印评估仅关注单样本层面的对抗鲁棒性，忽略了观察者聚合信号推断实体级信息的能力，需要更全面的监控视角。
ai.method: 提出基于观察者的威胁模型，分析水印信号在跨输出聚合下的信息泄露，并探讨外部监控随时间涌现的条件。
ai.result: 零比特水印在多密钥设置下仍可实现归因；外部监控依赖于水印设计，可通过分布保持或不可检测方案缓解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解水印在生成模型中的监控潜力与隐私风险，指导更安全的水印设计。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种自适应水印方案，根据观察者能力动态调整密钥分布以平衡归因与隐私。
idea_spark.risk: 过度强调监控可能削弱水印的鲁棒性或引入新的隐私泄露通道。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计信号处理中借鉴聚合检测理论，优化水印的监控效能。

en.tldr: This paper argues that watermarking should be treated as a monitoring primitive, introduces an observer-based threat model, and shows that even zero-bit watermarking enables entity-level attribution under multi-key settings, revealing a dual-use tension between attribution and monitoring.
en.motivation: Current watermark evaluation focuses only on per-sample adversarial robustness, ignoring observers' ability to aggregate signals and infer entity-level information, necessitating a broader monitoring perspective.
en.method: Proposes an observer-based threat model, analyzes information leakage from aggregated watermark signals, and explores conditions under which external monitoring emerges over time.
en.result: Zero-bit watermarking still enables attribution under multi-key settings; external monitoring depends on watermark design and can be mitigated by distribution-preserving or undetectable schemes.

idea_spark.risk: Overemphasizing monitoring may weaken watermark robustness or introduce new privacy leakage channels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from statistical signal processing aggregation detection theory to optimize watermark monitoring efficacy.

papers.title: MinT: Managed Infrastructure for Training and Serving Millions of LLMs
papers.summary: We present MindLab Toolkit (MinT), a managed infrastructure system for Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) post-training and online serving. MinT targets a setting where many trained policies are produced over a small number of expensive base-model deployments. Instead of materializing each policy as a merged full checkpoint, MinT keeps the base model resident and moves exported LoRA adapter revisions through rollout, update, export, evaluation, serving, and rollback, hiding distributed training, serving, scheduling, and data movement behind a service interface. MinT scales this path along three axes. Scale Up extends LoRA RL to frontier-scale dense and MoE architectures, including MLA and DSA attention paths, with training and serving validated beyond 1T total parameters. Scale Down moves only the exported LoRA adapter, which can be under 1% of base-model size in rank-1 settings; adapter-only handoff reduces the measured step by 18.3x on a 4B dense model and 2.85x on a 30B MoE, while concurrent multi-policy GRPO shortens wall time by 1.77x and 1.45x without raising peak memory. Scale Out separates durable policy addressability from CPU/GPU working sets: a tensor-parallel deployment supports 10^6-scale addressable catalogs (measured single-engine sweeps through 100K) and thousand-adapter active waves at cluster scale, with cold loading treated as scheduled service work and packed MoE LoRA tensors improving live engine loading by 8.5-8.7x. MinT thus manages million-scale LoRA policy catalogs while training and serving selected adapter revisions over shared 1T-class base models.

ai.tldr: 提出MinT系统，通过LoRA适配器管理实现百万级策略的训推一体化基础设施。
ai.motivation: 大量微调策略共享少量昂贵基座模型时，传统全量检查点方式效率低下。
ai.method: 基座模型常驻内存，仅移动LoRA适配器，通过Scale Up/Down/Out三维扩展支持万亿参数模型。
ai.result: 适配器切换加速18.3倍（4B稠密模型），冷加载提升8.5-8.7倍，支持百万级策略目录。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效管理大规模LoRA策略的训推流程，降低资源开销。

idea_spark.idea: 将策略目录视为可调度服务，冷加载作为计划任务。
idea_spark.risk: 适配器间依赖管理复杂，可能引入版本冲突。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴操作系统虚拟内存思想，将策略地址空间与物理资源解耦。

en.tldr: MinT is a managed infrastructure for training and serving millions of LoRA policies over shared base models. It keeps the base model resident and moves only LoRA adapters, scaling up to 1T parameters, scaling down adapter handoff by 18.3x, and scaling out to million-scale catalogs.
en.motivation: Many fine-tuned policies share few expensive base models; materializing each as a full checkpoint is inefficient.
en.method: Base model stays resident; only LoRA adapters are moved. Three axes: Scale Up (supports 1T+ models), Scale Down (adapter-only handoff, 18.3x speedup on 4B dense), Scale Out (million-addressable catalogs, 8.5-8.7x cold load improvement).
en.result: Adapter handoff 18.3x faster (4B dense), cold loading 8.5-8.7x faster, supports million-scale policy catalogs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently manage training and serving of large-scale LoRA policies with reduced resource overhead.

idea_spark.idea: Treat policy catalog as a scheduled service; cold loading as planned work.
idea_spark.risk: Complex adapter dependency management may cause version conflicts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow from OS virtual memory: decouple policy address space from physical resources.

papers.title: Still Camouflage, Moving Illusion: View-Induced Trajectory Manipulation in Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Existing physical adversarial attacks on vision-based autonomous driving induce time-evolving perception errors, including biased object tracking or trajectory prediction, through (i) sophisticated physical patch inducing detection box drift when entering the view distance, or (ii) dynamically changing patches that cause different perception errors at different time. In both cases, viewing-angle variation is treated as a challenge, requiring adversarial patches to remain effective across frames under varying views, leading to complex multi-view optimization. In contrast, we show that viewing-angle variation itself can be turned into an attack tool. We design a new attack paradigm where a static, passive adversarial camouflage is mounted on a vehicle whose view-dependent appearance naturally evolves with relative motion, inducing consistent feature drift across frames. This causes the system to infer a physically plausible but incorrect trajectory, such as a false cut-in, which propagates to downstream decision-making and triggers unnecessary braking. Unlike prior approaches that require multi-view robustness or active intervention, our attack emerges from normal driving dynamics and is easy to deploy: a parked vehicle with a natural camouflage can induce hard braking in passing autonomous vehicles. We demonstrate the novel attack on nuScenes dataset, showing the effectiveness with an end-to-end success rate of up to 87.5%, measured by hard-braking events, and robustness across different scene backgrounds, victim vehicle speeds, and perception models.

ai.tldr: 提出一种利用视角变化本身作为攻击手段的静态对抗伪装，使自动驾驶系统误判车辆轨迹并触发紧急制动。
ai.motivation: 现有物理对抗攻击需应对视角变化带来的多视角优化难题，本文反其道而行，将视角变化转化为攻击工具。
ai.method: 在车辆上安装静态对抗伪装，其外观随相对运动自然变化，导致感知系统产生一致的特征漂移，从而推断出虚假但物理合理的轨迹（如假切入）。
ai.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，端到端成功率达87.5%（以硬制动事件衡量），且对不同场景背景、车速和感知模型具有鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用自动驾驶感知系统的视角依赖性设计低成本、易部署的物理攻击。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将静态伪装与动态环境（如光照、阴影）结合，增强攻击的隐蔽性和泛化性。
idea_spark.risk: 攻击可能被用于恶意干扰自动驾驶车辆，引发安全隐患。
idea_spark.inspiration: 视角变化常被视为挑战，但可转化为攻击优势，启发其他领域利用系统固有特性设计对抗策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a static adversarial camouflage that exploits view-dependent appearance changes to induce false trajectory predictions and hard braking in autonomous driving.
en.motivation: Existing physical attacks treat view variation as a challenge requiring multi-view optimization; this work turns view variation into an attack tool.
en.method: A static adversarial patch mounted on a vehicle naturally changes appearance with relative motion, causing consistent feature drift that leads the perception system to infer a physically plausible but incorrect trajectory (e.g., false cut-in).
en.result: Achieves up to 87.5% end-to-end success rate (hard-braking events) on nuScenes, with robustness across backgrounds, victim speeds, and perception models.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to leverage view-dependent properties of autonomous driving perception for low-cost, easily deployable physical attacks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining static camouflage with dynamic environmental factors (e.g., lighting, shadows) to enhance stealth and generalization.
idea_spark.risk: The attack could be misused to maliciously interfere with autonomous vehicles, causing safety hazards.
idea_spark.inspiration: View variation, often seen as a challenge, can be turned into an attack advantage, inspiring other domains to exploit inherent system properties for adversarial strategies.

papers.title: Prime Successor Irreducibility: Turing Machine Complexity, Kolmogorov Complexity, and Weakness-Based Formulations
papers.summary: We develop conjectures and theorems expressing the idea that the prime sequence exhibits computational irreducibility in the transition from one prime to its successor. Informally, given a prime pp p, no general algorithm can compute the least prime greater than pp p substantially faster than sequentially testing candidates for primality, except possibly on sparse input sets.   Our framework proceeds along complementary lines. First, we formalize Prime Successor Irreducibility in a Turing-machine complexity model (PSI-T), asserting lower bounds on running time relative to a sequential baseline. Second, we propose a Kolmogorov-complexity formulation (PSI-K), asserting that typical prime gaps are algorithmically incompressible at their scale; we prove PSI-K(c, $δ$) unconditionally for all fixed c<1 using standard sieve bounds. Third, we develop weakness-based formulations: PSI-W (sparse-set anti-concentration) shows no small menu of gap values captures a noticeable fraction of primes, while PSI-W-LE shows collision probabilities decay and logical entropy tends to 1. These extend to prime constellations and consecutive gap vectors. Finally, a sieve-theoretic framework connects local obstruction patterns to Selberg weakness parameters.   The PSI-K and weakness formulations connect irreducibility to classical statistical questions about prime gaps. Using the relationship between Kolmogorov complexity and Shannon entropy, we derive rigorous lower bounds on prime gap entropy in dyadic intervals [X,2X]. Together, these formulations provide a unified complexity-theoretic perspective on the apparent local unpredictability of the prime sequence, without asserting randomness or independence.

ai.tldr: 提出素数序列在从一个素数到下一个素数的转换中表现出计算不可约性的猜想和定理，并通过图灵机复杂度、柯尔莫哥洛夫复杂度和弱点公式进行形式化。
ai.motivation: 探索素数序列的局部不可预测性，并建立统一的计算复杂性视角。
ai.method: 分别从图灵机复杂度模型（PSI-T）、柯尔莫哥洛夫复杂度（PSI-K）和弱点公式（PSI-W、PSI-W-LE）三个互补方向进行形式化，并利用筛法理论连接局部障碍模式与Selberg弱点参数。
ai.result: 无条件证明了PSI-K(c,δ)对所有固定c<1成立；证明了弱点公式中碰撞概率衰减且逻辑熵趋于1；推导了素数间隙熵的严格下界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解素数序列的不可预测性，并为计算不可约性提供严格的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用柯尔莫哥洛夫复杂度和熵的关系，为其他数论或组合结构建立类似的不可约性结果。
idea_spark.risk: 筛法界限可能无法直接推广到更复杂的序列，且弱点公式的适用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从素数间隙的统计性质出发，启发对一般序列局部不可预测性的形式化研究。

en.tldr: Presents conjectures and theorems that the prime sequence exhibits computational irreducibility in the transition from one prime to its successor, formalized via Turing machine complexity, Kolmogorov complexity, and weakness-based formulations.
en.motivation: To explore the local unpredictability of the prime sequence and establish a unified complexity-theoretic perspective.
en.method: Formalizes from three complementary directions: Turing machine complexity model (PSI-T), Kolmogorov complexity (PSI-K), and weakness-based formulations (PSI-W, PSI-W-LE), and connects local obstruction patterns to Selberg weakness parameters via sieve theory.
en.result: Unconditionally proves PSI-K(c,δ) for all fixed c<1; shows collision probabilities decay and logical entropy tends to 1 in weakness formulations; derives rigorous lower bounds on prime gap entropy.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the unpredictability of the prime sequence and provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for computational irreducibility.

idea_spark.idea: Use the relationship between Kolmogorov complexity and entropy to establish similar irreducibility results for other number-theoretic or combinatorial structures.
idea_spark.risk: Sieve bounds may not generalize to more complex sequences, and the applicability of weakness formulations may be limited.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the statistical properties of prime gaps to formalize local unpredictability of general sequences.

papers.title: Coordinating Multiple Conditions for Trajectory-Controlled Human Motion Generation
papers.summary: Trajectory-controlled human motion generation aims to synthesize realistic human motions conditioned on both textual descriptions and spatial trajectories. However, existing methods suffer from two critical limitations: first, the conflict between text and trajectory conditions disrupts the denoising process, resulting in compromised motion quality or inaccurate trajectory following; second, the use of redundant motion representations introduces inconsistencies between motion components, leading to instability during trajectory control. To address these challenges, we propose CMC, a decoupled framework that effectively coordinates text and trajectory conditions through a divide-and-conquer strategy. CMC follows a divide-and-conquer paradigm, comprising two cascaded stages: Trajectory Control and Motion Completion. In the first stage, a diffusion model generates a simplified representation of the controlled joints under trajectory guidance, based on the given trajectories, ensuring accurate and stable trajectory following. In the second stage, a text-conditioned diffusion inpainting model generates full-body motions using the simplified representation from the first stage as partial observations. To mitigate overfitting caused by limited inpainting training data, we further introduce the Selective Inpainting Mechanism (SIM), which alternates between text-to-motion generation and motion inpainting tasks during training. Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT datasets demonstrate that CMC achieves state-of-the-art performance in control accuracy and motion quality, demonstrating its effectiveness in coordinating multimodal conditions and representations.

ai.tldr: 提出CMC框架，通过分治策略协调文本与轨迹条件，实现高精度轨迹控制的人体运动生成。
ai.motivation: 现有方法中文本与轨迹条件冲突、冗余运动表示导致轨迹控制不稳定。
ai.method: 两阶段级联：第一阶段扩散模型生成受控关节的简化表示，第二阶段文本条件扩散修复模型生成全身运动；引入选择性修复机制缓解过拟合。
ai.result: 在HumanML3D和KIT数据集上达到控制精度与运动质量的最优性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种解决多模态条件冲突的通用框架，可用于需要精确轨迹控制的运动生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件解耦为独立阶段，避免联合噪声干扰；选择性修复机制可推广至数据稀缺的修复场景。
idea_spark.risk: 两阶段级联可能累积误差，简化表示的信息损失需谨慎设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴图像修复中的分步生成思路，将复杂条件分解为可控子问题。

zh.method: 两阶段级联：第一阶段扩散模型生成受控关节的简化表示，第二阶段文本条件扩散修复模型生成全身运动；引入选择性修复机制缓解过拟合。
zh.result: 在HumanML3D和KIT数据集上达到控制精度与运动质量的最优性能。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种解决多模态条件冲突的通用框架，可用于需要精确轨迹控制的运动生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件解耦为独立阶段，避免联合噪声干扰；选择性修复机制可推广至数据稀缺的修复场景。
idea_spark.risk: 两阶段级联可能累积误差，简化表示的信息损失需谨慎设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴图像修复中的分步生成思路，将复杂条件分解为可控子问题。

en.tldr: Proposes CMC, a decoupled framework that coordinates text and trajectory conditions via a divide-and-conquer strategy for accurate trajectory-controlled human motion generation.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from conflicts between text and trajectory conditions and inconsistencies from redundant motion representations, leading to poor motion quality and unstable trajectory control.
en.method: Two cascaded stages: first, a diffusion model generates a simplified representation of controlled joints under trajectory guidance; second, a text-conditioned diffusion inpainting model produces full-body motions using the simplified representation as partial observations. A Selective Inpainting Mechanism (SIM) alternates between text-to-motion and inpainting tasks to mitigate overfitting.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on HumanML3D and KIT datasets in both control accuracy and motion quality.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general framework for resolving conflicts among multiple conditions, applicable to generation tasks requiring precise trajectory control.

idea_spark.idea: Decouple conditions into independent stages to avoid joint noise interference; the selective inpainting mechanism can be extended to data-scarce inpainting scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Two-stage cascading may accumulate errors; information loss in simplified representations requires careful design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by stepwise generation in image inpainting, decomposing complex conditions into controllable subproblems.

papers.title: Phase Matching for a Generalized Grover's Algorithm
papers.summary: We study the fully generalized Grover's algorithm to find the optimal phase changes for each step of the iteration to maximize gain in probability of observation of the target, and when phase matching is required. We find that classical Grover's algorithm and phase matching remains to be optimal till the target probability gets close 1. However, as the probability of observation approaches 1, the optimal phase changes differ from $π$ and no longer observe phase matching. We provide the optimization statement to find the optimal phase changes given the current amplitude vector and the size of the set. To analyze this formula, we approach it from a numerical and analytical perspective, with the analytical perspective focusing on special cases that simplify the optimization and allow for general statements about its behavior. Finally, we provide an example of a 5 qubit system and show that for the final iteration the optimal phase changes differ from traditional Grover's algorithm and do not observe phase matching, but lead to an increase in the probability of the target.

ai.tldr: 研究完全广义的Grover算法，寻找每次迭代的最优相位变化以最大化目标观测概率，并探讨相位匹配条件。
ai.motivation: 经典Grover算法在目标概率接近1时相位匹配不再最优，需要更一般的相位优化方法。
ai.method: 建立给定当前振幅向量和集合大小时寻找最优相位变化的优化问题，通过数值和解析（特殊情形）分析。
ai.result: 经典算法和相位匹配在目标概率接近1前仍最优；但概率接近1时最优相位偏离π且不满足相位匹配，5量子比特示例验证了最终迭代的改进。
ai.help_to_user: 为量子搜索算法中相位调优提供理论依据和优化框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将相位匹配条件放宽为动态优化，可能提升量子搜索在接近成功时的效率。
idea_spark.risk: 优化计算复杂度可能随系统规模增加，且解析解仅适用于特殊情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典Grover算法相位匹配局限性的启发，探索更一般的相位策略。

en.tldr: We study the fully generalized Grover's algorithm to find optimal phase changes per iteration maximizing target observation probability, and when phase matching is required.
en.motivation: Classical Grover's algorithm and phase matching remain optimal until target probability approaches 1, but then optimal phases deviate from π and phase matching breaks.
en.method: We formulate an optimization problem for optimal phase changes given current amplitude vector and set size, analyzed numerically and analytically for special cases.
en.result: Classical algorithm is optimal until near probability 1; then optimal phases differ from π and no phase matching, demonstrated on a 5-qubit system with improved final iteration.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundation and optimization framework for phase tuning in quantum search algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Relaxing phase matching to dynamic optimization may improve quantum search efficiency near success.
idea_spark.risk: Optimization complexity may scale with system size, and analytical solutions exist only for special cases.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the limitation of phase matching in classical Grover's algorithm, exploring more general phase strategies.

papers.title: A Constraint Programming Approach for $n$-Day Lookahead Playoff Clinching
papers.summary: In professional sports, a team has clinched the playoffs if they are guaranteed a postseason spot, regardless of the outcomes of any remaining games. As the season progresses, sports fans and other stakeholders are interested in precisely when, and under what conditions, their team will clinch the playoffs. In this paper, we investigate playoff clinching in the context of the National Hockey League (NHL), where it is computationally challenging to produce clinching scenarios due, in part, to complex tie-breakers. We present an algorithm that determines under which combinations of game outcomes in the next $n$ days a team will clinch the playoffs (i.e., "$n$-day lookahead clinching"). Our approach is a custom tree search which employs various preprocessing techniques, pruning strategies, and node ordering heuristics to efficiently explore the space of possible outcomes. The tree search leverages a constraint programming (CP)-based subroutine for inference that determines if a team has clinched the playoffs for some snapshot in time of the regular season (i.e., "0-day lookahead clinching"). This CP subroutine aims to find a counter-example in which the team being evaluated is eliminated, taking into account qualification rules and the NHL's extensive list of tie-breakers. We validate the efficacy of our algorithm using hundreds of scenarios based on public NHL data for the seasons 2021-22 through 2024-25. The methods introduced can be readily extended to other metrics of interest, including mathematical proof of playoff elimination, clinching the President's Trophy, as well as clinching (or being eliminated from clinching) any other seed in the standings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种约束规划方法，用于在NHL中计算球队在未来n天内锁定季后赛资格的所有比赛结果组合。
ai.motivation: 体育迷和利益相关者希望精确知道球队何时以及何种条件下锁定季后赛，但NHL复杂的平局规则使计算具有挑战性。
ai.method: 设计自定义树搜索，结合预处理、剪枝策略和节点排序启发式，并利用约束规划子程序进行推理（0天前瞻）。
ai.result: 基于2021-22至2024-25赛季的数百个NHL场景验证了算法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助体育分析师和球迷快速了解球队锁定季后赛的条件，也可扩展至其他排名指标。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束规划与树搜索结合，处理复杂规则下的组合空间探索。
idea_spark.risk: 对于规则更复杂或时间跨度更大的场景，计算复杂度可能过高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用约束规划处理体育规则中的平局和资格判定，启发类似规则系统的自动化推理。

en.tldr: A constraint programming approach to compute all combinations of game outcomes that clinch a team's playoff spot within the next n days in the NHL.
en.motivation: Fans and stakeholders want to know precisely when and under what conditions a team clinches playoffs, but complex tie-breakers in the NHL make it computationally challenging.
en.method: Custom tree search with preprocessing, pruning strategies, and node ordering heuristics, leveraging a constraint programming subroutine for 0-day lookahead inference.
en.result: Validated on hundreds of scenarios from NHL seasons 2021-22 through 2024-25.
en.help_to_user: Helps sports analysts and fans quickly understand clinching conditions, and can be extended to other standings metrics.

idea_spark.idea: Combine constraint programming with tree search to explore combinatorial spaces under complex rules.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity may become prohibitive for more intricate rules or longer lookahead horizons.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using constraint programming to handle tie-breaking and qualification rules in sports inspires automated reasoning for similar rule-based systems.

papers.title: Integration of an Agent Model into an Open Simulation Architecture for Scenario-Based Testing of Automated Vehicles
papers.summary: Simulative and scenario-based testing are crucial methods in the safety assurance for automated driving systems. To ensure that simulation results are reliable, the real world must be modeled with sufficient fidelity, including not only the static environment but also the surrounding traffic of a vehicle under test. Thus, the availability of traffic agent models is of common interest to model naturalistic and parameterizable behavior, similar to human drivers. The interchangeability of agent models across different simulation environments represents a major challenge and necessitates harmonization and standardization. To address this challenge, we present a standardized and modular simulation integration architecture that enables the tool-independent integration of traffic agent models. The architecture builds upon the Open Simulation Interface (OSI) as a structured message format and the Functional Mock-up Interface (FMI) for dynamic model exchange. Rather than introducing yet another model or simulation tool, we provide a reusable reference implementation that translates these standards into a practical integration blueprint, including clear interfaces, data mappings, and execution semantics. The generic nature of the architecture is demonstrated by integrating an exemplary agent model into three widely used simulation environments: OpenPASS, CARLA, and CarMaker. As part of the evaluation, we show that the model yields consistent behavior in all simulation platforms, thereby validating the interoperability, modularity, and standard compliance of the proposed architecture. The reference implementation lowers integration barriers, serves as a foundation for future research, and is made publicly available at github.com/ika-rwth-aachen/agent-model-integration

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于OSI和FMI的标准化模块化仿真集成架构，实现交通代理模型在不同仿真环境中的工具无关集成。
ai.motivation: 确保仿真测试结果可靠需要高保真度的真实世界建模，但代理模型在不同仿真环境间的可互换性缺乏标准化。
ai.method: 基于开放仿真接口（OSI）和功能样机接口（FMI）构建模块化架构，提供可复用的参考实现，包括接口定义、数据映射和执行语义。
ai.result: 在OpenPASS、CARLA和CarMaker三个仿真环境中集成示例代理模型，验证了架构的互操作性、模块化和标准符合性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和工程师降低代理模型集成门槛，促进仿真工具间的标准化和复用。

idea_spark.idea: 基于OSI和FMI的标准化接口设计，可进一步扩展以支持多代理协同仿真或实时硬件在环测试。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定标准（OSI/FMI）可能限制与未采用这些标准的工具兼容。
idea_spark.inspiration: 参考实现的开源发布为社区提供了可复用的集成蓝图，鼓励协作改进。

en.tldr: A standardized modular simulation integration architecture based on OSI and FMI enables tool-independent integration of traffic agent models for scenario-based testing of automated vehicles.
en.motivation: Reliable simulation results require high-fidelity modeling of real-world traffic, but agent model interchangeability across simulation environments lacks standardization.
en.method: Builds a modular architecture using Open Simulation Interface (OSI) and Functional Mock-up Interface (FMI), providing a reusable reference implementation with clear interfaces, data mappings, and execution semantics.
en.result: Integration of an exemplary agent model into OpenPASS, CARLA, and CarMaker validates interoperability, modularity, and standard compliance.
en.help_to_user: Lowers integration barriers for agent models and promotes standardization across simulation tools.

idea_spark.risk: Dependence on specific standards (OSI/FMI) may limit compatibility with tools that do not adopt them.
idea_spark.inspiration: Open-source release of the reference implementation provides a reusable blueprint for the community, encouraging collaborative improvement.

papers.title: Orbital stability of black solitons for quasilinear Schrödinger equations with nonzero conditions at infinity
papers.summary: We investigate the orbital stability of black solitons for a broad class of quasilinear Schrödinger equations in one space dimension, with nonzero boundary conditions at infinity. Namely, our framework handles general defocusing semilinear nonlinearities and focusing or defocusing quasilinear nonlinearities. First, we establish sufficient conditions on the quasi-linear nonlinearities ensuring the existence of a local branch of finite-energy solitons parameterized by their speed. Within this branch, the black soliton, also called kink, corresponds to the stationary solution. Our main result is the orbital stability of the black soliton in the energy space, provided that the Vakhitov-Kolokolov (VK) slope condition holds; namely, that the derivative of the momentum with respect to the speed is negative at zero. Moreover, we derive an explicit formula for verifying this VK condition. The proof relies on the analysis of a carefully designed variational problem, which allows us to control the sup-norm of the evolution of a perturbation of the kink in terms of the energy and momentum, both of which are conserved by the flow. A delicate part of the argument is the analysis of minimizing sequences for this variational problem, since the infimum is not attained.

ai.tldr: 研究了一维空间下具有非零无穷远边界条件的拟线性薛定谔方程中黑孤子的轨道稳定性，证明了在Vakhitov-Kolokolov斜率条件成立时黑孤子是轨道稳定的。
ai.motivation: 黑孤子（扭结）在非线性波理论中具有重要地位，但拟线性薛定谔方程中其轨道稳定性尚未被系统研究。
ai.method: 通过设计一个变分问题，利用能量和动量守恒控制扭结扰动的上确界范数，并分析极小化序列（因下确界不可达而需精细处理）。
ai.result: 建立了黑孤子轨道稳定性的充分条件（VK条件），并给出了验证该条件的显式公式。
ai.help_to_user: 为拟线性薛定谔方程中孤子稳定性分析提供了通用框架和变分工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将VK条件与数值模拟结合，预测实际物理系统中黑孤子的稳定参数区间。
idea_spark.risk: 极小化序列不可达可能导致变分论证在更高维或更复杂非线性下失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Vakhitov-Kolokolov条件在经典薛定谔方程中应用的启发，将其推广到拟线性情形。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受Vakhitov-Kolokolov条件在经典薛定谔方程中应用的启发，将其推广到拟线性情形。

en.tldr: Investigates orbital stability of black solitons for a broad class of quasilinear Schrödinger equations in one dimension with nonzero boundary conditions at infinity, proving stability under the Vakhitov-Kolokolov slope condition.
en.motivation: Black solitons (kinks) are important in nonlinear wave theory, but their orbital stability for quasilinear Schrödinger equations had not been systematically studied.
en.method: Designs a variational problem to control the sup-norm of perturbations of the kink using conserved energy and momentum, with careful analysis of minimizing sequences since the infimum is not attained.
en.result: Establishes sufficient conditions for orbital stability of black solitons (VK condition) and provides an explicit formula to verify it.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general framework and variational tools for stability analysis of solitons in quasilinear Schrödinger equations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the VK condition with numerical simulations to predict stable parameter regimes for black solitons in physical systems.
idea_spark.risk: The non-attainment of the infimum in the variational problem may cause difficulties in higher dimensions or with more complex nonlinearities.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Vakhitov-Kolokolov condition in classical Schrödinger equations, generalized here to the quasilinear setting.

papers.title: Recasting AI Data Centers as Engines for Carbon Removal
papers.summary: AI data centers (AIDCs) are rapidly increasing electricity demand and associated CO2 emissions, yet they also generate continuous low-grade waste heat. Here, we assess whether this heat can be upgraded by heat pumps to drive direct air capture (DAC) and reduce the climate impact of AI infrastructure. We develop a thermodynamically integrated DAC-AIDC system and conduct a region-resolved assessment across the United States, accounting for AIDC capacity, server composition, local climate, electricity prices, and grid carbon intensity. We find that AIDC waste heat can substantially improve net CO2 removal and lower the levelized cost of capture. In carbon-intensive regions, integration can flip DAC from net-positive to net-negative. Under a 2030 scenario with more GPU-intensive AIDCs and cleaner grids, several states achieve removal ratios above 1, indicating that integrated systems can offset their own operational emissions and deliver additional carbon removal.

ai.tldr: 将AI数据中心废热升级用于直接空气捕集，可显著提升净碳移除并降低捕集成本，在碳密集型区域甚至实现净负排放。
ai.motivation: AI数据中心电力需求激增导致大量碳排放，同时产生持续的低品位废热，如何利用废热减少气候影响成为关键问题。
ai.method: 构建热力学集成的DAC-AIDC系统，结合热泵升级废热，对美国进行区域分辨率评估，考虑数据中心容量、服务器组成、气候、电价和电网碳强度。
ai.result: 废热可大幅改善净CO₂移除和捕集成本；碳密集型区域集成后DAC从净正排放转为净负；2030年GPU密集型数据中心和更清洁电网下，多个州移除比超过1。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将AI基础设施的废热转化为碳移除资源的技术路径和区域可行性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将AI数据中心的废热直接用于建筑供暖或农业温室，形成多级能源利用网络。
idea_spark.risk: 热泵升级效率和DAC材料性能可能限制实际碳移除量，且区域电网清洁度变化影响净收益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将环境负担转化为碳移除资产，启发设计自抵消碳排放的AI数据中心集群。

zh.motivation: AI数据中心电力需求激增导致大量碳排放，同时产生持续的低品位废热，如何利用废热减少气候影响成为关键问题。
zh.method: 构建热力学集成的DAC-AIDC系统，结合热泵升级废热，对美国进行区域分辨率评估，考虑数据中心容量、服务器组成、气候、电价和电网碳强度。
zh.result: 废热可大幅改善净CO₂移除和捕集成本；碳密集型区域集成后DAC从净正排放转为净负；2030年GPU密集型数据中心和更清洁电网下，多个州移除比超过1。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种将AI基础设施的废热转化为碳移除资源的技术路径和区域可行性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将AI数据中心的废热直接用于建筑供暖或农业温室，形成多级能源利用网络。
idea_spark.risk: 热泵升级效率和DAC材料性能可能限制实际碳移除量，且区域电网清洁度变化影响净收益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将环境负担转化为碳移除资产，启发设计自抵消碳排放的AI数据中心集群。

en.tldr: Upgrading AI data center waste heat for direct air capture significantly improves net CO₂ removal and lowers capture cost, achieving net-negative emissions in carbon-intensive regions.
en.motivation: AI data centers' surging electricity demand causes high CO₂ emissions while generating continuous low-grade waste heat; utilizing this heat to mitigate climate impact is critical.
en.method: Developed a thermodynamically integrated DAC-AIDC system with heat pumps, and conducted a region-resolved assessment across the US considering capacity, server mix, climate, electricity prices, and grid carbon intensity.
en.result: Waste heat substantially improves net CO₂ removal and levelized cost; integration flips DAC from net-positive to net-negative in carbon-intensive regions; under 2030 scenarios, several states achieve removal ratios above 1.
en.help_to_user: Provides a technical pathway and regional feasibility analysis for converting AI infrastructure waste heat into carbon removal resources.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using AI data center waste heat directly for building heating or agricultural greenhouses, forming a multi-tier energy utilization network.
idea_spark.risk: Heat pump efficiency and DAC material performance may limit actual carbon removal; regional grid cleanliness variations affect net benefits.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transforming an environmental burden into a carbon removal asset inspires the design of self-offsetting AI data center clusters.

papers.title: JANUS: Anatomy-Conditioned Gating for Robust CT Triage Under Distribution Shift
papers.summary: Automated CT triage requires models that are simultaneously accurate across diverse pathologies and reliable under institutional shift. While Vision Transformers provide strong visual representations, many clinically significant findings are defined by quantitative imaging biomarkers rather than appearance alone. We introduce JANUS, a physiology-guided dual-stream architecture that conditions visual embeddings on macro-radiomic priors via Anatomically Guided Gating. On the MERLIN test set (N=5082), JANUS attains macro-AUROC 0.88 and AUPRC 0.74, outperforming all reproduced baselines. It generalizes to an external dataset N=2000; AUROC 0.87), with the largest gains on findings defined by size and attenuation as well as improved calibration on both datasets. We further quantify prediction suppression using the Physiological Veto Rate (PVR), showing that under domain shift JANUS reduces high-confidence false positives substantially more often than true positives. Together, these results are consistent with physically grounded conditioning that improves both discrimination and reliability in CT triage. Code is made publicly available at github repository https://github.com/lavsendahal/janus and model weights are at https://huggingface.co/lavsendahal/janus.

ai.tldr: 提出JANUS双流架构，通过解剖引导门控融合宏观放射组学先验，在CT分诊中提升准确性和鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: CT自动分诊需要模型同时应对多种病理和机构间分布偏移，现有视觉Transformer缺乏对定量成像生物标志物的显式建模。
ai.method: 设计生理引导的双流架构，利用解剖引导门控将视觉嵌入与宏观放射组学先验条件化。
ai.result: 在MERLIN测试集上macro-AUROC 0.88、AUPRC 0.74，外部数据集AUROC 0.87，显著减少高置信度假阳性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种结合放射组学先验的CT分诊方法，可提升模型在分布偏移下的可靠性和校准性。

idea_spark.idea: 将定量成像生物标志物作为先验知识，通过门控机制动态调节视觉特征，增强模型对病理定义的敏感性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量放射组学特征提取，可能受限于标注质量和特征选择。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从临床实践中病理定义依赖定量指标出发，启发将领域知识显式编码到深度学习架构中。

en.tldr: JANUS proposes a dual-stream architecture with anatomically guided gating that conditions visual embeddings on macro-radiomic priors, improving accuracy and robustness in CT triage under distribution shift.
en.motivation: Automated CT triage requires models that are accurate across diverse pathologies and reliable under institutional shift; existing Vision Transformers lack explicit modeling of quantitative imaging biomarkers.
en.method: A physiology-guided dual-stream architecture that conditions visual embeddings on macro-radiomic priors via Anatomically Guided Gating.
en.result: Achieves macro-AUROC 0.88 and AUPRC 0.74 on MERLIN test set, AUROC 0.87 on external dataset, with substantial reduction in high-confidence false positives.
en.help_to_user: Provides a CT triage method that integrates radiomic priors to improve model reliability and calibration under distribution shift.

idea_spark.idea: Use quantitative imaging biomarkers as prior knowledge to dynamically modulate visual features via a gating mechanism, enhancing sensitivity to pathology definitions.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality radiomic feature extraction, which may be limited by annotation quality and feature selection.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by clinical practice where pathology definitions depend on quantitative metrics, leading to explicit encoding of domain knowledge into deep learning architectures.

papers.title: CUBic: Coordinated Unified Bimanual Perception and Control Framework
papers.summary: Recent advances in visuomotor policy learning have enabled robots to perform control directly from visual inputs. Yet, extending such end-to-end learning from single-arm to bimanual manipulation remains challenging due to the need for both independent perception and coordinated interaction between arms. Existing methods typically favor one side -- either decoupling the two arms to avoid interference or enforcing strong cross-arm coupling for coordination -- thus lacking a unified treatment. We propose CUBic, a Coordinated and Unified framework for Bimanual perception and control that reformulates bimanual coordination as a unified perceptual modeling problem. CUBic learns a shared tokenized representation bridging perception and control, where independence and coordination emerge intrinsically from structure rather than from hand-crafted coupling. Our approach integrates three components: unidirectional perception aggregation, bidirectional perception coordination through two codebooks with shared mapping, and a unified perception-to-control diffusion policy. Extensive experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark show that CUBic consistently surpasses standard baselines, achieving marked improvements in coordination accuracy and task success rates over state-of-the-art visuomotor baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出CUBic框架，将双臂协调建模为统一感知问题，通过共享令牌化表示和扩散策略实现感知与控制的协调。
ai.motivation: 现有双臂操作策略要么解耦双臂导致协调不足，要么强制耦合限制灵活性，缺乏统一处理方法。
ai.method: CUBic包含单向感知聚合、双向感知协调（双码本共享映射）和统一感知到控制的扩散策略。
ai.result: 在RoboTwin基准上，CUBic在协调精度和任务成功率上显著超越现有基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需手工设计耦合的双臂协调控制框架，可启发机器人操作中的感知与控制统一建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将双臂协调视为感知层面的统一建模问题，通过结构而非规则实现协调。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖视觉输入质量，在遮挡或低光照环境下性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多模态对齐思想，用共享码本实现双臂感知的隐式协调。

en.tldr: Proposes CUBic, a framework that reformulates bimanual coordination as a unified perceptual modeling problem using shared tokenized representations and a diffusion policy.
en.motivation: Existing bimanual methods either decouple arms causing poor coordination or enforce rigid coupling, lacking a unified approach.
en.method: CUBic integrates unidirectional perception aggregation, bidirectional coordination via two codebooks with shared mapping, and a unified perception-to-control diffusion policy.
en.result: On the RoboTwin benchmark, CUBic significantly outperforms baselines in coordination accuracy and task success rates.
en.help_to_user: Provides a hand-crafted-coupling-free framework for bimanual coordination, inspiring unified perception-control modeling in robotics.

idea_spark.idea: Treat bimanual coordination as a perceptual modeling problem, achieving coordination through structure rather than explicit rules.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade under poor visual conditions like occlusion or low light.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multimodal alignment, using shared codebooks for implicit coordination of bimanual perception.

papers.title: WD-FQDet: Multispectral Detection Transformer via Wavelet Decomposition and Frequency-aware Query Learning
papers.summary: Infrared-visible object detection improves detection performance by combining complementary features from multispectral images. Existing backbone-specific and backbone-shared approaches still suffer from the problems of severe bias of modality-shared features and the insufficiency of modality-specific features. To address these issues, we propose a novel detection framework WD-FQDet that explicitly decouples modality-shared and modality-specific information from infrared and visible modalities in the new view of low- and high-frequency domains, allowing fusion strategies tailored to their frequency characteristics. Specifically, a low-frequency homogeneity alignment module is proposed to align modality-shared features across modalities via a cross-modal attention mechanism, and a high-frequency specificity retention module is proposed to preserve modality-specific features through the multi-scale gradient consistency loss. To reinforce the feature representation in the frequency domain, we propose a hybrid feature enhancement module that incorporates spatial cues. Furthermore, considering that the contributions of homogeneous and modality-specific features to object detection vary across scenarios, we propose a frequency-aware query selection module to dynamically regulate their contributions. Experimental results on the FLIR, LLVIP, and M3FD datasets demonstrate that WD-FQDet achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple evaluation metrics.

ai.tldr: 提出WD-FQDet框架，通过小波分解显式解耦红外与可见光模态的共享和特有信息，并利用频率感知查询动态调节融合贡献，在多个数据集上达到最优性能。
ai.motivation: 现有方法存在模态共享特征偏差大、模态特有特征不足的问题。
ai.method: 低频同质性对齐模块对齐共享特征，高频特异性保留模块通过多尺度梯度一致性损失保留特有特征，混合特征增强模块融入空间线索，频率感知查询选择模块动态调节特征贡献。
ai.result: 在FLIR、LLVIP、M3FD数据集上多项指标达到最优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用频率域解耦和动态查询选择提升多光谱目标检测性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将低频同质性对齐与高频特异性保留的思想应用于多模态语义分割或图像融合。
idea_spark.risk: 频率分解可能引入额外计算开销，且对噪声敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信号处理角度重新思考多模态特征融合，利用频率特性设计针对性策略。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从信号处理角度重新思考多模态特征融合，利用频率特性设计针对性策略。

en.tldr: Proposes WD-FQDet, which explicitly decouples modality-shared and modality-specific information via wavelet decomposition and dynamically regulates their contributions with frequency-aware query selection, achieving state-of-the-art on multiple datasets.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from severe bias of modality-shared features and insufficiency of modality-specific features.
en.method: Low-frequency homogeneity alignment aligns shared features, high-frequency specificity retention preserves specific features via multi-scale gradient consistency loss, hybrid feature enhancement incorporates spatial cues, and frequency-aware query selection dynamically adjusts feature contributions.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on FLIR, LLVIP, and M3FD datasets across multiple metrics.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how frequency-domain decoupling and dynamic query selection improve multispectral object detection.

idea_spark.idea: Apply low-frequency homogeneity alignment and high-frequency specificity retention to multimodal semantic segmentation or image fusion.
idea_spark.risk: Frequency decomposition may introduce extra computation and be sensitive to noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Rethink multimodal feature fusion from a signal processing perspective, designing targeted strategies based on frequency characteristics.

papers.title: Variable Muckenhoupt $A_\infty$ Weights
papers.summary: In this article, with introducing concepts of variable scalar $\mathcal{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights and variable matrix $\mathscr{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights, we seek a comprehensive theory of $A_\infty$ weights within the framework of variable exponent spaces. We first show that a weight belongs to $\mathcal{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ if and only if its $p(\cdot)$-th power is an $A_\infty$ weight. Using this, we characterize the $\mathcal{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ condition by the minimal operator. Then we establish the reverse Hölder's inequality for $\mathcal{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights in variable Lebesgue spaces with explicit constants and, combining this with the previously established relationship between $\mathcal{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights and $A_\infty$ weights, we prove that, for any weight $w$, the reverse Hölder's inequality holds in variable Lebesgue spaces if and only if $w$ is an $\mathcal{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weight. For the matrix $\mathscr{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights, we first show the existence of the reducing operators for matrix $\mathscr{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights and then, combining the matrix $\mathscr{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights with the scalar $\mathcal{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights, we establish the reverse Hölder's inequality for $\mathscr{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights in variable Lebesgue spaces. Finally, for further applications to variable matrix-weighted function spaces, we introduce the upper and the lower dimensions for $\mathscr{A}_{p(\cdot),\infty}$ weights and use these concepts to establish the sharp estimate involving reducing operators.

ai.tldr: 本文在变指数空间中引入了变标量A_∞权和变矩阵A_∞权的概念，建立了完整的A_∞权理论。
ai.motivation: 将经典的Muckenhoupt A_∞权理论推广到变指数空间，并同时处理标量和矩阵情形。
ai.method: 通过引入变标量A_{p(·),∞}权和变矩阵A_{p(·),∞}权，利用极小算子、降阶算子以及反向Hölder不等式进行刻画。
ai.result: 证明了权属于A_{p(·),∞}当且仅当其p(·)次幂是A_∞权；建立了反向Hölder不等式并给出了显式常数；对矩阵权证明了降阶算子的存在性并建立了反向Hölder不等式；引入了上下维数概念并给出了涉及降阶算子的尖锐估计。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解变指数空间中A_∞权的结构，为变矩阵加权函数空间提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用降阶算子将矩阵权问题简化为标量权问题，可能适用于其他矩阵加权不等式。
idea_spark.risk: 变指数空间的复杂性可能导致显式常数不紧或降阶算子构造不唯一。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从标量A_∞权到矩阵A_∞权的推广思路，可启发其他调和分析结果的矩阵化推广。

en.tldr: This paper introduces variable scalar and matrix A_∞ weights in variable exponent spaces, establishing a comprehensive theory.
en.motivation: To extend classical Muckenhoupt A_∞ weight theory to variable exponent spaces, covering both scalar and matrix cases.
en.method: By defining variable A_{p(·),∞} scalar and matrix weights, using the minimal operator, reducing operators, and reverse Hölder inequalities.
en.result: A weight belongs to A_{p(·),∞} iff its p(·)-th power is an A_∞ weight; reverse Hölder inequality is established with explicit constants; for matrix weights, existence of reducing operators and reverse Hölder inequality are proved; upper and lower dimensions are introduced to obtain sharp estimates involving reducing operators.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the structure of A_∞ weights in variable exponent spaces, laying groundwork for variable matrix-weighted function spaces.

idea_spark.idea: Using reducing operators to simplify matrix weight problems to scalar ones may be applicable to other matrix-weighted inequalities.
idea_spark.risk: Complexity of variable exponent spaces may lead to non-sharp constants or non-unique reducing operators.
idea_spark.inspiration: The scalar-to-matrix generalization approach may inspire matrix versions of other results in harmonic analysis.

papers.title: Uncertainty-aware Spatial-Frequency Registration and Fusion for Infrared and Visible Images
papers.summary: Infrared and Visible Image Fusion (IVIF) has shown promise in visual tasks under challenging environments, but fusion under unregistered conditions faces inherent misalignments. Current studies to solve them either predict the deformation parameters coarse-to-fine (i.e., coarse registration and fine registration) or estimate the deformation fields in multi-scales for registration. Though straightforward, they overlook the cumulative errors in registration, which contaminate the fusion stage and severely deteriorate the resulting images. We introduce the Spatial-Frequency Registration and Fusion (SFRF) framework, which incorporates uncertainty estimation and infrared thermal radiation distribution consistency into a unified pipeline to handle the error accumulation for robust registration and fusion across both spatial and frequency domains. Specifically, SFRF constructs a Multi-scale Iterative Registration (MIR) framework that iteratively refines the deformation field across scales, leveraging uncertainty estimation at each stage to mitigate error accumulation and enhance alignment accuracy dynamically. To ensure the accurate alignment of infrared thermal distributions during registration, thermal radiation distribution consistency is employed as a frequency-domain supervisory signal, promoting global consistency in the frequency domain. Based on the spatial-frequency alignment, SFRF further adopts a Dual-branch Spatial-Frequency Fusion (DSFF) module, which incorporates spatial geometric features and frequency distribution information to reconstruct visually appealing images. SFRF achieves impressive performance across diverse datasets.

ai.tldr: 提出SFRF框架，通过不确定性估计和热辐射分布一致性，在空间-频率域联合处理红外与可见光图像的配准与融合，有效抑制配准误差累积。
ai.motivation: 现有红外与可见光图像融合方法在未配准条件下存在配准误差累积问题，严重污染融合结果。
ai.method: 构建多尺度迭代配准（MIR）框架，每阶段引入不确定性估计动态校正变形场；采用热辐射分布一致性作为频域监督信号；设计双分支空间-频率融合（DSFF）模块。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上取得优异性能，有效提升配准精度和融合图像质量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过不确定性感知和频域约束解决多模态图像配准融合中的误差累积问题。
